Bulbasaur.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #001. Categoria: Pokémon Seed. It carries a seed on its back since birth. As it grows older the seed also grows larger. It is known to be a well-behaved and loyal Pokémon, but pretty rare to find in the wild. Abilità: Erbaiuto, Clorofilla.

Lycanroc (Dusk Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #745. Categoria: Pokémon Wolf. An independent but loyal Rockruff will evolve at dusk. This evolved form is very hard to achieve. An intense fighting spirit lies underneath its calm exterior. Prone to act on its own. Abilità: Unghiedure.

Bellossom.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #182. Categoria: Pokémon Flower. They are plentiful in tropical areas. The beauty of the flowers on its head depends on how stinky it was as a Gloom. Lots of sunshine will make the skirt leaves swirl in a beautiful and rhythmic dance. Abilità: Clorofilla, Curacuore.

Beedrill (Mega Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #015. Categoria: Pokémon Poison Bee. With the power of the Mega Stone all of its limbs are now powerful stingers. Their attack can be really vicious, stinging and piercing its foe repeatedly until the finishing blow with the stinger on its rear. Abilità: Adattabilità.

Greninja (Battle Bond Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #658. Categoria: Pokémon Ninja. The mysteries of the Pokémon world are vast. There is something called 'The Bond Phenomenon' where a Pokémon and its trainer share a connection so strong that the Pokémon changes due to it. Abilità: Mutatipo.

Lilligant.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #549. Categoria: Pokémon Flowering. Even veteran gardeners face a challenge in getting its beautiful flower to bloom, as it withers with ease. This Pokémon is popular among celebrities due to its grace, elegance and delicious aroma. Abilità: Clorofilla, Fogliamanto.

Medicham (Mega Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #308. Categoria: Pokémon Meditate. The power of the Mega Stone is tempered thanks to its meditation skills. This makes it increase all of its capabilities, but not as much as other mega-evolutions, all in favor of keeping control of its senses. Abilità: Forzapura.

Tinkaton.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #959. Categoria: Pokémon Hammer. The Tinkatuff with the biggest and strongest hammer evolves into this intelligent and daring Pokémon. They hunt Corviknight by knocking rocks into the sky with their giant hammers. Cute but dangerous. Abilità: Rompiforma, Mente Locale.

Munkidori.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #1015. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . The most famous legend in Kitakami tells about how three Pokémon and their master defeated an ogre. One of them was dim-witted but became sharp of mind after eating a forbidden magical mochi. Abilità: Catena Tossica, Indagine.

Cinccino.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #573. Categoria: Pokémon Scarf. Their fur feels amazing to the touch. It produces an oil that repels dust and prevents static electricity from building up. It loves to be groomed and pampered. The fur it sheds is highly valued for making fine clothing. Abilità: Tecnico, Abillegame.

Klefki.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #707. Categoria: Pokémon Key Ring. It adapted well to live with humans. Klefki jingle the objects they collect when they are distressed. People trust them with their keys to vaults and safes because they are very careful with their collection. Abilità: Burla, Prestigiatore.

Fletchling.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #661. Categoria: Pokémon Tiny Robin. These cute Pokémon send signals to one another with beautiful chirps and feather movements. But, despite the beauty of its lilting voice, they are relentless in attacking any intruder coming close to their nest. Abilità: Pettinfuori, Aliraffica.

Mew.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #151. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . Recent investigations declare that this Pokémon could be the common ancestor of all actual Pokémon, but it has been extinct for centuries. Some people claim to have seen one to get their 15 minutes of fame. Abilità: Sincronismo.

Gogoat.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #673. Categoria: Pokémon Mount. In the wild, they inhabit mountain regions with the leader of the herd decided by a battle of clashing horns. People rely on Gogoat to get them through harsh terrain as it always knows where you want to go. Abilità: Mangiaerba, Peloderba.

Natu.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #177. Categoria: Pokémon Little Bird. It lives close to the deserts. Its wings are not fully developed so it hops on trees and cactus to peck something to eat. If you find one, it will hold your stare. If you get closer, it might disappear in an instant. Abilità: Sincronismo, Sveglialampo.

Stunky.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #434. Categoria: Pokémon Skunk. Over the years they have moved closer to towns and other human settlements. They release a foul liquid from their rear that stinks for days to scare away predators. But sometimes they do it just for fun. Abilità: Scoppio, Tanfo.

Wooloo.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #831. Categoria: Pokémon Sheep. Wooloo's wool is incredibly resilient. It serves as a cushion when they fall from high mountain cliffs. They need to be sheared or their wool will be too heavy to move. A sweater made with this wool will last for a lifetime. Abilità: Morbidone, Fugafacile.

Dartrix.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #723. Categoria: Pokémon Blade Quill. Dartrix are vain creatures. They dislike it when their feathers are ruffled, even stopping midfight to groom them. Despite its elegant demeanor, it hides an awkward personality, prone to panic and clumsiness. Abilità: Erbaiuto, Distacco.

Armarouge.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #936. Categoria: Pokémon Fire Warrior. Charcadet evolved by using a set of armor that belonged to a formidable warrior. Due to this, their loyalty and resolve is immense. They are able to use psychic powers and shoot fireballs from their arm cannons. Abilità: Fuocardore, Sottilguscio.

Goomy.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #704. Categoria: Pokémon Soft Tissue. The weakest but best tempered Dragon Pokémon known. It lives in damp and shady places so its body doesn't dry out. It's covered in a slimy membrane that makes things slide off of it. Abilità: Mangiaerba, Idratazione.

Greninja.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #658. Categoria: Pokémon Ninja. It appears and vanishes with a ninja's grace. It toys with its enemies using swift movements, then slices them by throwing sharp water stars. If it was not properly disciplined, it will never listen any master. Abilità: Acquaiuto, Mutatipo.

Slugma.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #218. Categoria: Pokémon Lava. They are extremely common in volcanic areas where they group together. They are made of molten magma instead of blood and flesh. Slugma replenish parts of their body by absorbing molten rocks. Abilità: Corpodifuoco, Magmascudo.

Dugtrio.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #051. Categoria: Pokémon Mole. Because the triplets originally split from one body, they think exactly alike. They work together to dig endlessly through the ground. They are known for destroying the foundations of roads and buildings. Abilità: Silicoforza, Trappoarena.

Toedscruel.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #949. Categoria: Pokémon Woodear. They form colonies very deep in the forests, sticking into trees for nourishment. However, they are territorial and will engulf any stranger inside their tentacles and sap their nutrients in a very painful way. Abilità: Micoforza.

Samurott.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #503. Categoria: Pokémon Formidable. It uses the horn on its head and both seamitars attached to its front legs as weapons. In the late spring and fall, they gather on cold beaches and fight each other. The winner lets out an intimidating roar. Abilità: Acquaiuto, Guscioscudo.

Dragapult.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #887. Categoria: Pokémon Stealth. When it isn't battling, it keeps Dreepy in the holes in its horns. Once a fight starts, it launches the Dreepy like supersonic missiles. The smaller Pokémon appear happy to be shot and will reload themselves. Abilità: Corpofunesto, Intrapasso.

Nymble.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #919. Categoria: Pokémon Grasshopper. It is very small in size but it has a third set of legs that allow it to jump up to 30 feet (9 m) in the air in a pinch. It is also a very capable battler who only escapes from a fight if there's really no other choice. Abilità: Aiutinsetto, Lentifumé.

Raticate (Alolan Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #020. Categoria: Pokémon Mouse. Alolan Raticate command their Rattata underlings to bring them food every night. Five star restaurants often struggle with these aggressive Pokémon nesting close to their grounds. Abilità: Tuttafretta, Grassospesso.

Ledian.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #166. Categoria: Pokémon Five Star. When the stars flicker in the night sky, it flutters about scattering a glowing powder. The spot patterns on its back grow larger or smaller at night depending on the number of stars in the sky. Abilità: Aiutinsetto, Ferropugno.

Grookey.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #810. Categoria: Pokémon Chimp. It spends its early days looking for a stick with a certain sound. It then uses the stick to create rhythmic beats that makes plants glow and grow. Grookey are enthusiastic and kind creatures that love music. Abilità: Erbaiuto, Erbogenesi.

Alomomola.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #594. Categoria: Pokémon Caring. Swimming in the open sea is how they live. If they find a wounded Pokémon they embrace it and use their special membrane to heal it. Alomomola are caring, noble, and selfless Pokémon. Abilità: Curacuore, Rigenergia.

Dusclops.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #356. Categoria: Pokémon Beckon. Its body is hollow. Some paranormal experts say there is a spectral energy ball inside them but it is not confirmed. If it absorbs an object or a creature, there's a risk that nothing will come back out. Abilità: Indagine, Pressione.

Glameow.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #431. Categoria: Pokémon Catty. It is plentiful in urban areas, as it is a popular pet. It has a very fickle nature, purring in happiness one second, then hooking its claws into its trainer's nose the next. It loves to be admired and pampered. Abilità: Scioltezza, Mente Locale.

Mankey.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #056. Categoria: Pokémon Pig Monkey. It lives in the mountains or at the top of fruit trees. It is light and agile on its feet and ferocious in temperament. When it gets angry, it goes into a frenzy and cannot be controlled. They attack in hordes. Beware. Abilità: Spiritovivo, Agonismo.

Cradily.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #346. Categoria: Pokémon Barnacle. Cradily moves slowly at the bottom of the sea. It uses its body as an anchor and its tentacles as arms to catch prey. Their foes are melted with a potent acid before being consumed. Abilità: Ventose, Acquascolo.

Ivysaur.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #002. Categoria: Pokémon Seed. There is a bud on this Pokémon's back. To support its weight, Ivysaur's legs and trunk grow thick and strong. It becomes kind of a loner after evolving and may stray away from its group to take sunbaths. Abilità: Erbaiuto, Clorofilla.

Cubone.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #104. Categoria: Pokémon Lonely. Cubone wears a skull helmet it never removes. It is said to be from its mother or someone dear to it. It lives in the mountains where it cries at night due to the sadness it feels. It is distrustful of humans. Abilità: Testadura, Parafulmine.

Kangaskhan.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #115. Categoria: Pokémon Parent. A female-only species. She raises her offspring in her belly pouch. The young leave once they learn to find their own food. In the wild, mothers and daughters fiercely defend each other and their babies. Abilità: Sveglialampo, Nervisaldi.

Gimmighoul (Roaming Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #999. Categoria: Pokémon Coin Hunter. A Pokémon born from a coin infused with passion. Carrying that coin on its back, it seeks to return to the treasure chest it once inhabited. It survives by draining the life from humans who try to pick up its coin. Abilità: Fugafacile.

Seismitoad.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #537. Categoria: Pokémon Vibration. It is only found in a few marshes, and rarely seen in clean water. They shoot a paralyzing liquid from their head bumps and use vibrations and their tongues to harm their foes. Abilità: Nuotovelox, Velentocco.

Beautifly.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #267. Categoria: Pokémon Butterfly. They can't resist a flower's pollen; if you leave a flower on the window, a Beautifly is sure to come. Don't be fooled, for they are dangerous; they drain living creatures of their fluids just as they do with flowers. Abilità: Aiutinsetto, Antagonismo.

Houndour.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #228. Categoria: Pokémon Dark. They hunt in coordinated packs to corner their prey. They howl at dawn to announce that this is their territory, and bark to communicate tactics. Their teamwork is very efficient and they rarely welcome strangers. Abilità: Sveglialampo, Fuocardore.

Drakloak.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #886. Categoria: Pokémon Caretaker. It battles alongside Dreepy and dotes on them until they evolve. Without a Dreepy to place on its head and care for, it gets so uneasy it'll try to substitute it with any Pokémon it finds. Abilità: Corpochiaro, Intrapasso.

Terapagos (Stellar Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #1024. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. An old expedition journal states the sight of this Pokémon, describing it as an underground floating planet. But no other sighting has ever been reported. Abilità: Zeroformazione.

Mudsdale.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #750. Categoria: Pokémon Draft Horse. Hard-tempered and resilient. The hooves of this Pokémon stomp through concrete. While it is not very fast, it can keep a steady pace for days, even when dragging weight. A very dependable Pokémon. Abilità: Forza Interiore, Sopportazione.

Heracross (Mega Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #214. Categoria: Pokémon Single Horn. With the power of the Mega Stone, its muscles and exoskeleton grow in size and strength. But after going back to normal, its exoskeleton reduces size but its muscles do not, and that causes it to feel sore. Abilità: Abillegame.

Fearow.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #022. Categoria: Pokémon Beak. Fearow soar around wastelands and fields. Their large wingspan allows them to fly all day. They're easily annoyed and ill-tempered and attack using their sharp beak to peck and pierce the foes. Abilità: Sguardofermo, Cecchino.

Trumbeak.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #732. Categoria: Pokémon Bugle Beak. This Pokémon bends its beak to produce a variety of sounds, much to the annoyance of the neighbors. It also shoots a burst of berry seeds at its foes, prey, or an unsuspecting passerby. Abilità: Sguardofermo, Abillegame.

Durant.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #632. Categoria: Pokémon Iron Ant. Durant build complex mazes of tunnels in the mountains. Each colony has hundreds of Durant, all playing different roles in driving Heatmor away from their nest, as it is their only predator. Abilità: Aiutinsetto, Tuttafretta.

Kecleon.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #352. Categoria: Pokémon Color Swap. They are able to change their colors to blend with their surroundings. The only part of its body that can't change is the red zigzag line on its belly. Kecleon is very sneaky, smart and kind of insolent. Abilità: Cambiacolore, Mutatipo.

Koffing.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #109. Categoria: Pokémon Poison Gas. It is drawn to the smog and fumes of cities. It fills its body with toxic gases to float like a balloon. When it gets nervous, it releases a sickly green gas. Breathing this gas will give you a bad case of sniffles. Abilità: Levitazione, Gas Reagente.

Dewott.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #502. Categoria: Pokémon Discipline. It isolates itself from others and trains every day to perform a double scalchop slash technique. This Pokémon takes itself very seriously and won't back down from any challenge. Abilità: Acquaiuto, Guscioscudo.

Yanma.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #193. Categoria: Pokémon Clear Wing. It lives near water sources. Its eyes can see 360 degrees without even moving. Yanma is a great flyer capable of making sudden stops and turning midair to quickly chase down targeted prey. Abilità: Acceleratore, Insettocchi.

Spectrier.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #897. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. People have reported seeing a black horse, quietly prancing in the dark of the night. As soon as the creature notices them, it vanishes in the shadows. Its cries bring feelings of dread to the listeners. Abilità: Nitrito Nero.

Magcargo.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #219. Categoria: Pokémon Lava. Their shell is molten body that cooled off and hardened. It may appear solid, but it may burst into flames with a single touch. Water vaporizes on contact and rain turns into a cloud of steam. Abilità: Corpodifuoco, Magmascudo.

Swadloon.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #541. Categoria: Pokémon Leaf-Wrapped. Preferring dark and damp places, it spends the entire day inside of rotting logs. It protects itself from the cold by wrapping up in leaves. It's kind of moody and it likes to remain undisturbed. Abilità: Fogliamanto, Copricapo.

Spheal.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #363. Categoria: Pokémon Clap. They live in big herds with their families. They are bad swimmers but good floaters. To move on land, they roll like balls instead of walking. When they are happy, they clap and squeal, so they can be really noisy. Abilità: Corpogelo, Grassospesso.

Tangela.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #114. Categoria: Pokémon Vine. It blends with foliage in jungle and forest areas. Its vines snap off easily and painlessly if they are grabbed, allowing it to make a quick getaway. The lost vines are replaced by new growth the very next day. Abilità: Clorofilla, Fogliamanto.

Venipede.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #543. Categoria: Pokémon Centipede. Incredibly aggressive for a Pokémon that size. It uses the feelers on its front and back to locate things around it. Its bite injects a potent venom, enough to deter the large bird Pokémon that try to prey on it. Abilità: Velenopunto, Aiutinsetto.

Minior.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #774. Categoria: Pokémon Meteor. They live up in the stratosphere, absorbing particles to grow their cores and shells; when they become too heavy, they fall to the ground. Move damage can break the shell and leave the core exposed. Abilità: Scudosoglia.

Ogerpon (Teal Mask Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #1017. Categoria: Pokémon Mask. Ancient myths and legends remain alive to this day. It is said Kitakami is visited by a mischievous creature during the festival of masks. The creature appears playful & wears a mask as disguise to steal snacks. Abilità: Agonismo, Albergamemorie.

Sirfetch'd.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #865. Categoria: Pokémon Wild Duck. Only Farfetch'd that have survived many battles can go through this evolution. They are very proud of their leek spear and leafen shield. When this Pokémon's leek withers, it will retire from combat. Abilità: Cuordeciso, Nervisaldi.

Pidgey.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #016. Categoria: Pokémon Tiny Bird. Very common around the world, it prefers to live in forests but can be seen around cities and plains too. It's a docile Pokémon that tends to avoid trouble. It flaps its wings to lure prey out of hiding. Abilità: Sguardofermo, Intricopiedi.

Tyrunt.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #696. Categoria: Pokémon Royal Heir. This Pokémon was restored from a fossil. If something happens that it doesn't like, it throws a tantrum and runs wild. Many of the researchers that brought it back were attacked by its powerful jaws. Abilità: Ferromascella, Vigore.

Mudkip.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #258. Categoria: Pokémon Mud Fish. The fin on its head is a radar to sense movement underwater. They bury themselves under the mud at the water's edge and at the bottom of rivers. They never back away even if their foe is bigger. Abilità: Acquaiuto, Nuotovelox.

Overqwil.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #904. Categoria: Pokémon Pin Cluster. These incredibly bad-tempered Pokémon used to plague the coastline of Hisui. They remained immobile and exploded on contact, leaving them vulnerable to hunters who ended up driving them extinct. Abilità: Velenopunto, Prepotenza.

Delibird.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #225. Categoria: Pokémon Delivery. Delibird is always carrying food for its chicks and people in need. They are related to the image of Santa Claus since they always carry presents for their good and naughty kids in their bag-looking tail. Abilità: Tuttafretta, Spiritovivo.

Golbat.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #042. Categoria: Pokémon Bat. A stealthy Pokémon who loves the dark. Its fangs can puncture even a thick hide. It loves to feast on the blood of people and Pokémon alike. If it drinks too much, it gets heavy and can hardly fly. Abilità: Forza Interiore, Intrapasso.

Enamorus.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #905. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . It is said a Pokémon arrived to Hisui from a far-away land, bringing gale winds that changed the climate of the region. The Pokémon was said to be benign and their love made spring flourish each year. Abilità: Curacuore, Inversione.

Dragonair.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #148. Categoria: Pokémon Dragon. It is said to live in seas and lakes. Even though it has no wings, it has been depicted flying. There were legends of this Pokémon controlling the weather and ending the storms to leave a rainbow behind. Abilità: Muta, Pelledura.

Braviary (Hisuian Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #628. Categoria: Pokémon Battle Cry. Hundreds of years ago, the Hisuian mountaintops were the home of this regional variant. Its battle cry was ferocious and it thrived in lakes. They were hunted to extinction to obtain their beautiful feathers. Abilità: Sguardofermo, Forzabruta.

Sharpedo.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #319. Categoria: Pokémon Brutal. Known as the 'Bully of the Sea', widely feared for its cruelty, malice and gangster attitude. They hurt Pokémon for fun and sink boats for sport. Sharpedo are among the fastest swimmers. Abilità: Cartavetro, Acceleratore.

Poochyena.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #261. Categoria: Pokémon Bite. Poochyena will bite anything that moves. They will chase people and other Pokémon for dozens of miles without losing track. This Pokémon is persistent and tenacious. In the wild, they form small hunting packs. Abilità: Piedisvelti, Fugafacile.

Rufflet.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #627. Categoria: Pokémon Eaglet. This species only has males. They are independent from the moment they hatch. They will challenge even strong opponents without fear. Their frequent fights help them become stronger. Abilità: Sguardofermo, Tuttafretta.

Slowbro.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #080. Categoria: Pokémon Hermit Crab. This Pokémon fused with a Shellder that bit into its tail. It's a slow swimmer and doesn't react to pain, but Shellder tends to keep it out of trouble. Abilità: Rigenergia, Mente Locale.

Ribombee.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #743. Categoria: Pokémon Bee Fly. The pollen puff of a happy Ribombee is very nutritious and valuable supplement in Alola. It dislikes rain, for it wets its hair and makes it unable to fly, so if you see a Ribombee you know the weather will be nice. Abilità: Dolcevelo, Polvoscudo.

Sandslash.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #028. Categoria: Pokémon Mouse. It's less shy than its first stage. It curls up in a ball to protect itself from enemy attacks. Surprisingly, it is a good climber that uses its sharp claws for grip and drilling tunnels underground. Abilità: Sabbiavelo, Remasabbia.

Bisharp.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #625. Categoria: Pokémon Sword Blade. It leads a group of Pawniard. It battles to become the boss, but will be driven from the group if it loses. They are ruthless leaders and merciless with their foes. Weakness has no place among them. Abilità: Agonismo, Pressione.

Pawmot.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #923. Categoria: Pokémon Hands-On. Pawmot's fluffy fur acts as a battery, able to power an electric car for hundreds of miles on a single charge. They are patient and hard to anger, but once they are in the mood for a fight, they won't back down. Abilità: Assorbivolt, Ferropugno.

Mimikyu.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #778. Categoria: Pokémon Disguise. No one really knows what its true form looks like; the only scholar that dared to look under the veil died on the spot due to sheer terror. It disguises itself as a Pikachu in an effort to make friends. Abilità: Fantasmanto.

Farfetch'd (Galarian Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #083. Categoria: Pokémon Wild Duck. The stalks of leeks are thicker and longer in the Galar region. This has allowed Farfetch'd to fare better than their Kanto counterparts. It has also made them hardier and warrior-like. They are still delicious, though. Abilità: Cuordeciso, Nervisaldi.

Reuniclus.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #579. Categoria: Pokémon Multiplying. These intelligent Pokémon fight by controlling their arms with psychic energy. They have been seen forming networks of many Reuniclus holding hands and unleashing an incredible psychic wave. Abilità: Magicscudo, Rigenergia.

Corsola.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #222. Categoria: Pokémon Coral. People and Pokémon build their communities on top of reefs of these creatures which shine with seven colors in sunlight. Their corals have healing qualities and their presence wards against disasters. Abilità: Alternacura, Rigenergia.

Bewear.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #760. Categoria: Pokémon Strong Arm. They may look friendly but their brute strength makes them very dangerous. Many Trainers have been severely injured and even snapped in half by the 'hugs' of a Bewear. Abilità: Morbidone, Impaccio.

Ferroseed.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #597. Categoria: Pokémon Thorn Seed. They stick their thorns into cave walls and absorb the minerals from the rocks. When threatened, they attack by shooting a barrage of spikes, which gives them a chance to escape by rolling away. Abilità: Spineferrate, Presagio.

Slurpuff.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #685. Categoria: Pokémon Meringue. This Pokémon lives in human cities and towns. It has an extremely keen sense of smell. It puts its sensitive nose to use by helping bakers and chefs to find the most delicious ingredients. Abilità: Dolcevelo, Agiltecnica.

Toxapex.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #748. Categoria: Pokémon Brutal Star. It crawls along the ocean floor, using its tentacles as a fortress. Its venom has the victim suffering for three days and nights, and even if it's healed, there are aftereffects, for it is a powerful toxin. Abilità: Spietatezza, Rigenergia.

Musharna.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #518. Categoria: Pokémon Drowsing. It communicates with the mist on its forehead. It can create shapes and images from dreams it has eaten. It is said that this Pokémon is a link between this world and a another one made entirely of dreams. Abilità: Telepatia, Sincronismo.

Chikorita.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #152. Categoria: Pokémon Leaf. It is docile and loves to bathe in the sunlight. It waves its leaf around to keep foes at bay. The sweet fragrance from its leaf has a strong calming and relaxing effect on people and Pokémon. Abilità: Erbaiuto, Fogliamanto.

Weepinbell.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #070. Categoria: Pokémon Flycatcher. It sprays its stun powder to immobilize a prey coming close to it, then eats it calmly. If the prey is bigger than itself, it uses its sharp leaves to slice it into smaller pieces. Beware of the toxic liquid in its mouth. Abilità: Clorofilla, Voracità.

Beldum.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #374. Categoria: Pokémon Iron Ball. Beldum uses magnetic pulses to float and communicate. When it finds others, they move in perfect unison. It needs to develop a new brain to evolve; two of them may merge, or it could develop a new one with time. Abilità: Corpochiaro, Metalleggero.

Rotom (Heat Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #479. Categoria: Pokémon Plasma. A microwave possessed by a Rotom. It uses Fire powers and burns the food of unsuspecting people. While in this form it can use the move 'Overheat'. Abilità: Levitazione.

Brionne.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #729. Categoria: Pokémon Pop Star. In the wild, each herd has their own songs and dances; Brionne practice them in the moonlight. It is cheerful and not timid at all. It forms friendships easily through dance movements. Abilità: Acquaiuto, Idrovoce.

Chespin.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #650. Categoria: Pokémon Spiky Nut. A small and curious Pokémon. They are rare to find. Their nests are found inside of chestnut trees. Their heads are covered by spikes and if there's a threat, they'll roll into balls to protect themselves. Abilità: Erbaiuto, Antiproiettile.

Lampent.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #608. Categoria: Pokémon Lamp. This ominous Pokémon is very feared. It always arrives at someone's final moments and steals their spirit. It hangs close to hospitals and other places, simply waiting. It is said that if it gets your soul, you will never rest. Abilità: Fuocardore, Corpodifuoco.

Nuzleaf.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #274. Categoria: Pokémon Wily. They live inside holes in big trees. Their leaves are played like flutes to strike fear and discomfort in lost people's hearts. They like to go out and startle people. Their noses are really sensitive and frail. Abilità: Clorofilla, Sveglialampo.

Giratina (Origin Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #487. Categoria: Plot Device. Plot Device. Abilità: Levitazione.

Minun.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #312. Categoria: Pokémon Cheering. They will cheer their friends with their lives and will keep on cheering to their last breath. If a partner is in trouble, this Pokémon will create a curtain of sparks on its friend's side to boost its spirit. Abilità: Meno, Assorbivolt.

Sobble.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #816. Categoria: Pokémon Water Lizard. This shy Pokémon does not like to attract too much attention. It hides in shallow pools of water. When it feels threatened, it cries and its tear packs release a chemical that will make its foes cry too. Abilità: Acquaiuto, Cecchino.

Whirlipede.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #544. Categoria: Pokémon Curlipede. It is usually motionless. When it is attacked, it rotates at high speed and then crashes into its opponent with its body covered in poison spikes. Inside, it is storing energy for evolving, which normally takes a few months. Abilità: Velenopunto, Aiutinsetto.

Mime Jr.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #439. Categoria: Pokémon Mime. It likes places where people gather and imitates their expressions to try to understand their feelings. It mimics foes, confuses them, then it escapes. It doesn't take long to become a master mime. Abilità: Antisuono, Filtro.

Hitmontop.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #237. Categoria: Pokémon Handstand. They launch high-speed kicks while spinning so fast that they get drilled into the ground. They move quicker by spinning than they do walking. They are very smart and like to perform dance-like kicks. Abilità: Prepotenza, Tecnico.

Mawile (Mega Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #303. Categoria: Pokémon Deceiver. The power of the Mega Stone makes its back jaws develop a mind of their own; they are vicious and won't release anything they bite until it's crushed into pieces. They growl and howl in a haunting way. Abilità: Macroforza.

Tsareena.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #763. Categoria: Pokémon Fruit. Tsareena's elegant appearance is only matched by its boastful fighting spirit. It is known for disobeying any trainer giving orders it dislikes, and will celebrate its victories by kicking its defeated foes while laughing. Abilità: Fogliamanto, Regalità.

Vivillon.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #666. Categoria: Pokémon Scale. The patterns on this Pokémon's wings depend on the climate it grows in and the flowers it feeds on. A famous Pokémon breeder made one develop a Poké Ball pattern, it was sold for a million Pokédollars. Abilità: Polvoscudo, Insettocchi.

Kingler.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #099. Categoria: Pokémon Pincer. Its pincers grow peculiarly large. If it lifts the pincers too fast, it may lose its balance and stagger. If one of its pincers is damaged, it will detach it from its body. It will regrow after a few days. Abilità: Forzabruta, Guscioscudo.

Farfetch'd.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #083. Categoria: Pokémon Wild Duck. There used to be whole flocks of them in the meadows near a lake. Now they are almost extinct due to their meat being delicious. They carry stalks of leek or celery, which is convenient for a roast. Abilità: Sguardofermo, Forza Interiore.

Ampharos.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #181. Categoria: Pokémon Light. It's not common to see it in the wild. The tip of its tail shines brightly and in the old days, people sent light signals with the help of this Pokémon. It has a good disposition towards people in general. Abilità: Statico, Più.

Leafeon.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #470. Categoria: Pokémon Verdant. Eevee evolves into Leafeon when it's living near a special kind of moss. Its cells are capable of performing photosynthesis. It is a calm Pokémon and does not usually fight, but its leaves are sharp and strong. Abilità: Fogliamanto, Clorofilla.

Sinistcha (Masterpiece Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #1013. Categoria: Pokémon Matcha. It haunts the back of the tea shelves, as it prefers cool and dry places. It disguises itself as a hot beverage to drain the life force of those who may drink it, but most people spit it out due to its bitter taste. Abilità: Ospitalità, Antifuoco.

Electabuzz.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #125. Categoria: Pokémon Electric. A violent Pokémon. It searches for spots where it can feed on electricity and has been seen absorbing lightning from the sky. It's competitive and aggressive with others. Abilità: Statico, Spiritovivo.

Doduo.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #084. Categoria: Pokémon Twin Bird. It can fly, but it prefers to run in the prairies. The two heads usually get along. While one is eating or sleeping, the other one is alert for predators. It is known that they share a brain and their ideas are connected. Abilità: Fugafacile, Intricopiedi.

Miltank.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #241. Categoria: Pokémon Milk Cow. Their male counterpart is Tauros. A Miltank's milk is full of nutrients that may heal the sick and the injured. They can produce up to 5 gallons a day. Doctors do not recommend milk as treatment for serious injuries. Abilità: Nervisaldi, Grassospesso.

Diancie.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #719. Categoria: Registered as #703 Carbink. The popular saying goes like this: 'If you put carbon under pressure, you will get a diamond', but it surely was not referring to a Pokémon... or was it?. Abilità: Corpochiaro.

Zygarde 10%.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #718. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . When 10% of the Zygarde Cells gather, they form this Pokémon; the more cells it gathers, the more its strength will increase. Abilità: Frangiaura, Sciamefusione.

Houndoom.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #229. Categoria: Pokémon Dark. It is said the pain from its flames never goes away. Long ago, their howl was thought to be the call of the grim reaper. Pokémon and people who hear it will always shiver in fear. They are pack leaders, not followers. Abilità: Sveglialampo, Fuocardore.

Mismagius.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #429. Categoria: Pokémon Magical. Extremely rare. Their cries sound like incantations; hearing them gives you bad headaches and hallucinations. It is said that some Mismagius are benevolent and have granted good fortune to people they like. Abilità: Levitazione.

Kyurem.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #646. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . Inside a remote and frozen cave there are some old paintings. They depict a giant dragon being torn apart into black and white shards. Of the rest of the picture, only shattered ice fragments remain. Abilità: Pressione.

Tangrowth.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #465. Categoria: Pokémon Vine. While it remains still, it appears to be a large shrub. Unsuspecting prey get ensnared by its vines. In the summer its vines grow so large that you can't even see its eyes. Its arms regrow even if you cut them. Abilità: Clorofilla, Rigenergia.

Barbaracle.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #689. Categoria: Pokémon Collective. When they evolve, the two Binacle multiply into seven. They all defend the rock they live in, but each one has a mind of their own and will move independently; they tend to follow the head's orders, though. Abilità: Unghiedure, Cecchino.

Excadrill.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #530. Categoria: Pokémon Subterrene. They build maze-like nests deep underground. Humans make use of their drilling abilities to dig tunnels for subway trains. This Pokémon does not back away from foes and can be a formidable opponent. Abilità: Remasabbia, Silicoforza.

Flutter Mane.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #987. Categoria: Pokémon Paradox. It appears to be some form of highly aggressive Misdreavus. It comes out at night, long hair writhing about as its ghostly body floats through the moonlight. Abilità: Paleoattivazione.

Urshifu (Single Strike Style Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #892. Categoria: Pokémon Wushu. This Pokémon passed through a series of trials inside a temple of darkness. Its fighting style is strong and uses a devastating hardened fist. It's a firm believer in exploiting its foe's weaknesses. Abilità: Pugni Invisibili.

Ursaring.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #217. Categoria: Pokémon Hibernator. They are incredibly strong, great climbers and posses an amazing sense of smell. They snap trees and feed on their fruit as they eat quite a lot. A forest full of scratched trees marks the territory of Ursaring. Abilità: Dentistretti, Piedisvelti.

Zacian.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #888. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . There is a legend of a heroine who through sheer might wielded the blade of heroes and vanquished a great evil. Abilità: Spada Indomita.

Jigglypuff.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #039. Categoria: Pokémon Balloon. They live in grassy fields near the mountains. To climb, they inflate their bodies and bounce up. It captivates foes with its huge, round eyes, then lulls them to sleep by singing a sweet soothing melody. Abilità: Incantevole, Tenacia.

Charizard.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #006. Categoria: Pokémon Flame. A Charizard flies around looking for strong opponents. It breathes intense flames that can melt any material. However, it will never touch a weaker foe. Not many trainers are able to handle its bad temper. Abilità: Aiutofuoco, Solarpotere.

Marowak (Alolan Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #105. Categoria: Pokémon Bone Keeper. Alola has many predators for an orphaned Cubone, so its mother's spirit lingers close to protect her baby. This otherworldly influence made Marowak fiercer and changed its type completely. Abilità: Corpofunesto, Parafulmine.

Klawf.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #950. Categoria: Pokémon Ambush. They hang upside-down from cliffs near the shores, waiting for an unsuspecting prey to come closer, then they lunge to attack with their powerful claws. Their side-step is almost silent: they are very stealthy. Abilità: Iraguscio, Guscioscudo.

Anorith.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #347. Categoria: Pokémon Old Shrimp. This ancient Pokémon is thought to be the common ancestor of many modern Bug Pokémon. The fossils show it lived in big schools and it preferred warm waters. Anorith used their claws to catch small prey. Abilità: Lottascudo, Nuotovelox.

Chewtle.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #833. Categoria: Pokémon Snapping. It uses its horn as its primary weapon, but it has a reputation as a biter. Apparently its gums are itchy and the only way to soothe them is biting and chewing on stuff. It is kinda cranky but relatively harmless. Abilità: Ferromascella, Guscioscudo.

Larvesta.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #636. Categoria: Pokémon Torch. Very rare. The base of volcanoes is where they make their homes. They shoot fire from their horns to repel attacks from enemies. It becomes a flaming cocoon for months before it finally evolves. Abilità: Corpodifuoco, Aiutinsetto.

Granbull.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #210. Categoria: Pokémon Fairy. Granbull is usually a timid creature that is easily spooked. Its fangs are extremely powerful and scary so no one dares to mess with it or its loved ones. It will use its giant fangs to attack if it needs to. Abilità: Prepotenza, Piedisvelti.

Shinx.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #403. Categoria: Pokémon Flash. Its body transforms the energy of its own muscles into electricity. When in danger, their whole fur shines in a flash to blind the foes. They live with their parents and siblings in small prides. Abilità: Antagonismo, Prepotenza.

Cramorant.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #845. Categoria: Pokémon Gulp. Cramorant hunt for fish Pokémon to eat near seashores and lakes. They often try to engulf prey that is too large and it ends up blocking their gullets. They are airheaded and often forget what they were doing. Abilità: Inghiottimissile.

Mandibuzz.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #630. Categoria: Pokémon Bone Vulture. They fly in circles around the sky when they spot prey. They carry the carcass back to their nest with ease. They like to look beautiful and create ornaments and jewelry using bone pieces. Abilità: Pettinfuori, Copricapo.

Calyrex.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #898. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . Ancient records of the Galar region show that a Pokémon was named king of the land. They ruled wisely and with justice during all the years their kingdom lasted. Funny people, those Galarian folk. Abilità: Agitazione, Sintonia Equina.

Heracross.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #214. Categoria: Pokémon Single Horn. A docile creature that loves honey. They batter down trees with their powerful horn and chase off anyone who gets close to their prized honey. Not many Pokémon dare to mess with it in the wild. Abilità: Dentistretti, Aiutinsetto.

Pansear.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #513. Categoria: Pokémon High Temp. It lives close to volcanic mountains. It's very intelligent. It roasts berries before eating them, and helps lost people. When angered, the tuft of hair on its head and tail can burst into flames. Abilità: Aiutofuoco, Voracità.

Carnivine.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #455. Categoria: Pokémon Bug Catcher. It binds itself to trees in marshes. It attracts prey with its sweet-smelling drool and gulps them down in one bite. It can take it a whole day to digest a single prey, but it won't need to eat for at least a week. Abilità: Levitazione.

Glimmora.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #970. Categoria: Pokémon Ore. Graceful, but tough as stone. If they sense danger they'll open the petals on their body to display a beautiful but deadly crystal flower. They release powerful beams of energy at the slightest provocation. Abilità: Mantossina, Corrosione.

Whimsicott.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #547. Categoria: Pokémon Windveiled. Riding whirlwinds, they come and go. These Pokémon sneak through even the smallest gap into houses and cause all sorts of mischief. The tufts of allergenic white fluff it leaves behind reveal its presence. Abilità: Burla, Intrapasso.

Aipom.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #190. Categoria: Pokémon Long Tail. It lives at the top of tall trees in forests and jungles. It uses its tail tip as a third hand. However, because the Pokémon uses its tail so much, its real hands become rather clumsy. It is very playful. Abilità: Raccolta, Fugafacile.

Rotom (Mow Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #479. Categoria: Pokémon Plasma. A lawnmower possessed by a Rotom. It uses Grass powers, mows awful patterns on the grass, and chases people with the blades out. While in this form it can use the move 'Leaf Storm'. Abilità: Levitazione.

Oinkologne (Female Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #916. Categoria: Pokémon Hog. Despite their appearance, these Pokémon smell like flowers. Females have thick, strong and well-developed legs, which makes them able to jump up to 16 feet in the air and the best selection for aged hams. Abilità: Aromavelo, Grassospesso.

Tapu Fini.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #788. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. The people on Poni Island are proud of the clean water on their land; for that, they thank their guardian spirit who is said to be the ocean itself. Abilità: Nebbiogenesi, Telepatia.

Accelgor.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #617. Categoria: Pokémon Shell Out. Having removed its heavy shell, it becomes very light and swift. When its body dries out, it weakens. To prevent dehydration, it wraps itself in many layers of a thin membrane. It is very rare to see one in the wild. Abilità: Idratazione, Agiltecnica.

Sableye.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #302. Categoria: Pokémon Darkness. Feared for stealing the souls of people with their sinister eyes glowing in the dark. They lurk deep inside caves, eating rocks, gemstones, and crystals. Luckily, Sableye are rarely seen. They love jewels and treasure. Abilità: Rallentatore, Burla.

Misdreavus.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #200. Categoria: Pokémon Screech. Misdreavus frightens people with a creepy, sobbing cry. It uses the red spheres on its neck to absorb fear as nutrition. It takes a wicked pleasure in startling and scaring people. Abilità: Levitazione.

Brute Bonnet.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #986. Categoria: Pokémon Paradox. A bizarre creature combining the traits of dinosaurs and Amoongus. They don't move much and don't seem to be very intelligent, but they are fierce and dangerous up close. Abilità: Paleoattivazione.

Stufful.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #759. Categoria: Pokémon Flailing. Despite its adorable appearance it is a dangerous Pokémon. If anyone but its mother or Trainer touches it, it will respond by angrily flailing its arms around. They are popular pets but owners always regret it. Abilità: Morbidone, Incantevole.

Gligar.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #207. Categoria: Pokémon Fly Scorpion. It hangs from cliffs waiting for its prey. It flies straight at the target's face, grapples the victim with its pincers and clawed hind legs, and lastly, it injects poison with its tail. Gligar can glide without making any noise. Abilità: Ipertaglio, Sabbiavelo.

Prinplup.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #394. Categoria: Pokémon Penguin. Prinplup hunt in icy seas. They live solitary lives because they cannot stand company and will never form a group or a team. They believe they are the most important thing in the world; it's almost irritating. Abilità: Acquaiuto, Agonismo.

Chingling.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #433. Categoria: Pokémon Bell. It has a ball inside its mouth that makes a ringing sound when it hops around. To defend itself, it will emit low-frequency cries that deafen its foes. However, this sound is not audible to humans. Abilità: Levitazione.

Magneton.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #082. Categoria: Pokémon Magnet. Sometimes three Magnemite fuse into this Pokémon; other times, a single one sprouts two others. This species is greatly affected by magnetic fields. Magneton are eager to please their trainers. Abilità: Magnetismo, Vigore.

Tyrogue.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #236. Categoria: Pokémon Scuffle. Tyrogue is an energetic, competitive and fearless Pokémon that's always looking to get stronger, fighting any enemies even if it loses. They attack anyone, any day, anytime, everyday, without warning. Abilità: Dentistretti, Cuordeciso.

Axew.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #610. Categoria: Pokémon Tusk. They mark their territory by scraping their tusks on a tree. They fight each other to see who's got the sharpest tusks. If a tusk breaks, a new one grows back quickly. Only the strongest ever evolve. Abilità: Antagonismo, Agitazione.

Swanna.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #581. Categoria: Pokémon White Bird. Swanna come out to dance at dusk. The one dancing in the middle is the leader of the flock. Despite their elegant and frail appearance, they can flap their wings strongly and fly for thousands of miles. Abilità: Pettinfuori, Idratazione.

Toxicroak.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #454. Categoria: Pokémon Toxic Mouth. The toxin made in its poison sacs is pumped into the knuckle claws through tubes down its arms. Its toxins are so powerful that even a scratch from its knuckles could be fatal in a few hours. Abilità: Pellearsa, Velentocco.

Aerodactyl.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #142. Categoria: Pokémon Fossil. A vicious Pokémon from the distant past. It appears to have flown by spreading its wings and gliding. One has been revived from a fossil. It's very dangerous; it attacks with the intent to tear apart its victims. Abilità: Testadura, Pressione.

Palafin (Zero Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #964. Categoria: Pokémon Dolphin. Palafin are basically indistinguishable from their pre-evolved form. In fact, it was believed they did not evolve. Their demeanor is as friendly and helpful as always, but if true danger approaches they tend to disappear. Abilità: Supercambio.

Grumpig.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #326. Categoria: Pokémon Manipulate. Grumpig control their foes with their Psychic powers amplified by the pearls on their head and a hypnotic dance. However, when they use their powers, they have a difficult time breathing. Abilità: Grassospesso, Mente Locale.

Lombre.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #271. Categoria: Pokémon Jolly. This nocturnal Pokémon has a mischievous and impish personality. While playing pranks on people, Lombre are commonly mistaken for human children. It enjoys startling unaware swimmers. Abilità: Copripioggia, Nuotovelox.

Naganadel.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #804. Categoria: Aether Foundation Log #164. One specimen of UB-06 Adhesive has apparently evolved. Its friendly demeanor is gone. The large streams of corrosive poison it shot seriously damaged our equipment. I must take a sample to study it. Abilità: Ultraboost.

Crobat.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #169. Categoria: Pokémon Bat. Very rare in the wild. People have called it a vampire. It sneaks up on its intended prey using wings that barely make a sound. Crobat is a surprisingly loyal companion, and playful despite its appearance. Abilità: Forza Interiore, Intrapasso.

Indeedee (Male Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #876. Categoria: Pokémon Emotion. The male of the species. These intelligent Pokémon touch each other's horns to communicate. They love to help and be of service because they gather power from feelings of gratitude. Abilità: Forza Interiore, Sincronismo.

Flamigo.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #973. Categoria: Pokémon Synchronize. They inhabit the shallow waters of lakes and rivers, and have the ability to fight completely synchronized when they are in a flock. If they are alone they knot their neck and stay motionless for an unknown reason. Abilità: Nervisaldi, Coprotagonismo.

Jellicent.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #593. Categoria: Pokémon Floating. Its body is mostly seawater. It feeds on the life energy of its victims. It is regal, pompous, and hates orders. The fate of the ships and crew that wander into Jellicent's territory: All sunken, all lost, all vanished. Abilità: Assorbacqua, Corpofunesto.

Duosion.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #578. Categoria: Pokémon Mitosis. It developed two brains when it evolved. Due to this, it has a split personality. At times it may suddenly try to take two different actions at once. When the two brains finally synchronize, it shows its max power. Abilità: Copricapo, Magicscudo.

Crustle.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #558. Categoria: Pokémon Stone Home. They carry enormous boulders as a protective shell. When competing for territory, Crustle fight viciously. The one whose boulder is broken is the loser of the battle. They feed on the moss that grows on their rock. Abilità: Vigore, Guscioscudo.

Wiglett.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #960. Categoria: Pokémon Garden Eel. It was recently confirmed that Wiglett is not a regional variant of Diglett. These Pokémon burrow themselves in the sand to hide from threats and predators, detected thanks to an incredibly developed sense of smell. Abilità: Viscosità, Paura.

Dracozolt.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #880. Categoria: Pokémon Fossil. A mix-up of DNA during the revival process resulted in this. Its lower body was an incredibly strong Pokémon that probably preyed on the little one from the upper body. Sometimes it will try to run from itself. Abilità: Assorbivolt, Remasabbia.

Poliwhirl.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #061. Categoria: Pokémon Tadpole. Though it is skilled at walking, it prefers to live underwater where there's less danger. It sweats to keep its skin moist. Thanks to this, it can easily slip out of the clutches of any enemy. Abilità: Assorbacqua, Umidità.

Mareanie.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #747. Categoria: Pokémon Brutal Star. It can be found resting on the sea floor, waiting to sting unsuspecting prey to sting. They are pretty toxic and can attack with their barbed tentacles. Corsola are their main prey and one of its favourite meals. Abilità: Spietatezza, Scioltezza.

Kirlia.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #281. Categoria: Pokémon Emotion. When they use their powers, their surroundings are distorted with mirages and illusory sceneries from the future and the past. Kirlia like to dance and dislike being bossed around. Abilità: Sincronismo, Traccia.

Groudon (Primal Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #383. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . Millions of years ago, chaos reigned. Volcanoes erupted without control and unbearable heat made all life dry out. Who was so angry inside the raging fire? Its fury has since ingrained into the earth as red rubies. Abilità: Terra Estrema.

Unown.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #201. Categoria: Pokémon Symbol. There are depictions of it in ancient ruins. When Unown are gathered together, it is said that a strange power capable of anything emerges. They are all shaped like letters, each one of them with a unique power. Abilità: Levitazione.

Nosepass.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #299. Categoria: Pokémon Nosepass. Their magnetic noses always point to the north. They were thought to be immobile, but it was recently revealed that they actually move 3/8 of an inch every year. They get a little crazy when magnets are close. Abilità: Magnetismo, Vigore.

Exeggutor (Alolan Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #103. Categoria: Pokémon Coconut. Alola is the native region for this Pokémon; only there it can evolve into this form. With this size, its Psychic abilities are rarely needed and its trainer's orders are rarely heard. They enjoy the sun on the beach. Abilità: Indagine, Coglibacche.

Dialga (Origin Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #483. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . Religious lore talks about Arceus' secondborn, the ruler of time. The creator made its children in its image, but slightly less powerful so as not to repeat the mistake of its destructive firstborn. Abilità: Pressione, Telepatia.

Pidgeot (Mega Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #018. Categoria: Pokémon Bird. With the power of the Mega Stone, Pidgeot's flying becomes a blurred red stripe in the sky. It won't stop soaring the skies while in this state without tiring or needing to rest for many days at a time. Abilità: Nullodifesa.

Thundurus (Therian Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #642. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. Some Pokémon reveal their true forms after recovering power lost to them. Great forces of nature can help them recover their strength such as tornadoes, lightning, and even a landslide. Abilità: Assorbivolt.

Corviknight.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #823. Categoria: Pokémon Raven. With their great intellect and flying skills, these Pokémon very successfully take the place as the kings of the Galarian sky. When they fly, they cast giant shadows that strike fear upon foes and friends alike. Abilità: Pressione, Blindospecchio.

Rapidash.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #078. Categoria: Pokémon Fire Horse. It lives happily on prairies. It loves speed competitions - a herd can often be seen running alongside a train. It can regulate the heat of its mane as to let its trainer ride it, but only if it trusts them enough. Abilità: Fugafacile, Corpodifuoco.

Nincada.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #290. Categoria: Pokémon Trainee. They live underground for decades, absorbing nutrients from roots and waiting for evolution. Nincada are nearly blind and cannot stand bright lights. They only come out to shed their exoskeleton and evolve. Abilità: Insettocchi, Fugafacile.

Indeedee (Female Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #876. Categoria: Pokémon Emotion. The female of the species. These intelligent Pokémon touch each other's horns to communicate. They love to help and be of service because they gather power from feelings of gratitude. Abilità: Mente Locale, Sincronismo.

Dusknoir.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #477. Categoria: Pokémon Gripper. This feared Pokémon is said to travel to the other world. Some even believe that it takes lost spirits along with it. It uses the antenna on its head to receive messages from the deceased. Abilità: Pressione, Indagine.

Tinkatink.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #957. Categoria: Pokémon Metalsmith. These small creatures gather iron scraps to make a metal hammer to defend themselves. They are very diligent and re-shape the hammer many times until they are satisfied with the results. Abilità: Mente Locale, Arraffalesto.

Huntail.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #367. Categoria: Pokémon Deep Sea. It lives at extreme depths of the sea. Their eyes can see perfectly in complete darkness. Huntail light up their tail to attract their prey, then swallow them whole with a single bite. Abilità: Nuotovelox, Idrovelo.

Vulpix (Alolan Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #037. Categoria: Pokémon Fox. The Vulpix who became stranded in Alola had to change type in order to survive. Alola's local name for this Pokémon is Keokeo. They use their tails as a fan to cool themselves in hot climates. Abilità: Mantelneve, Scendineve.

Rellor.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #953. Categoria: Pokémon Rolling. Rellor have weak psychic abilities that they use to shape a mud ball by mixing sand, dirt and waste. This ball is precious to them and the bigger it gets, the closer Rellor is to evolving. Use gloves to touch the ball. Abilità: Insettocchi, Muta.

Foongus.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #590. Categoria: Pokémon Mushroom. The top of fungus takes a pattern that resembles a predator to protect itself. In recent times this pattern has started to look like a Pokéball. It releases toxic spores into the air that help it move around safely. Abilità: Spargispora, Rigenergia.

Rowlet.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #722. Categoria: Pokémon Grass Quill. This is a shy Pokémon. It sleeps during the day, absorbing sunlight through its feathers, then at night becomes more active. It likes to keep sight of its trainer at all times, rotating its head 180 degrees to do so. Abilità: Erbaiuto, Distacco.

Rhyhorn.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #111. Categoria: Pokémon Spikes. It lives in grasslands and rough terrain. It is covered with a thick hide. It tramples any threat by ramming against them. It is not very smart, and can stay ramming at things for hours just because. Abilità: Testadura, Temerarietà.

Golett.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #622. Categoria: Pokémon Automaton. Very few have been seen in old ruins. These Pokémon are thought to have been created by the science of an ancient and mysterious civilization. The energy inside of them comes from an unknown source. Abilità: Ferropugno, Impaccio.

Helioptile.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #694. Categoria: Pokémon Generator. They make their home in deserts. Since food is scarce where they live, they use the sun as a source of energy by basking their frills in the light. They run pretty fast as to not burn themselves on the hot sand. Abilità: Pellearsa, Sabbiavelo.

Glimmet.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #969. Categoria: Pokémon Ore. Attached to cave walls they appear to be crystal flowers. Beware, as they release a pollen that is toxic to inhale and their petals are actually crystallized poison. They close the flower when they are in bright places. Abilità: Mantossina, Corrosione.

Cubchoo.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #613. Categoria: Pokémon Chill. They are hatched by the end of winter and stay with their mothers for a couple of seasons. Their running nose is used to practice their ice powers. In fact, when they get sick, their nose is completely dry. Abilità: Mantelneve, Paura.

Quilava.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #156. Categoria: Pokémon Volcano. It intimidates foes with intense gusts of flames and superheated air. Beware: if a Quilava turns its back on you, it is planing on using a fire move. Abilità: Aiutofuoco, Fuocardore.

Eevee.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #133. Categoria: Pokémon Evolution. This Pokemon is extremely rare to find. Eevee has an unstable genetic makeup that suddenly mutates to fit its environment. Radiation from various stones causes this Pokemon to evolve. Abilità: Fugafacile, Adattabilità.

Purrloin.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #509. Categoria: Pokémon Devious. They have adapted to live in the streets of big cities. They steal for fun, but their victims can't help but forgive them. Their cute act is a ruse. People who keep them as pets often regret it. Abilità: Scioltezza, Burla.

Phione.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #489. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . There have been sightings of small groups of similar Pokémon but its existence has never been confirmed. Rumor has it that they are Manaphy's prodigal children. Abilità: Idratazione.

Deino.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #633. Categoria: Pokémon Irate. This Pokémon is blind. It bites all it finds to be aware of its surroundings. It constantly bumps into things and attacks anything that's too close. Their bodies are covered in wounds and they are very aggressive. Abilità: Tuttafretta.

Yamask (Galarian Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #562. Categoria: Pokémon Spirit. It's said that this Pokémon was formed when an ancient clay tablet was drawn to the dark energy of a spirit. The clay slab seems to be absorbing Yamask's power; that's why it is so pale. Abilità: Anima Errante.

Lugia.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #249. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . Known as the Guardian of the Sea, it used to live in the Brass Tower, where Pokémon awoke. Lugia's myth is linked to the idea that those whose death was pure will be reborn in the sea. Abilità: Pressione, Multisquame.

Tarountula.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #917. Categoria: Pokémon String Ball. Scyther are their main predators, so they wrap their body in an elastic silk that bounces off any slash attack. This silk is very elastic but also strong as metal wire, making it a very appreciated material. Abilità: Insonnia, Sorveglianza.

Psyduck.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #054. Categoria: Pokémon Duck. It lives near lakes and ponds, but it's not very good at swimming. It is always tormented by headaches that worsen when it uses psychic powers. Psyduck seem unaware of their own power. Abilità: Antimeteo, Umidità.

Electrode.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #101. Categoria: Pokémon Ball. It is known for causing blackouts in cities. After evolving, it explodes as a way to release excess electricity or simply to amuse itself. Trainers need to be careful around a bored Electrode. Abilità: Statico, Antisuono.

Incineroar.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #727. Categoria: Pokémon Heel. It has a bad reputation; some of them have attacked the opposing trainer during battles. They are also prone to disobey their own Trainer, going for a more brutal fighting style to shred their foes to pieces. Abilità: Aiutofuoco, Prepotenza.

Drowzee.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #096. Categoria: Pokémon Hypnosis. It eats the dreams of a sleeping person or Pokémon and shows fondness for the dreams of young children. Once the victim is deep in slumber, it will extract and eat the dream through the nose. Abilità: Insonnia, Premonizione.

Heatran.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #485. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . An old painting showed a similar Pokémon standing atop an erupting volcano. Abilità: Fuocardore, Corpodifuoco.

Boltund.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #836. Categoria: Pokémon Dog. It sends electricity through its legs to boost their speed. It easily breaks 50 mph. They get destructive and stressed if you do not take them out to run daily, otherwise they are chill and easygoing Pokémon. Abilità: Ferromascella, Tenacia.

Giratina.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #487. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . Religious stories talk about a fallen one: the Firstborn who desired Arceus' power for itself and ended up banished into a dimension of horrors... waiting to be freed. Abilità: Pressione, Telepatia.

Whismur.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #293. Categoria: Pokémon Whisper. Their timid voice is barely audible, however, if it senses danger, they start crying loud enough to deafen anyone nearby. Their own noise scares them even more, so they cry harder until their ear covers shut. Abilità: Antisuono, Paura.

Snorlax.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #143. Categoria: Pokémon Sleeping. Snorlax's typical day consists of eating and sleeping. It is such a docile Pokémon that children use its big belly as a place to play. It only attacks when it's awoken harshly. Fortunately it is a heavy sleeper. Abilità: Immunità, Grassospesso.

Watchog.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #505. Categoria: Pokémon Lookout. Their fur has a luminescent property. They make the patterns on their bodies glow in order to threaten predators. Their keen eyesight allows them to see in the dark. They are also good diggers. Abilità: Ponderazione, Risplendi.

Vaporeon.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #134. Categoria: Pokémon Bubble Jet. Eevee underwent a strange mutation. It grew fins and gills that allow it to live underwater. This Pokémon has the ability to become translucent when it dives underwater. Abilità: Assorbacqua, Idratazione.

Pidove.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #519. Categoria: Pokémon Tiny Pigeon. These Pokémon thrive in the cities. They are accustomed to people and they often gather in parks. They are forgetful and not very smart, but they always remember the way back home. Abilità: Pettinfuori, Supersorte.

Silcoon.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #266. Categoria: Pokémon Cocoon. They tether themselves to tree branches while they wait to evolve. Sometimes they peek from a small hole in the cocoon. Silcoon feed only on raindrops. If Wurmple lives among flowers, it evolves into Silcoon. Abilità: Muta.

Orthworm.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #968. Categoria: Pokémon Earthworm. This Pokémon lives burrowed in arid deserts. It can use the tendrils on its body like fists and attack with a storm of punches. However, they tend to be peaceful creatures who just want to be left alone. Abilità: Mangiaterra, Sabbiavelo.

Grubbin.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #736. Categoria: Pokémon Larva. They tend to gather anywhere Electric Pokémon live to protect themselves from bird Pokémon who may prey on them. When they are ready to evolve they bury themselves underground. Abilità: Aiutinsetto.

Bellibolt.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #939. Categoria: Pokémon EleFrog. It expands and contracts its body with a croaking sound. The belly button on its stomach produces the electricity while the two eye-like organs on its head release it. They are relaxed and friendly creatures. Abilità: Convertivolt, Statico.

Donphan.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #232. Categoria: Pokémon Armor. Strong enough to knock down a house. They like to attack by rolling as a ball at high speed, however once they start rolling, they have a hard time stopping. Some may keep their loving Phanpy nature. Abilità: Vigore, Sabbiavelo.

Linoone (Galarian Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #264. Categoria: Pokémon Rushing. It uses its long tongue to taunt its opponents. Once the foe is enraged, this Pokémon hurls itself at it, tackling them forcefully. They are bad-mannered and enjoy thrashing things about. Abilità: Raccolta, Piedisvelti.

Goodra (Hisuian Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #706. Categoria: Pokémon Shell Bunker. Goodra living in the Hisui region a few centruries ago were as kind-hearted as those from today. Their hard shells were used to defend those close to them to the point of sacrificing themselves to extinction. Abilità: Mangiaerba, Copricapo.

Minccino.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #572. Categoria: Pokémon Chinchilla. They greet one another by rubbing their tails, which are always kept well-groomed and clean. Houseparents love to keep them as pets because they eagerly help to clean the house. Abilità: Incantevole, Tecnico.

Numel.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #322. Categoria: Pokémon Numb. An incredibly dim-witted Pokémon. They don't notice being hit. If they get hungry, they faint. Numel's body is a cauldron of boiling magma. On rainy days, the magma cools and its speed is lowered. Abilità: Indifferenza, Disinvoltura.

Scream Tail.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #985. Categoria: Pokémon Paradox. While it has the appearance of a Jigglypuff, it seems to be aggressive and ferocious. It screams and attacks with its fangs at anything in the forest that dares come near it. Abilità: Paleoattivazione.

Blipbug.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #824. Categoria: Pokémon Larva. Often found in gardens, Blipbug has hairs on its body that it uses to assess its surroundings. They are very smart and easy to teach but they are not very strong and other Pokémon bully them often. Abilità: Aiutinsetto, Insettocchi.

Landorus.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #645. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . Earthquakes and landslides raze Unova with frequency, but the places that suffer them are left with a plentiful harvest that year. The mythical 'land ravager' is both feared and revered. Abilità: Silicoforza, Forzabruta.

Orbeetle.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #826. Categoria: Pokémon Seven Spot. It's famous for its high intelligence and the large size of its brain. It has immense psychic power. They patrol their territory as floating sentries, focusing a ray of light over any intruder, even if they are miles away. Abilità: Aiutinsetto, Indagine.

Pidgeotto.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #017. Categoria: Pokémon Bird. Each Pidgeotto claims a large meadow area as its territory. This Pokémon flies around, patrolling its home and will attack any intruders with its sharp claws. It will challenge itself to fly a bit higher every day. Abilità: Sguardofermo, Intricopiedi.

Dialga.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #483. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . In some religions there is a being called 'The God of Time' whose first roar brought future, present, and past. Abilità: Pressione, Telepatia.

Pelipper.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #279. Categoria: Pokémon Water Bird. Pelipper has been seen carrying eggs and other Pokémon inside its massive bill, protecting them from predators and storms, transporting the young through the great seas and into new homes. Abilità: Sguardofermo, Piovischio.

Tapu Koko.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #785. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. People on Melemele Island talk about a guardian spirit who punishes the evil doers with lightning strikes. If it appears in front of you who knows what its intentions may be. Abilità: Elettrogenesi, Telepatia.

Panpour.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #515. Categoria: Pokémon Spray. It does not thrive in dry climates. It keeps itself damp by shooting the water stored in its head tuft. Its water is valued by gardeners and Grass Pokémon breeders as it makes plants grow beautiful. Abilità: Acquaiuto, Voracità.

Drampa.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #780. Categoria: Pokémon Placid. It lives alone at the top of high mountains but comes down in the morning to eat berries. It is a caring Pokémon, especially towards children, and will fiercely protect any children it cares for with tremendous force. Abilità: Furore, Mangiaerba.

Machop.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #066. Categoria: Pokémon Superpower. It lives in the mountains, training its fists against strong rocks, lifting boulders, and hurling Rock Pokémon around to build stronger muscles. Even with its small size, it can compete against expert humans and win. Abilità: Dentistretti, Nullodifesa.

Wynaut.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #360. Categoria: Pokémon Bright. Its face always appears to be happy, but Wynaut can be deceitful. You can only discern its true emotions through its tail. They live together in caves and bump into each other to gain strength. Abilità: Pedinombra, Telepatia.

Ponyta (Galarian Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #077. Categoria: Pokémon Unique Horn. The old magical forests of Galar made Ponyta adopt a mystic nature. Their miraculous horn can heal most wounds and sense the purity in your heart; if you hold evil, you'll never see this Pokémon in the wild. Abilità: Fugafacile, Pastelvelo.

Lapras.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #131. Categoria: Pokémon Transport. Humans drove Lapras close to extinction. In the evenings, this Pokémon is said to sing as it seeks what few others of its kind still remain. Their gentle nature has made them easy to lure and catch. Abilità: Guscioscudo, Assorbacqua.

Vulpix.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #037. Categoria: Pokémon Fox. It is born with just one tail. As it grows, its single white tail gains color and splits into six. It is quite warm and cuddly - very popular with the ladies. It is, however, uncommon to see one in the wild. Abilità: Fuocardore, Siccità.

Volcarona.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #637. Categoria: Pokémon Sun. A sea of fire engulfs the surroundings of its battles, since it uses six wings to scatter blazing scales. There are stories of how its fire saved villages during winter and how it shone like the sun over the mountains. Abilità: Corpodifuoco, Aiutinsetto.

Entei.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #244. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . Johto legends tell about a Pokémon so powerful that its roars make volcanoes erupt, traveling the lands cloaked in a cloud of volcanic smoke. Abilità: Pressione, Forza Interiore.

Sawk.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #539. Categoria: Pokémon Karate. This Pokémon is entirely dedicated to becoming stronger. Many have secluded in the mountains to train all day. Wild ones make their clothes out of plants and vines they find. Sawk and Throh train together. Abilità: Vigore, Forza Interiore.

Lechonk.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #915. Categoria: Pokémon Hog. They can be seen foraging for food in the acorn forests of Paldea. Do not be deceived, these Pokémon have a refined sense of taste and only like fine foods. Their natural herbal scent makes for great hams. Abilità: Aromavelo, Voracità.

Golurk.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #623. Categoria: Pokémon Automaton. It is said that Golurk were ordered to protect people and Pokémon by the ancient people who created them. There are records of only one still alive found in the ruins; the rest are just statues now. Abilità: Ferropugno, Nullodifesa.

Tynamo.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #602. Categoria: Pokémon EleFish. These Pokémon move in schools. They have an electricity-storing organ at their sides, but they can't generate their own power. They only discharge electricity if they are in danger. Abilità: Levitazione.

Lumineon.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #457. Categoria: Pokémon Neon. It lives in the deep-sea bottom. It attracts prey by flashing the patterns on its tail fins. In the wild it competes against Lanturn for food. Its main predators are Tentacruel and Sharpedo. Abilità: Nuotovelox, Acquascolo.

Emboar.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #500. Categoria: Pokémon Mega Fire Pig. Despite its scary exterior, it is a very gentle Pokémon that cares deeply for family and friends. It can light its punches and beard on fire; it also shows proficiency on martial arts like Judo. Abilità: Aiutofuoco, Temerarietà.

Basculegion (Male Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #902. Categoria: Pokémon Big Fish. There is a legend amongst fishers of Sinnoh that goes back to the era of Hisui, in which the tormented souls of departed fish will gather around a champion to avenge them by eating the fishermen who ate them. Abilità: Adattabilità, Rompiforma.

Breloom.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #286. Categoria: Pokémon Mushroom. Their flexible arms and quick footwork can put good fighters to shame. The seeds on their tail and the cap on their head release poison spores. They love humid and hot climates. Abilità: Velencura, Tecnico.

Meditite.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #307. Categoria: Pokémon Meditate. Deep in the mountains they train their mind to increase their spiritual power; however, they lack focus and get distracted easily. As part of their training, Meditite go through a period of fasting. Abilità: Forzapura, Telepatia.

Glastrier.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #896. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . There have been sightings of a horse galloping through blizzards in the Galar region. People who claim to have seen it say its cries are terrifying and that the creature goes away when the weather improves. Abilità: Nitrito Bianco.

Alakazam.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #065. Categoria: Pokémon Psi. A Pokémon that can memorize anything and never forgets what it learns. Over time it becomes too smart to allow anyone to be its master. Alakazam's psychic powers can be terrifying. Abilità: Sincronismo, Magicscudo.

Basculin.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #550. Categoria: Pokémon Hostile.
