Two variants exist of the same Pokémon, a blue one and a red one, but they don't get along as they compete for territory and prey. These Pokémon are very hostile, but also delicious when grilled. Abilità: Temerarietà, Adattabilità.

Kricketune.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #402. Categoria: Pokémon Cricket. It can make all kind of sounds with its antennae, arms and mouth. It signals emotions with different tunes but scientists still cannot define what they mean. They imitate the songs they hear. Abilità: Aiutinsetto, Tecnico.

Tandemaus.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #924. Categoria: Pokémon Couple. These Pokémon stick together no matter what. Their teamwork is very well-synchronized, acting almost like a single entity. Beware, as they reproduce very fast and can become hundreds in just a few months. Abilità: Fugafacile, Raccolta.

Growlithe (Hisuian Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #058. Categoria: Pokémon Puppy. There are records of its existence in old Hisuian territories, but all that remains today are old stone statues of fierce and vigilant Pokémon. It was said to live in pairs, deep in the mountains and away from humans. Abilità: Prepotenza, Giustizia.

Flaaffy.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #180. Categoria: Pokémon Wool. Its wool quality changes so that it can generate a higher amount of static electricity with a smaller amount of wool. The bare and slick parts of its hide are shielded with small electric impulses. Abilità: Statico, Più.

Talonflame.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #663. Categoria: Pokémon Scorching. They soar over desert canyons. If they spot prey, they launch down at full speed to deliver a finishing blow. They are excellent hunters. With every wing flap they take, a trail of fiery dust is left behind. Abilità: Corpodifuoco, Aliraffica.

Baltoy.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #343. Categoria: Pokémon Clay Doll. They spin on their center to move around. When a group of them gathers they create a horrible, headache-inducing noise in unison. Old paintings show them living with people in ancient times. Abilità: Levitazione.

Masquerain.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #284. Categoria: Pokémon Eyeball. Their antennas look like terrifying eyes. Masquerain can fly in any direction like a helicopter, but their wings are soft and fragile, so they don't fly when it's raining. They cling to trees at night to sleep. Abilità: Nuotovelox, Prepotenza.

Ditto.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #132. Categoria: Pokémon Transform. This Pokémon is quite common, but it's pretty difficult to spot. It can transform into any other Pokémon and imitate their behavior. When it sleeps, it changes into a stone to avoid being attacked. Abilità: Scioltezza, Sosia.

Smoochum.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #238. Categoria: Pokémon Kiss. They examine their surroundings with their lips. They love to smooch, but Pokémon dislike their kisses. Smoochum are always running excitedly, but they are clumsy and end up stumbling and crying. Abilità: Premonizione, Indifferenza.

Oricorio (Sensu Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #741. Categoria: Pokémon Dancing. What was thought to be different species ended up being a single Pokémon. Oricorio Sensu is calm and indifferent. Its dance is said to attract evil spirits. People from Kanto find it very nostalgic. Abilità: Sincrodanza.

Shelgon.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #372. Categoria: Pokémon Endurance. The body is covered in a powerful armor that resembles bones. It hides in caves awaiting evolution, enduring hunger and harm while its cells prepare for its final transformation. Abilità: Testadura, Copricapo.

Gossifleur.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #829. Categoria: Pokémon Flowering. You'll find them in fields, basking in the sun. They let the wind sway them while they sing a joyful song. Afterwards, their flowers bloom and glow. This delightful display makes it very popular among trainers. Abilità: Lanugine, Spargispora.

Arrokuda.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #846. Categoria: Pokémon Rush. They propel themselves, swimming at high speeds to hunt their prey. After they have eaten, their swimming becomes sluggish and they are at risk of being eaten themselves. They are proud of their pointed jaw. Abilità: Nuotovelox, Elicopinna.

Kakuna.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #014. Categoria: Pokémon Cocoon. It remains virtually immobile while it clings to a tree. On the inside, it is preparing for evolution by raising the temperature of its shell. Beware of Beedrills that may roam close to it. Abilità: Muta.

Dragonite.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #149. Categoria: Pokémon Dragon. Very few people have ever seen this Pokémon. Its intelligence matches that of humans. There are records of a Pokémon with a similar description that helped rescue a ship full of people during a hurricane. Abilità: Forza Interiore, Multisquame.

Drilbur.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #529. Categoria: Pokémon Mole. It lives in caves but loves to wreak havoc on vegetable farms. It makes its way swiftly through the soil by putting both claws together and rotating at high speed. It is friendly and not afraid of humans. Abilità: Remasabbia, Silicoforza.

Aggron (Mega Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #306. Categoria: Pokémon Iron Armor. The power of the Mega Stone makes their already-small caring nature disappear. They become relentless and more machine-like, trampling their way around as nothing can penetrate their armor. Abilità: Filtro.

Zeraora.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #807. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . An unfriendly creature was spotted in Alola. Witnesses mentioned it electrified its claws and tore its foes apart with them. It disappeared into the wilderness and has not been sighted again. Abilità: Assorbivolt.

Sandygast.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #769. Categoria: Pokémon Sand Heap. Some departed soul made a child's sand mound its vessel. Anyone who puts their hand inside its mouth will have their vital energy absorbed and their mind possessed to add more sand until they collapse. Abilità: Idrorinforzo, Sabbiavelo.

Lileep.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #345. Categoria: Pokémon Sea Lily. Over 100 million years ago, Lileep used to attach themselves to rocks at the bottom of the sea. A disaster led them all to extinction. But their fossils remain, enabling them to be revived by scientists. Abilità: Ventose, Acquascolo.

Sandshrew (Alolan Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #027. Categoria: Pokémon Mouse. Sandshrew who became trapped in the merciless cold weather of Alola had to change their types to survive. They now depend on snow to roll around; without it they are unable to curl up into a ball. Abilità: Mantelneve, Spalaneve.

Torchic.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #255. Categoria: Pokémon Chick. They walk clumsily, but follow their trainers wherever they go. Torchic have a flame sac in their belly - burning all the time. If you hug them, they feel warm, but if you squeeze them, they may spit fire. Abilità: Aiutofuoco, Acceleratore.

Volbeat.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #313. Categoria: Pokémon Firefly. The male of its species. Their tail shines bright during the night, drawing geometric shapes in the sky. Volbeat live in swarms around clean ponds. They are attracted to Illumise's sweet aroma. Abilità: Risplendi, Aiutinsetto.

Corphish.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #341. Categoria: Pokémon Ruffian. Corphish were originally foreign Pokémon that were imported as pets. They eventually turned up in the wild and reproduced a lot. They are resilient and can live in polluted water. Beware of their pincers. Abilità: Ipertaglio, Guscioscudo.

Kadabra.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #064. Categoria: Pokémon Psi. Kadabra holds a silver spoon in its hand. The spoon is used to amplify the alpha waves of its brain. When this Pokémon walks in, objects near to it go crazy, moving in ways they shouldn't. Abilità: Sincronismo, Forza Interiore.

Iron Crown.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #1023. Categoria: Pokémon Paradox. The creature is a judge, relentless and cold when imparting justice. It won't account for motives, or show any empathy. If you committed a crime—you will pay. Abilità: Carica Quark.

Raichu.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #026. Categoria: Pokémon Mouse. When electricity builds on its body, it starts to emit a faint glow and it becomes more aggressive than it normally is. They live in forests but are rare to find in the wild. Abilità: Statico, Parafulmine.

Forretress.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #205. Categoria: Pokémon Bagworm. It can be found completely rooted to huge tree trunks. It protects itself and its tree by scattering spiked pieces from its shell and turning its home into a fortress that won't go down without a fight. Abilità: Vigore, Copricapo.

Crawdaunt.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #342. Categoria: Pokémon Rogue. Crawdaunt is extremely violent and territorial. The ponds where it lives look like desolated places due to them attacking anything that comes close. It sheds its shell once a year; this weakens it for a few days. Abilità: Ipertaglio, Adattabilità.

Spoink.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #325. Categoria: Pokémon Bounce. They are always bouncing with their tail. If they ever stop, their heart wouldn't beat anymore. Spoinks balance a pearl from Clamperl on their head; if it's lost, they won't be able to control their psychic powers. Abilità: Voracità, Mente Locale.

Sprigatito.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #906. Categoria: Pokémon Grass Cat. These cute Pokémon love being the center of attention and can become jealous easily. Their paws release a sweet and relaxing aroma. Which allows it to hunt small creatures who are lulled by the scent. Abilità: Erbaiuto, Mutatipo.

Scrafty.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #560. Categoria: Pokémon Hoodlum. They form gangs and beat anyone who trespasses on their territory. The one with the biggest crest is the leader. They throw powerful kicks, and their skin is an excellent shield. Be careful around them. Abilità: Arroganza, Prepotenza.

Gengar.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #094. Categoria: Pokémon Shadow. This Pokémon is mischievous, but it can be downright evil. It takes joy in casting curses upon innocents and eating the life of people and Pokémon. It lurks in the shadows and disguises itself as one. Abilità: Levitazione, Corpofunesto.

Grapploct.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #853. Categoria: Pokémon Jujitsu. A body made up of nothing but muscle makes its tentacles very powerful. They come out of the ocean to find opponents to battle. Once the fight is over, they go back into the sea. Abilità: Scioltezza, Tecnico.

Trevenant.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #709. Categoria: Pokémon Elder Tree. Using its roots as a nervous system, it controls the trees in the forest. It's kind to the Pokémon that reside inside its body, but it is ruthless to anyone that harms its forest, turning them into haunted trees forever. Abilità: Alternacura, Coglibacche.

Voltorb (Hisuian Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #100. Categoria: Pokémon Ball. Originally from the Hisui region, Voltorb were friendly Pokémon, but their tendency to give discharges out of excitement had them kicked out of towns. They had seeds inside of them which disappeared as they adapted. Abilità: Statico, Scoppio.

Garganacl.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #934. Categoria: Pokémon Rock Salt. They look like salt formations and other Pokémon come close to it to lick their mineral-rich salt. It takes a lot to make them attack. Strangely, wounds made by these Pokémon heal quickly and rarely leave scars. Abilità: Sale Purificante, Vigore.

Scizor.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #212. Categoria: Pokémon Pincer. Its pincers appear to be two more heads and its wings are not for flying, but to regulate its body temperature. Scizor's body can shrug off most attacks and its pincers can crush almost any object. Abilità: Aiutinsetto, Tecnico.

Cherubi.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #420. Categoria: Pokémon Cherry. It hides inside of bushes to absorb sunlight. Their small head stores the energy it needs to evolve, but this small head is frequently eaten by other Pokémon and people, so it's hard for them to evolve. Abilità: Clorofilla.

Sceptile.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #254. Categoria: Pokémon Forest. They raise trees with love and care and protect the jungles with their lives. Their tails can restore a plant's beauty. Sceptile's power is truly unmatched in their habitats. They are very proud, though. Abilità: Erbaiuto, Agiltecnica.

Jirachi.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #385. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . It is said that every 1000 years, a shooting star appears in the sky for 7 days, granting wishes to those of pure heart. Another common saying is: 'Be careful what you wish for.'. Abilità: Leggiadro.

Togepi.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #175. Categoria: Pokémon Spike Ball. This Pokémon stores all the kindness and good feelings inside of its shell and shares them with others. When the shell is full, it becomes so happy that it finally evolves. It is said that it will bring good fortune to its trainer. Abilità: Tuttafretta, Leggiadro.

Frigibax.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #996. Categoria: Pokémon Ice Fin. Using its dorsal fin, Frigibax absorbs heat and converts it into ice energy. Through this method this Pokémon cools the inside of its nest like a refrigerator. It will attack any Bergmite attracted by the cold of its dwelling. Abilità: Corpogelo, Termoscambio.

Seedot.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #273. Categoria: Pokémon Acorn. They attach to tree branches to suck moisture from them. While immobile, the young are identical to real acorns. They enjoy scaring other Pokémon, especially Pidgey. If they fall, they are at risk of being eaten. Abilità: Clorofilla, Sveglialampo.

Flapple.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #841. Categoria: Pokémon Apple Wing. It grew inside a sour apple, and thus developed an acid that can cause chemical burns. It uses the discarded apple skin to fly or disguise itself as a rancid apple. They are loners as not many like how it looks or smells. Abilità: Maturazione, Tuttafretta.

Yanmega.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #469. Categoria: Pokémon Ogre Darner. It goes back to its prehistoric roots. It is a lot more violent than its pre-evolved form. Its jaw power is incredible and it is adept at biting apart foes while flying by at high speed. This Pokémon can be brutal. Abilità: Acceleratore, Lentifumé.

Necrozma (Ultra Burst Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #800. Categoria: Aether Foundation S. O.S Message (Recovered). Alert to all international authorities! There’s been a (White Noise) serious breach of security! This is an emergency! Close the port-(White Noise). NOW! (White Noise). Abilità: Cerebroforza.

Corsola (Galarian Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #222. Categoria: Pokémon Coral. Watch your feet when walking through shallow ocean waters, because this Pokémon looks like a stone and it will curse you if you step on it. Climate change wiped out these Corsola from warmer seas. Abilità: Sottilguscio, Corpofunesto.

Smoliv.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #928. Categoria: Pokémon Olive. They are very small, always in danger of being eaten. To protect themselves, they produce a bitter oil and store it in the fruit atop their head. They require little food and water, easily going for a week without any. Abilità: Sveglialampo, Coglibacche.

Koraidon.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #1007. Categoria: Pokémon Paradox. Old fossils suggest that millions of years ago, Cyclizar may have been feathered creatures and larger in size. But as time went on, the need for these features disappeared. Abilità: Ritmo d'Oricalco.

Carkol.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #838. Categoria: Pokémon Coal. It rolls its legs: their heavy weight creates parallel trackmarks that allow them to travel faster through caves and tunnels. In old times, people used Carkol's coal as fuel for they can hold fire for a long time. Abilità: Vapormacchina, Fuocardore.

Rotom.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #479. Categoria: Pokémon Plasma. Its electric body can merge with certain machines to take control of them and cause mischief and chaos. It changes its form to that of an electric appliance, allowing it to become more powerful. Abilità: Levitazione.

Raticate.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #020. Categoria: Pokémon Mouse. Raticate's sturdy fangs grow quickly. To keep them ground down, it gnaws on hard materials. It may even chew on the walls of houses. It has waterproof fur, webbed feet and is a capable swimmer. Abilità: Dentistretti, Tuttafretta.

Tapu Bulu.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #787. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. Through Ula'ula Island runs the legend of a lazy guardian spirit who lives among the trees, which it commands to restrain its foes before beating them. Abilità: Erbogenesi, Telepatia.

Clamperl.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #366. Categoria: Pokémon Bivalve. It is protected by a sturdy shell which is used to catch its prey. Clamperl will produce a magnificent pearl once in a lifetime. That pearl is said to increase Psychic powers and will sell for a lot of money. Abilità: Guscioscudo, Paura.

Clobbopus.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #852. Categoria: Pokémon Tantrum. It's very curious and child-like, but it investigates things by try to punch them with its tentacles. Despite this, the tentacles tear off easily, but don't be alarmed for they'll regrow in a few days. Abilità: Scioltezza, Tecnico.

Gulpin.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #316. Categoria: Pokémon Stomach. Gulpin's body is a huge stomach capable of swallowing anything of their size. Their fluids can corrode metal. This Pokémon releases hideous and vile gases while it digests its food. Abilità: Melma, Voracità.

Timburr.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #532. Categoria: Pokémon Muscular. They carry a log as a tool and as a weapon. You may see them helping with construction work as they strive to challenge their strength. When they swing the log without trouble, they are close to evolving. Abilità: Dentistretti, Forzabruta.

Slaking.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #289. Categoria: Pokémon Lazy. They spend all day sleeping and eating grass that grows within their reach. Sometimes they live beneath trees, waiting for fruits to fall. They dislike intruders on their territory but rarely do anything about them. Abilità: Pigrone.

Mr. Mime (Galarian Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #122. Categoria: Pokémon Barrier. Mime Jr. that endure the harsh winter of Galar are able to create invisible walls that suddenly turn to ice. As they evolve, they start creating ice floors that allow them to tap-dance, which they enjoy more than anything. Abilità: Spiritovivo, Annullabarriere.

Hattrem.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #857. Categoria: Pokémon Serene. It may seem friendly but it is actually quite the loner. No matter who you are, if you bring strong emotions near it, it will silence you violently by hitting you with its braids. It dislikes crowded places. Abilità: Curacuore, Presagio.

Cinderace.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #815. Categoria: Pokémon Striker. They are confident and boastful of their abilities. They take a pebble and light it on fire to create a scorching weapon they kick towards their foes. They can grow arrogant if they feel cheered on. Abilità: Aiutofuoco, Libero.

Braixen.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #654. Categoria: Pokémon Fox. Using friction from its tail's fur, it sets the twig it carries on fire and launches into battle. The flame on the twig is used to send signals and create patterns out of the embers. It is said the twig is a magic wand. Abilità: Aiutofuoco, Prestigiatore.

Arboliva.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #930. Categoria: Pokémon Olive. These calm and compassionate Pokémon will feed their delicious and nutrient-rich oil to weakened creatures. They are peaceful and patient Pokémon who rarely make use of force despite being capable. Abilità: Spargisemi, Coglibacche.

Jangmo-o.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #782. Categoria: Pokémon Scaly. They live in mountains rarely visited by humans. Although they are valiant and hard-working Pokémon, they retain their independent nature. They use the scale on their heads for both attack and defense. Abilità: Copricapo, Antisuono.

Venonat.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #048. Categoria: Pokémon Insect. It lives in the holes of trees in dense forests and jungles. Its large eyes never fail to spot even minuscule prey. Sometimes Venonat uses its powers to confuse travelers and make them lose their way. Abilità: Insettocchi, Lentifumé.

Patrat.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #504. Categoria: Pokémon Scout. They live in grass fields in big groups. One of them is always looking out for predators. The group gathers food they store in their cheeks to bring back home. They are wary and alert all the time. Abilità: Fugafacile, Sguardofermo.

Typhlosion.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #157. Categoria: Pokémon Volcano. Very rare to see in the wild. It hides behind a shimmering heat haze created using its back's fire. Typhlosion can create eruptions and explosive blasts that can burn everything to the ground. Abilità: Aiutofuoco, Fuocardore.

Sigilyph.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #561. Categoria: Pokémon Avianoid. It is known that they worked as guards for an ancient civilization and a few can still be seen patrolling its borders, following the same route for centuries. They attack people who sneak through their barriers. Abilità: Splendicute, Magicscudo.

Muk (Alolan Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #089. Categoria: Pokémon Sludge. It is as friendly as it is toxic; be careful, for it tries to hug others regularly. A good diet does not help reduce its toxicity levels - it only makes it cranky and prone to destroy furniture. It releases toxic fumes all the time. Abilità: Velentocco, Forza Chimica.

Delphox.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #655. Categoria: Pokémon Fox. It swirls its twig to create amazing flamethrowers. It gazes into the flame at the tip of its stick to achieve a focused state; rumor says that it can see the future within the glowing ember. Abilità: Aiutofuoco, Prestigiatore.

Mienshao.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #620. Categoria: Pokémon Martial Arts. By the time they evolve they already have many years of experience in fighting. They use the long fur on their arms as a whip to strike their opponents and will not stop until the foe is defeated. Abilità: Forza Interiore, Rigenergia.

Garbodor.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #569. Categoria: Pokémon Trash Heap. They absorb garbage to make it part of their bodies and use it to produce toxic substances from their fingertips. They like to remain undisturbed and produce a terrible smell to repel others. Abilità: Tanfo, Scoppio.

Cosmoem.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #790. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . The creature observed through the telescope changed shapes and remained motionless for the rest of the investigation. A strange energy was gathering on its core. Abilità: Vigore.

Ninetales (Alolan Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #038. Categoria: Pokémon Fox. In old times, Alolan natives revered this Pokémon as a god incarnate. It is usually calm and benevolent, but it can be ruthless when disturbed, leaving its foes as a cold block of ice in the snow. Abilità: Mantelneve, Scendineve.

Hakamo-o.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #783. Categoria: Pokémon Scaly. The scales on its body are shed and regrow sharper each time. It is a courageous and diligent Pokémon who always lets out a war cry before the battle. Any marks on its scale armor is worn with pride. Abilità: Copricapo, Antisuono.

Budew.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #406. Categoria: Pokémon Bud. It blossoms near clear ponds. Budew needs nurturing and care to grow healthy and beautiful, otherwise its bud will never bloom. If threatened, they will reveal their small but poisonous thorns. Abilità: Alternacura, Velenopunto.

Frosmoth.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #873. Categoria: Pokémon Frost Moth. It shows no mercy to any who desecrates its snowfields and mountains. It will fly around on its icy wings, causing a blizzard to chase offenders away. It is very regal and soft-mannered otherwise. Abilità: Polvoscudo, Geloscaglie.

Gallade (Mega Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #475. Categoria: Pokémon Blade. With the power of the Mega Stone, it senses the emotions of others in a large radius and will go help anyone in need. It will only attack if it needs to defend someone or something. It is protective and brave. Abilità: Forza Interiore.

Oricorio (Baile Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #741. Categoria: Pokémon Dancing. What was thought to be different species ended up being a single Pokémon. Oricorio Baile is an intense and passionate Pokémon. Every flap of its wings produces embers, and its fiery dance has inspired many. Abilità: Sincrodanza.

Charizard (Mega Y Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #006. Categoria: Pokémon Flame. With the power of the Mega Stone it becomes bold and confident. Its flying skills get better and it boasts better speed and maneuverability. When it flies, you cannot see it directly as its flames burn as bright as the sun. Abilità: Siccità.

Rillaboom.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #812. Categoria: Pokémon Drummer. The leader owns the largest drum among its troop and has the best drumming technique which makes roots sprout to attack its foes. But they are peaceful and kind creatures that value harmony in their group. Abilità: Erbaiuto, Erbogenesi.

Arceus.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #493. Categoria: Plot Device. Plot Device. Abilità: Multitipo.

Meowth.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #052. Categoria: Pokémon Scratch Cat. They used to live in grasslands but have adapted really well to life in the city. Shiny things fascinate them and they keep a little treasure hidden. The coin on its head is its most prized possession. Abilità: Raccolta, Tecnico.

Tadbulb.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #938. Categoria: Pokémon EleTadpole. This Pokémon generates electricity by shaking its tail. You can see them in swampy ponds as blinking lights in the water. When in danger, it will alert its peers by blinking rapidly. Thunderclouds make them rise to the surface. Abilità: Mente Locale, Statico.

Lilligant (Hisuian Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #549. Categoria: Pokémon Spinning. Liligant who lived a long time ago in the land of Hisui had to adapt to the cold. Their long legs allowed them to move through snow. Weather got so harsh they could not bloom anymore and this variant disappeared. Abilità: Clorofilla, Tuttafretta.

Suicune.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #245. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. Johto legends tell about a Pokémon that carries the north winds, sailing above the clouds as the aurora, absorbing pollution from water pools and rivers leaving them pristine. Abilità: Pressione, Forza Interiore.

Volcanion.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #721. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . In the early days of exploration, there were records of an entire mountain blowing up in a cloud of steam. The explorers claimed that a creature in the fog was responsible. Abilità: Assorbacqua.

Meganium.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #154. Categoria: Pokémon Herb. Meganium's breath has the power to revive dead grass and plants. The aroma that comes from its petals contains a substance that calms aggressive feelings and helps others to restore health. Abilità: Erbaiuto, Fogliamanto.

Lucario (Mega Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #448. Categoria: Pokémon Aura. The explosive, pulsing energy of aura and the Mega Stone have awakened its combative instincts. Its fighting style can be summed up in a single word: heartless. Abilità: Adattabilità.

Zoroark.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #571. Categoria: Pokémon Illusion Fox. They live in groups. Their lair's entrance is protected with their illusions and mirages. They have been known to fool entire towns with their tricks. Their illusions can hide their tails now, but they still remain mute. Abilità: Illusione.

Slakoth.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #287. Categoria: Pokémon Slacker. They laze around 20 hours a day, barely even eating. Slakoth remain motionless no matter what. It's very rare to see this Pokémon doing anything; most of them never even bother to evolve. Abilità: Pigrone.

Zarude.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #893. Categoria: Pokémon Rogue Monkey. It is extremely rare, but also incredibly dangerous to find. They are so violent that there are no records of Zarude being successfully trained by anyone. Should you see one, play dead and wait for it to leave. Abilità: Fogliamanto.

Cacnea.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #331. Categoria: Pokémon Cactus. They release a strong and sweet aroma to attract prey. If they get closer, Cacnea shoot sharp thorns to bring them down. They resemble cactuses and hide among them. Abilità: Sabbiavelo, Assorbacqua.

Wugtrio.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #961. Categoria: Pokémon Garden Eel. Tread with caution if you see holes in the sand near caves, for this Pokémon viciously wraps its body around its prey and drags it to its den. It has been confirmed this Pokémon is a variety of fish, unrelated to Dugtrio. Abilità: Viscosità, Sabbiavelo.

Shroomish.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #285. Categoria: Pokémon Mushroom. They live in damp soil in forests, surrounded by moss. They suddenly release toxic spores that make plants dry up. These spores cause serious pain if inhaled. They grow taller with moisture and heat. Abilità: Spargispora, Velencura.

Corvisquire.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #822. Categoria: Pokémon Raven. They are smart enough to use tools. In battle, these Pokémon have been seen picking up rocks and flinging them or using ropes to wrap up foes. They choose their battles carefully and do not retreat. Abilità: Sguardofermo, Pettinfuori.

Iron Treads.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #990. Categoria: Pokémon Paradox. An ancient war weapon fashioned into the form of a Donphan, made with technology that is not of this world. All that remains in its path is the sight of scorched earth. Abilità: Carica Quark.

Diggersby.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #660. Categoria: Pokémon Digging. A powerful excavator, its ears can reduce dense bedrock to rubble. After it has finished digging, it just lounges lazily. Some of them have been trained to work at construction sites with good results. Abilità: Guancegonfie, Macroforza.

Seaking.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #119. Categoria: Pokémon Goldfish. In the autumn, Seaking males can be seen doing courtship dances to females. After getting a mate, both will be seen swimming powerfully up rivers and creeks to make their nest. Abilità: Nuotovelox, Parafulmine.

Persian (Alolan Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #053. Categoria: Pokémon Classy Cat. They were bred for their silky fur and round faces, not for their temperament. This is an extremely proud Pokémon who will look down on anyone but itself; despite this, it's very popular among Alola's elite. Abilità: Foltopelo, Tecnico.

Alcremie.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #869. Categoria: Pokémon Cream. There is a vast number of recipes to evolve an Alcremie, changing their color and flavor; some are sweet, some are sour, but they are all delicious. Cakes baked with its help can be sold for a lot of money. Abilità: Dolcevelo, Aromavelo.

Hawlucha.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #701. Categoria: Pokémon Wrestling. Although small in size, its proficient fighting skills enable it to keep up with big bruisers like Machamp and Hariyama. Using its wings to attack from above allows it to gain an edge in battle. Abilità: Scioltezza, Rompiforma.

Poliwag.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #060. Categoria: Pokémon Tadpole. They are most common near ponds and lakes during the summer. Its legs take some weeks to develop after it hatches, making it inept at walking. It is, however, a very fast swimmer. Abilità: Assorbacqua, Umidità.

Kabuto.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #140. Categoria: Pokémon Shellfish. Kabuto is a Pokémon that has been regenerated from a fossil. However, in extremely rare cases, living specimens have been found. The Pokémon has not changed at all for 300 million years. Abilità: Nuotovelox, Sottilguscio.

Taillow.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #276. Categoria: Pokémon Tiny Swallow. They are brave and noble, facing bigger foes whoever they might be. However, being just a child, it usually feels lonely and cries at night. They can be seen migrating south in the winter. Abilità: Dentistretti, Nervisaldi.

Lucario.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #448. Categoria: Pokémon Aura. This Pokémon is completely loyal to its trainer. It has the ability to not only see auras but also to transform them into energy. It is also capable of understanding human speech. Abilità: Cuordeciso, Giustizia.

Meowscarada.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #908. Categoria: Pokémon Magician. Meowscarada's cape has reflective fur, which allows it to camouflage and make it seem as it disappeared. They also carry pollen bombs, when the pollen explosion clouds the field, Mewoscarada escapes. Abilità: Erbaiuto, Mutatipo.

Grotle.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #388. Categoria: Pokémon Grove. Other Pokémon harass Grotle when the bushes on its back have berries or fruit. It patiently waits for others to finish eating before moving. It loves clear water and it's good at finding cool ponds and springs. Abilità: Erbaiuto, Guscioscudo.

Sylveon.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #700. Categoria: Pokémon Intertwining. This rare and adorable Pokémon emanates a soothing aura to calm disturbances. It is said that only the Trainers who form an unbreakable bond with their Eevee can ever see this Pokémon. Abilità: Incantevole, Pellefolletto.

Clawitzer.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #693. Categoria: Pokémon Howitzer. They can be seen swimming backwards using their launcher as a propulsor, but they usually stay at the bottom of the sea. Their meat is tough and bitter, so people don't seek them as food anymore. Abilità: Megalancio.

Zoroark (Hisuian Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #571. Categoria: Pokémon Illusion Fox. Hisuian scrolls show a Pokémon who attacked so intensely, its own attacks wounded its flesh: scary tales of a white beast who was the embodiment of death. The identity of this Pokémon remains unknown. Abilità: Illusione.

Arctibax.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #997. Categoria: Pokémon Ice Fin. Arctibax freezes the air around it, protecting its face with an ice mask and turning its dorsal fin into a blade of ice. Its strong back and legs allow it to flip in the air and swiftly strike with its improvised weapon. Abilità: Corpogelo, Termoscambio.

Torkoal.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #324. Categoria: Pokémon Coal. They constantly search for coal to add to their shell, digging mountains tirelessly because it is the source of their power. If they run out of coal, they grow weak. They are commonly found in abandoned coal mines. Abilità: Fumochiaro, Siccità.

Dunsparce.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #206. Categoria: Pokémon Land Snake. If seen, Dunsparce is quick to escape by boring into the ground with its drill tail. It can float slightly with its wings. It is almost blind but finds its way in the huge underground mazes where it lives. Abilità: Fugafacile, Leggiadro.

Barraskewda.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #847. Categoria: Pokémon Skewer. This Pokémon has a jaw that's as sharp as a spear and as strong as steel. Apparently Barraskewda's flesh is surprisingly tasty, too. When they hunt, they have a speed burst record of 100 knots. Abilità: Nuotovelox, Elicopinna.

Carracosta.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #565. Categoria: Pokémon Prototurtle. They can live both in the ocean and on land. They can knock out a foe with a slap from one of its powerful front fins and chew it up whole. Fortunately, only one specimen remains in captivity. Abilità: Solidroccia, Vigore.

Iron Bundle.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #991. Categoria: Pokémon Paradox. It sports an uncanny resemblance to Delibird. Records of a long-gone civilization describe similar contraptions using ice blasts to slide through the snowy landscape. Abilità: Carica Quark.

Bayleef.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #153. Categoria: Pokémon Leaf. A spicy fragrance emanates from around its neck that makes it feisty and impetuous. It sheds its leaves every couple of weeks after the aroma diminishes and its mood also becomes calmer. Abilità: Erbaiuto, Fogliamanto.

Bruxish.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #779. Categoria: Pokémon Gnash Teeth. The protuberance on its head emits psychic waves that confuse its prey; while it is confused, Bruxish grinds it with its sharp teeth. This grinding noise makes other Pokémon flee from the place in hurry. Abilità: Corposgargiante, Ferromascella.

Nickit.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #827. Categoria: Pokémon Fox. Cunning and cautious, Nickit survive by stealing food. It erases its tracks with swipes of its tail so it's very difficult to track one. They have thrived in the cities and come out at night to steal from stores. Abilità: Fugafacile, Sorveglianza.

Gallade.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #475. Categoria: Pokémon Blade. This Pokémon is male-only. It has an extreme sense of courtesy. In a battle, it uses its arm blades as if they were swords. It is a very loyal Pokémon and will fiercely defend its trainer with its life. Abilità: Cuordeciso, Giustizia.

Larvitar.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #246. Categoria: Pokémon Rock Skin. Born deep underground, they don't emerge until they've eaten a whole mountain of soil. Only the strongest and most ferocious ever come out to roam about. They hate being disturbed. Abilità: Dentistretti, Sabbiavelo.

Thwackey.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #811. Categoria: Pokémon Beat. Thwakey are passionate about their drumming. They can get so caught up in their music that they don't notice the battle is already over. The faster they can beat their drums, the stronger they are. Abilità: Erbaiuto, Erbogenesi.

Ursaluna.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #901. Categoria: Pokémon Peat. An ancient Hisui tribe had stories about Ursaring evolving using peat. Peat is mostly useless and does not have any energy properties that could aid in evolution. No Ursaring has been reported to evolve in recent years. Abilità: Dentistretti, Antiproiettile.

Ho-oh.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #250. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . Ho-oh inhabited the Bell Tower, where Pokémon were said to rest. Ho-oh's myth talks about a creature that brought eternal rest for those whose time was right, and also gave back life if death was premature. Abilità: Pressione, Rigenergia.

Skorupi.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #451. Categoria: Pokémon Scorpion. It lives in deserts and arid regions. It buries itself under the sand, waiting for unsuspecting prey to come nearby. It will then sting the prey and cling to it tenaciously until the poison takes effect. Abilità: Lottascudo, Cecchino.

Gothita.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #574. Categoria: Pokémon Fixation. They often stare creepily at their Trainers and other Pokémon. Apparently, they are staring at something only they can see. The ribbon-like feelers on their body increase their Psychic power. Abilità: Indagine, Tenacia.

Fezandipiti.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #1016. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . The most famous legend in Kitakami tells about how three Pokémon and their master defeated an ogre. One of them was ugly and dull but became bright and beautiful after eating a forbidden magical mochi. Abilità: Catena Tossica, Tecnico.

Trubbish.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #568. Categoria: Pokémon Trash Bag. The combination of garbage bags and industrial waste caused the chemical reaction that created this Pokémon. It belches a poison gas; breathing it will leave you sick in bed for a week. It loves filthy places. Abilità: Tanfo, Antifurto.

Magnemite.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #081. Categoria: Pokémon Magnet. It lurks near electric facilities and mountains as it is attracted by big magnetic fields. It is not aggressive and usually defends itself with a screech or a weak electric impulse to deter others from attacking. Abilità: Magnetismo, Vigore.

Dragalge.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #691. Categoria: Pokémon Mock Kelp. Their poison is strong enough to eat through the hull of a tanker, and they spit it indiscriminately at anything that enters their territory. Touching them can be fatal if you are not treated within a few hours. Abilità: Velentocco, Adattabilità.

Calyrex (Shadow Rider Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #898. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . Ancient texts depict the Pokémon King Calyrex I as a warrior no one could oppose when it rode into battle. Yet it was said it healed its enemies' wounds after defeating them in a magnanimous show of mercy. Abilità: Sintonia Equina.

Metagross.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #376. Categoria: Pokémon Iron Leg. It has four powerful brains that allow it to react at the speed of a super computer. It pins its prey under its massive body, then eats it using the large mouth on its stomach. A powerful and ruthless Pokémon. Abilità: Corpochiaro, Metalleggero.

Gabite.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #444. Categoria: Pokémon Cave. It hoards a small treasure of sparkly things inside of a cave. It will react aggressively towards any potential thief. It is also an excellent hunter, capable of running, swimming and gliding extremely fast. Abilità: Sabbiavelo, Cartavetro.

Salandit.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #757. Categoria: Pokémon Toxic Lizard. The markings at the end of its tail emit flames and a toxic gas; be careful as this gas smells sweet and specially appealing for the males of any species. Only female Salandit are known to evolve. Abilità: Corrosione, Indifferenza.

Skrelp.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #690. Categoria: Pokémon Mock Kelp. Camouflaged as rotten kelp, they spray liquid poison on prey that approaches unaware. It needs to store a lot of energy to be able to evolve, so it takes them a long time. Touching one will give you a fever. Abilità: Velenopunto, Velentocco.

Ambipom.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #424. Categoria: Pokémon Long Tail. They live in large colonies on the tallest trees, linking their tails to show friendship among herd mates. It loves fresh fruit. Ambipom uses its two tails better than its own arms to swing around. Abilità: Tecnico, Abillegame.

Primarina.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #730. Categoria: Pokémon Soloist. All modern Primarina sing a song that has been passed down through generations. Legend says that you can hear their true song when you are in the depths of the sea. Make sure its throat doesn't get sore. Abilità: Acquaiuto, Idrovoce.

Dratini.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #147. Categoria: Pokémon Dragon. Up until recently its existence was debated as being a mere legend, then a small colony was found underwater. It is still extremely rare to find. It sheds skin and grows larger every day. Abilità: Muta, Pelledura.

Regirock.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #377. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. It is said to be an immortal being the size of the peak of a mountain. Could it be a remnant from the most ancient times of this world?. Abilità: Corpochiaro, Vigore.

Eldegoss.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #830. Categoria: Pokémon Cotton Bloom. The cotton it produces has a glossy finish so clothes made with it are insanely expensive. In nature they are calm and selfless Pokémon who allow others to take nourishment from the cotton seeds in their head. Abilità: Lanugine, Rigenergia.

Sliggoo (Hisuian Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #705. Categoria: Pokémon Snail. In the old region of Hisui, Sliggoo were described as lethargic creatures whose bodies became encased in a metal shell created by dry water sediment. Modern Sliggoo's acidic properties prevent sediment build up. Abilità: Mangiaerba, Copricapo.

Lycanroc (Midday Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #745. Categoria: Pokémon Wolf. A well-disciplined Rockruff will evolve at dawn. This Pokémon is very loyal and trustworthy. It can climb mountains fast and is a quick runner. The rocks on its mane are its main weapons. Abilità: Cuordeciso, Remasabbia.

Altaria.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #334. Categoria: Pokémon Humming. Seen as dancing clouds in the sky, Altaria sing melodies in their sweet voices, evoking wonder, beauty, and dreams for the listeners. They live far away from people and throw colorful fireballs at uninvited guests. Abilità: Alternacura, Antimeteo.

Lickitung.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #108. Categoria: Pokémon Licking. Its tongue is twice as long as its body and it is used for everything, from capturing prey to feeling its surroundings and cleaning itself. It really dislikes sour and bitter flavors. Abilità: Mente Locale, Indifferenza.

Scizor (Mega Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #212. Categoria: Pokémon Pincer. The power of the Mega Stone puts its body through tremendous stress. If it is inexperienced at wielding it and the battle is too long, its pincers will feel heavy and even melt. They must be fast to rip their foes apart. Abilità: Tecnico.

Finneon.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #456. Categoria: Pokémon Wing Fish. The way its two tail fins flutter while it swims has earned Finneon the nickname 'Beautifly of the Sea.' The line running down its side can store sunlight and glow brightly at night. Abilità: Nuotovelox, Acquascolo.

Lunala.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #792. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . There are legends about a being who shone as if it was the full moon incarnated. This sinister Pokémon stole the light of all living things. On its forehead is a third eye linking it to another dimension. Abilità: Spettroguardia.

Bastiodon.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #411. Categoria: Pokémon Shield. They lived in herds millions of years ago. They would line together to shield their young. Despite its rough and scary exterior, this Pokémon is calm, gentle-natured and a strict herbivore. Abilità: Vigore, Antisuono.

Sandshrew.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #027. Categoria: Pokémon Mouse. They usually hide burrowed under caves and grasslands. A few have been sighted living in the desert. They are shy by nature - they dig and curl in a ball when facing a threat. Abilità: Sabbiavelo, Remasabbia.

Ariados.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #168. Categoria: Pokémon Long Leg. This Pokémon is silent and stealthy. It comes out at night. After attaching some silk to its prey, it sets it free. Later, it tracks the silk back to the prey and its friends. It can form big colonies in caves. Abilità: Aiutinsetto, Cecchino.

Mantyke.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #458. Categoria: Pokémon Kite. When it swims close the ocean's surface people aboard ships are able to observe the pattern on its back as it is different in every region. Mantyke is an intelligent and friendly Pokémon that rarely attacks others. Abilità: Nuotovelox, Assorbacqua.

Charmeleon.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #005. Categoria: Pokémon Flame. It turns aggressive after evolving. It is very hot-headed by nature, so it constantly starts fights. When it's excited, the flame at the tip of its tail flares with a bluish white color. Abilità: Aiutofuoco, Solarpotere.

Espeon.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #196. Categoria: Pokémon Sun. Espeon is extremely loyal to the trainer it considers worthy. It is said to have developed precognitive powers to protect its trainer from harm. The orb on its forehead glows whenever it uses psychic energy. Abilità: Sincronismo, Magispecchio.

Cofagrigus.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #563. Categoria: Pokémon Coffin. This Pokémon has only been seen a few times in the ruins and tombs of ancient civilizations. It curses and transforms people and Pokémon into mummy-like creatures. It is said it feeds on pure gold. Abilità: Mummia.

Scovillain.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #952. Categoria: Pokémon Spicy Pepper. The green head turns vicious from the spicy chemicals running through their body, while the red head releases the chemicals as fire energy. You can find these Pokémon living in deserts and arid regions. Abilità: Clorofilla, Altalena.

Escavalier.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #589. Categoria: Pokémon Cavalry. Wearing the shell covering it stole from a Shelmet, it defends itself and attacks with two stings. It can fly to move around, but its wings are too small to carry its weight to high altitudes. Abilità: Copricapo, Guscioscudo.

Chandelure.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #609. Categoria: Pokémon Luring. It consumes the spirits of the living, puts people in a hypnotic trance, and consumes them with fire. Being consumed in Chandelure's flame burns up the spirit, leaving only an empty body behind. Abilità: Corpodifuoco, Intrapasso.

Zigzagoon (Galarian Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #263. Categoria: Pokémon Tiny Racoon. Zigzagoon raised in Galar grow to be punks. If they see another Pokémon, they will purposely run into them to start a fight. The only way to calm them down is with a lot of loud noise. Abilità: Raccolta, Voracità.

Kabutops.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #141. Categoria: Pokémon Shellfish. Kabutops swarmed underwater to hunt for prey. It appears to have been evolving from a water dweller into a land dweller, as evident by the changes in its gills and legs. Fossils suggests it was aggressive. Abilità: Nuotovelox, Lottascudo.

Sliggoo.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #705. Categoria: Pokémon Soft Tissue. It drives away foes by releasing a sticky and corrosive liquid. Its eyes devolved and it became blind. Now it uses its four horns to sense sounds and smells, rather than using its ears or nose. Abilità: Idratazione, Viscosità.

Abomasnow.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #460. Categoria: Pokémon Frosted Tree. There was an old Hisuian legend that spoke of 'The Ice Monster'. Now we know it is a Pokémon that can cover everything with snow. It is usually shy and likes quiet places. Strong, but only attacks if provoked. Abilità: Scendineve, Antisuono.

Beartic.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #614. Categoria: Pokémon Freezing. They love the cold northern seas and create pathways across the ocean's water by freezing their own breath. They dive in the sea to catch prey. They are not used to humans as they rarely see one. Abilità: Mantelneve, Spalaneve.

Combusken.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #256. Categoria: Pokémon Young Fowl. Once Torchic toughened up its legs and thighs, they like to run and love to kick. They have an offensive instinct to keep attacking no matter what. They sqwak loudly every morning when they start to train. Abilità: Aiutofuoco, Acceleratore.

Blissey.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #242. Categoria: Pokémon Happiness. Whoever takes a bite of a Blissey's egg becomes loving and caring to everyone. They are compassionate, healing anyone who's injured. Their presence makes everyone smile. An intelligent and empathetic Pokémon. Abilità: Alternacura, Curacuore.

Gloom.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #044. Categoria: Pokémon Weed. A horribly noxious honey drools from its mouth. One whiff of the honey can result in sickness. Some fans are said to enjoy its overwhelming stink, though. You can control this foul smell with lots of love and care. Abilità: Clorofilla, Tanfo.

Deoxys (Defense Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #386. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . One member of the space crew mentioned a broad creature that could reflect their weapon's attacks back at them. There was an explosion and the creature left, unscathed. Abilità: Pressione.

Kangaskhan (Mega Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #115. Categoria: Pokémon Parent. The mother gives all the power of the Mega Stone to her child. The child grows violent and they team up as formidable fighters. However, the mother worries about her child's future, as she raised it better than that. Abilità: Amorefiliale.

Blastoise.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #009. Categoria: Pokémon Shellfish. The jets of water it spouts from the rocket cannons on its shell have been recorded to punch through steel. It is confident in its great defense and water spouts to overcome any obstacle. Abilità: Acquaiuto, Copripioggia.

Ceruledge.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #937. Categoria: Pokémon Fire Blades. Charcadet evolved by using a battered armor that belonged to a fallen warrior. The resentment in the armor gives it a vengeful heat. They use their sharp blades to attack without mercy from the shadows. Abilità: Fuocardore, Sottilguscio.

Bombirdier.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #962. Categoria: Pokémon Item Drop. Using their shed feathers, Bombirdier make an apron to carry food back to their nest. However they have this nasty habit of dropping heavy objects while flying to amuse themselves with the loud noise they make. Abilità: Sguardofermo, Portamassi.

Nidorino.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #033. Categoria: Pokémon Poison Pin. An independent and fierce creature. It roams alone in search for a mate and will compete with other males around. It will violently charge with a venom-drenched horn against intruders. Abilità: Velenopunto, Antagonismo.

Chesnaught.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #652. Categoria: Pokémon Spiny Armor. These Pokémon are known for taking defensive stances instead of charging into battle. Many stories tell how during the old wars, Chesnaught protected their allies using their bodies. Abilità: Erbaiuto, Antiproiettile.

Dodrio.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #085. Categoria: Pokémon Triple Bird. A third head comes to change the dynamic the two originals had. It is common to see the three heads fighting. Each one has its own personality, but when they work as a team they can be very powerful. Abilità: Fugafacile, Sveglialampo.

Buzzwole.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #794. Categoria: Aether Foundation Log #071. What we thought were harmless displays of strength were just the first warning signs. Today UB-02 destroyed the truck where it was being transported. It escaped and hasn't been located. Abilità: Ultraboost.

Pineco.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #204. Categoria: Pokémon Bagworm. Pineco looks just like a regular pine cone. It adds layers of tree bark as a shield from harm. It waits for Bug Pokémon to eat while hanging from branches. If anyone shakes its tree, it falls down and explodes. Be very careful. Abilità: Vigore, Copricapo.

Armaldo.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #348. Categoria: Pokémon Plate. When the waters receded, this Pokémon was forced to evolve to live on land. Evidence suggests that its claws could extend to reach the prey that was far or underwater. Its tough shell made it very resilient. Abilità: Lottascudo, Nuotovelox.

Iron Leaves.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #1010. Categoria: Pokémon Paradox. The creature appears serene and gentle walking over a field of grass, but further inspection reveals it is a sentinel—ever vigilant for intruders who dare to step into its meadow. Abilità: Carica Quark.

Duraludon.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #884. Categoria: Pokémon Alloy. Its body resembles a shiny polished metal and it's both lightweight and strong. The only drawback is that it rusts easily. It lives in dry climates and deep inside caves because rain and moisture make it cranky. Abilità: Metalleggero, Metalpesante.

Aggron.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #306. Categoria: Pokémon Iron Armor. Aggron claim ownership of entire mountains, mercilessly beating up anything that crosses their path. Aggron are violent and patrol their territory at all times, but also plant trees, stop fires, and protect nature. Abilità: Testadura, Vigore.

Krabby.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #098. Categoria: Pokémon River Crab. Krabby dig holes in the sand near the sea. They can be seen squabbling with each other over food and territory. They usually avoid humans, but will fight if provoked. Abilità: Ipertaglio, Guscioscudo.

Yamask.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #562. Categoria: Pokémon Spirit. This Pokémon arose from the spirit of a human or a Pokémon that died in the past and was buried with special ceremonies. Each one carries a mask that looks like the face it had in life. A sad Pokémon that weeps often. Abilità: Mummia.

Elekid.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #239. Categoria: Pokémon Electric. They follow storms and bad weather. Elekid rotate their arms constantly to charge electricity. Beware, there is an electric current between their horns that may zap you if you touch them. Abilità: Statico, Spiritovivo.

Decidueye.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #724. Categoria: Pokémon Arrow Quill. This Pokémon can shoot its own feathers as arrows in a split second. They are usually calm and collected, but they are easily startled if taken by surprise. They are very rare, as most of them are extinct. Abilità: Erbaiuto, Distacco.

Bonsly.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #438. Categoria: Pokémon Bonsai. They thrive in arid places. It looks like it's crying all the time, but it's actually adjusting the moisture of its body and releasing excess water. Over time, they become excellent at impersonating trees. Abilità: Vigore, Paura.

Greavard.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #971. Categoria: Pokémon Ghost Dog. Myth says that if a dog Pokémon dies without ever having a human friend, it will become this Pokémon. They dislike being alone and are pretty clingy. If you pet one or feed one it will follow you forever. Literally. Abilità: Raccolta, Morbidone.

Clefairy.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #035. Categoria: Pokémon Fairy. Very rare to find. Clefairy are said to come from the moon. They are drawn to the light of this celestial body and come out of hiding at night to dance and play under the starry sky. Abilità: Incantevole, Amicoscudo.

Audino.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #531. Categoria: Pokémon Hearing. Its auditory sense is astounding: using the feelers on its ears, it can know the health state of others. It is a caring Pokémon with a sweet disposition to help, but it is not too common to see in the wild. Abilità: Curacuore, Rigenergia.

Calyrex (Ice Rider Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #898. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . Ancient texts depict the Pokémon King Calyrex I as a warrior no one could oppose when it rode into battle. Yet it was said it healed its enemies' wounds after defeating them in a magnanimous show of mercy. Abilità: Sintonia Equina.

Luxray.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #405. Categoria: Pokémon Gleam Eyes. It is said that it can see through walls. This Pokémon can easily find hiding prey and locate its young. Male Luxray can be found roaming alone, patrolling their territory; the females hunt in groups. Abilità: Prepotenza, Dentistretti.

Murkrow.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #198. Categoria: Pokémon Darkness. Murkrow are feared and loathed as the alleged bearers of ill fortune. This Pokémon will steal anything that sparkles. They are infamous for luring people and getting them lost in the mountains. Abilità: Insonnia, Supersorte.

Tapu Lele.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #786. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. It is said that an innocent but cruel spirit guards Akala Island. When the spirit is feeling benevolent it scatters some of its scales around; these scales have healing powers. Abilità: Psicogenesi, Telepatia.

Octillery.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #224. Categoria: Pokémon Jet. Octillery sprays ink, traps its foes with its tentacles and then hits them with its rock-hard head. If the enemy is too strong, they escape. They can be found inside rocky holes deep in the sea floor. Abilità: Cecchino, Ventose.

Turtwig.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #387. Categoria: Pokémon Tiny Leaf. It makes its home close to lakes, although it is rare to find one. The shell on its back is made of hardened soil and should be moist for it to be healthy. It uses photosynthesis to get energy. Abilità: Erbaiuto, Guscioscudo.

Azurill.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #298. Categoria: Pokémon Polka Dot. They use their tail as a lasso. When they throw their ball, Azurill get dragged along with it. They are commonly seen bouncing and playing with other Pokémon on the beach. They love fruit pops. Abilità: Macroforza, Grassospesso.

Lurantis.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #754. Categoria: Pokémon Bloom Sickle. Considered to be one of the most beautiful Grass-Type Pokémon due to its lovely coloration. They require a lot of maintenance and constant grooming, so they'll only trust a Trainer who is up for the job. Abilità: Fogliamanto, Inversione.

Zorua (Hisuian Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #570. Categoria: Pokémon Tricky Fox. An old legend of the Hisui region speaks about a small Zorua who was abandoned in the snow and left to die. Its spirit lingered but was filled with malice and sadness. No modern Zorua look like the legend's. Abilità: Illusione.

Glalie (Mega Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #362. Categoria: Pokémon Face. The power of the Mega Stone bent its jaw at an unnatural angle. This helps it spew enormous blizzards, but leaves it unable to eat any prey it catches. This makes it angry and will weaken it if it stays in this form. Abilità: Pellegelo.

Shaymin (Sky Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #492. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. There are remains of gigantic trees that once grew all over the earth. They were called the 'Trees of Life' and their flowers granted the power of flight to the kind-hearted, or so the legend says. Abilità: Leggiadro.

Blacephalon.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #806. Categoria: Aether Foundation Log #121. It was horrible and so fast I could barely take a picture of the UB specimen. As soon as the portal opened it slithered through it, got close to one of the crew and exploded. His wounds are critical, the UB disappeared. Abilità: Ultraboost.

Raichu (Alolan Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #026. Categoria: Pokémon Mouse. Scientists were baffled to discover Raichu's evolution in the Alola Region. There is no explanation as to how it gained Psychic abilities, but diet seems to be factor. It loves sweet food and pancakes. Abilità: Codasurf.

Heatmor.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #631. Categoria: Pokémon Anteater. It draws in air through its tail, then transforms it into fire and uses it like a tongue. You can see them defending Durant's colonies from predators so they can be the only ones who can eat them. Abilità: Fuocardore, Fumochiaro.

Lotad.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #270. Categoria: Pokémon Water Weed. They live in ponds and lakes, floating atop the water. The big leaf on their head is known to act as a ferry for smaller Pokémon. The leaf is delicate and needs constant watering or else Lotad will grow sick. Abilità: Copripioggia, Nuotovelox.

Persian.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #053. Categoria: Pokémon Classy Cat. They are proud and temperamental. They scratch their trainers with little to no provocation whatsoever. Their elegance and grace is very valued, although they can be vicious hunters. Abilità: Scioltezza, Tecnico.

Okidogi.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #1014. Categoria: Pokémon Retainer. The most famous legend in Kitakami tells about how three Pokémon and their master defeated an ogre. One of them was feeble and weak but got immense strength after eating a forbidden magical mochi. Abilità: Catena Tossica, Cane da Guardia.

Pawmi.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #921. Categoria: Pokémon Mouse. The electric sacs on its cheeks are still underdeveloped. However, its front paws are able to discharge electricity. Pawmi recharge by rubbing their front paws on the sacs. Abilità: Statico, Alternacura.

Magby.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #240. Categoria: Pokémon Live Coal. They inhale and exhale embers from their mouth and nostrils. Their body temperature is so hot, they may ignite anything they touch and the floor on which they walk. Magby can be found in volcanoes. Abilità: Corpodifuoco, Spiritovivo.

Swalot.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #317. Categoria: Pokémon Poison Bag. Swalot spurt toxic fluids from their pores, and once the prey is weak, it gets swallowed whole since they have no teeth. They may eat anything up to the size of a car's tire. Do not get too close to them. Abilità: Melma, Antifurto.

Lunatone.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #337. Categoria: Pokémon Meteorite. First found where a meteorite fell. For this reason, it's believed it came from space. Its eyes fill people with dread and lure them to sleep. They become very active and extremely powerful during full moons. Abilità: Levitazione.

Steelix.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #208. Categoria: Pokémon Iron Snake. Some say that when an Onix lives underground for 100 years, its body becomes hard as steel. Steelix lives deep underground, tempered by high pressure and heat. It can see in the darkness. Abilità: Testadura, Vigore.

Linoone.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #264. Categoria: Pokémon Rushing. Linoone are always running at full speed, but they can only do so in straight lines. They find it very difficult to deal with a curved road. They excel at hunting, but tend to eat a lot to recover from their tiring runs. Abilità: Raccolta, Piedisvelti.

Celesteela.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #797. Categoria: Aether Foundation Log #019. Finally some progress from the excavation site. What we thought was a 200 year-old relic turned out to be a creature capable of blasting itself into the air. We managed to restrain it; more research is due. Abilità: Ultraboost.

Weezing.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #110. Categoria: Pokémon Poison Gas. They are considered a pest in urban areas. They wait until night to roam and eat from the trash cans in the neighborhood. If it finds a filthy and unkept house it will make its nest in there. Abilità: Levitazione, Gas Reagente.

Zigzagoon.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #263. Categoria: Pokémon Tiny Raccoon. They are extremely curious and want to know all about everything. Due to their innate curiosity, they usually find hidden objects. Sometimes they play dead to avoid being attacked. Abilità: Raccolta, Voracità.

Salamence (Mega Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #373. Categoria: Pokémon Dragon. The power of the Mega Stone gives it the nickname 'The Blood-Soaked Crescent'. It is violent and very unpredictable, even turning on its own trainer. Many believe it is because its bent wings cause it pain. Abilità: Pellecielo.

Elgyem.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #605. Categoria: Pokémon Cerebral. This Pokémon was never seen until it appeared far in the desert about 50 years ago. Rumor has it that it came from space. It uses its strong psychic power to squeeze its foe's brain, causing awful headaches. Abilità: Telepatia, Sincronismo.

Grimmsnarl.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #861. Categoria: Pokémon Bulk Up. Its hairs work like muscle fibers. When its hairs unfurl, they latch on to opponents, ensnaring them as tentacles would. They often make others trip or hang them upside down to amuse themselves. Abilità: Burla, Arraffalesto.

Mamoswine.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #473. Categoria: Pokémon Twin Tusk. It was everywhere during the ice age, but its population declined afterwards. This Pokémon uses strong tusks to remove the soil and snow and dig up roots and plants to eat. It has a bad temper. Abilità: Mantelneve, Grassospesso.

Gastly.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #092. Categoria: Pokémon Gas. Its body is made of a toxic gas - anyone would faint if engulfed by it. It has been seen in abandoned places scaring people and other Pokémon for fun. It is elusive and escapes through the walls. Abilità: Levitazione.

Roggenrola.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #524. Categoria: Pokémon Mantle. It is made from compressed rocks, making its body almost as hard as steel. It is blind; what looks like its eye is really an ear. For this reason, it can live in the darkest of caves feeding on rocks to grow stronger. Abilità: Vigore, Sottilguscio.

Carvanha.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #318. Categoria: Pokémon Savage. Anything near a Carvanha school will be swarmed, attacked, and torn to bits. However, they are very timid when they are on their own. They live in rivers in the jungle and dislike salt water. Abilità: Cartavetro, Acceleratore.

Slowking (Galarian Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #199. Categoria: Pokémon Royal. Shellder's powerful toxin enhanced Slowking's intelligence and psychic abilities. However, its mind is now controlled by the Shellder. It mutters enchantments in a strange tongue and creates strange potions to drink. Abilità: Stranofarmaco, Rigenergia.

Jumpluff.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #189. Categoria: Pokémon Cottonweed. It flies along the wind and spreads its cotton-like spores all over the world to make more offspring. It is always looking for warm places; if it gets caught by a cold front, it will land to find shelter. Abilità: Clorofilla, Intrapasso.

Spinarak.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #167. Categoria: Pokémon String Spit. It sets a trap by spinning a web of thin but strong silk. Then it waits for the prey to arrive. It recognizes what kind of prey has fallen on its web by the vibrations received by each one of its eight legs. Abilità: Aiutinsetto, Insonnia.

Iron Boulder.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #1022. Categoria: Pokémon Paradox. The creature stands still as if it were a vigilance tower. However, if it spots an intruder, it will move at an astounding speed to tackle, trample and destroy everything in its wake. Abilità: Carica Quark.

Terapagos (Normal Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #1024. Categoria: Pokémon Tera. Believed to be extinct, it was just recently re-discovered when a specimen was found in a dormant state deep at an excavation for Tera Crystals formed more than 2 million years ago. Abilità: Teramorfosi.

Gorebyss.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #368. Categoria: Pokémon South Sea. Found in the depths of the southern seas. Their body is built to withstand the sea pressure. While it appears to be beautiful and harmless, it is a cruel and deceitful creature. Abilità: Nuotovelox, Idratazione.

Caterpie.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #010. Categoria: Pokémon Worm. It is very common in forests. Its voracious appetite compels it to devour leaves bigger than itself without hesitation. It releases a foul odor from its antennae if it feels threatened. Abilità: Polvoscudo, Fugafacile.

Zapdos.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #145. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . The myth tells of a bird who lived inside the thunderstorms of the region. It covered itself in lightning while flying in the dark clouds. A news report said it was involved in the closure of an energy plant. Abilità: Pressione, Statico.

Porygon2.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #233. Categoria: Pokémon Virtual. This man-made Pokémon is an upgraded version of Porygon. It is used for space exploration and planetary development, boasting the power of science. Its AI software allows it to learn on its own. Abilità: Traccia, Download.

Azelf.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #482. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . The myth talks about three creatures being born from one of Arceus' eggs. The blue one was the being who granted humanity with willpower. It could remove its enemies' will to carry on, leaving them to wither. Abilità: Levitazione.

Raging Bolt.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #1021. Categoria: Pokémon Paradox. Pokédex glitches as it has no data. After the old man's project failed, the creatures were left on their own. But life found a way. Now these creatures are out there, trying to reclaim this world as theirs. Abilità: Paleoattivazione.

Togedemaru.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #777. Categoria: Pokémon Roly-Poly. On stormy days you can see groups of Togedemaru curled up into balls with their spikes out, waiting to be struck by lightning. These spikes also deter other Pokémon from attacking this cute creature. Abilità: Spineferrate, Parafulmine.

Beedrill.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #015. Categoria: Pokémon Poison Bee. Beedrill are extremely territorial. For safety reasons, no one should ever approach their nest. If disturbed, they will attack in a swarm. It has three stings. The one on its tail secretes a powerful poison. Abilità: Aiutinsetto, Cecchino.

Zangoose.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #335. Categoria: Pokémon Cat Ferret. The sole desire to battle Seviper is embedded in their genes; they have been rivals since forever. Zangoose is a very agile quadruped, standing up on two legs only when it is ready to fight. Abilità: Immunità, Velenimpeto.

Pyroar.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #668. Categoria: Pokémon Royal. The male with the largest fire mane is the leader of the pride. The females are fearsome hunters. Whenever they roar they also let out a fiery breath. Not many Pokémon dare to mess with them. Abilità: Antagonismo, Arroganza.

Floragato.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #907. Categoria: Pokémon Grass Cat. The fur on these pokémon becomes sharp as needles when it's battling, but it's otherwise soft and silky when relaxed. They have a stem with a flower they use both as a weapon or as a toy to amuse themselves. Abilità: Erbaiuto, Mutatipo.

Roaring Moon.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #1005. Categoria: Pokémon Paradox. This savage creature shares features with Salamence's Mega Form. Its demeanor is completely feral and will attack unprovoked. A true tyrant of the skies. Abilità: Paleoattivazione.

Treecko.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #252. Categoria: Pokémon Wood Gecko. They climb trees with their spiked feet. They remain cool under stress, calm under pressure and collected when in danger. They are found protecting the trees ferociously. Abilità: Erbaiuto, Agiltecnica.

Growlithe.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #058. Categoria: Pokémon Puppy. Friendly, loyal, and fearless in defending its trainer. These traits have gained them a place working as police Pokémon. They are uncommon in the wild, but some packs can be seen in hot environments. Abilità: Prepotenza, Fuocardore.

Mightyena.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #262. Categoria: Pokémon Bite. They attack savagely, travel in packs and hunt in groups. They will only obey trainers that show superior skills, which they recognize as the alpha leader. They are extremely obedient once they find a master. Abilità: Prepotenza, Piedisvelti.

Venusaur.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #003. Categoria: Pokémon Seed. Venusaur's flower is said to take on vivid colors if it gets plenty of sunlight. The flower's aroma soothes the emotions of others. If you find one in the wild, it must be the protector of the area. Abilità: Erbaiuto, Clorofilla.

Zapdos (Galarian Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #145. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . There have been sightings of an aggressive bird that will race and attack cargo trucks through remote roads in the Galar region. Some of them reported a thunderous sound before being knocked over. Abilità: Agonismo.

Jolteon.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #135. Categoria: Pokémon Lightning. This Pokémon evolved after being affected by electric radiation. Every hair on its body starts to stand sharply if it becomes charged with electricity. It shoots lightning from all around its body. Abilità: Assorbivolt, Piedisvelti.

Staraptor.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #398. Categoria: Pokémon Predator. Staraptor is a savage creature. They will never stop attacking even if they get injured, and will fight foes bigger than themselves. They are known to leave their flock to live on their own after they evolve. Abilità: Prepotenza, Temerarietà.

Aron.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #304. Categoria: Pokémon Iron Armor. They can be seen feeding on iron ore in the mountains or causing trouble by eating rails, bridges, and vehicles. When they evolve, Aron shed their steel armor and develop a stronger one. Abilità: Testadura, Vigore.

Crocalor.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #910. Categoria: Pokémon Fire Croc. Shortly after it evolves, the excess fire energy it has creates an egg- shaped fireball on top of its head. They have a poor control of their flames so they end up scattering embers all over the place. Abilità: Aiutofuoco, Imprudenza.

Pansage.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #511. Categoria: Pokémon Grass Monkey. Pansage is a friendly Pokémon. It is good at finding berries and will share them with other Pokémon. The leaves on its head have medicinal properties; if it finds a sick Pokémon, it will offer some to heal it. Abilità: Erbaiuto, Voracità.

Feebas.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #349. Categoria: Pokémon Fish. These Pokémon taste awful, and they are incredibly ugly, smelly, kind of dumb, and terrible fighters. To make things worse, they rarely reproduce as they don't find each other attractive; for this reason, they are extremely rare. Abilità: Indifferenza, Nuotovelox.

Staravia.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #397. Categoria: Pokémon Starling. They lead a huge flock and fight other flocks for territory. If you leave them alone, they will start to make a horrible noise. A fierce but bad-mannered Pokémon. If they are too weak, they'll abandon their flock. Abilità: Prepotenza, Temerarietà.

Palafin (Hero Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #964. Categoria: Pokémon Dolphin. When true danger comes, this hero rises from the sea to save the day. This hero will come to the rescue of anyone crying for help. No one knows their secret identity, as they disappear after danger passes. Abilità: Supercambio.

Charmander.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #004. Categoria: Pokémon Lizard. A rare Pokémon. The flame on its tail is an indicator of its feelings and life force. If it is healthy and happy, the flame burns brightly. It needs proper care and discipline or else it may rebel later on. Abilità: Aiutofuoco, Solarpotere.

Dreepy.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #885. Categoria: Pokémon Lingering. After being reborn as a ghost, Dreepy wanders the areas it used to inhabit back when it was alive in prehistoric seas. Alone they do not pose much of a threat but if they gather in packs you'll be in trouble. Abilità: Corpochiaro, Intrapasso.

Shroodle.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #944. Categoria: Pokémon Toxic Mouse. Although they are mellow Pokémon, they are lousy pets, for they will sink their sharp poison-soaked teeth into your hand. They thrived in cities where they could nest in the sewers.
