Their nests are very smelly. Abilità: Agiltecnica, Arraffalesto.

Grimer.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #088. Categoria: Pokémon Sludge. It was born from polluted sludge in the sea. Grimer's favorite food is anything filthy, like water waste pumped out from factories. Grime and sludge stick to its body, making it grow larger over time. Abilità: Tanfo, Antifurto.

Spinda.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #327. Categoria: Pokémon Spot Panda. Spinda move while stumbling in dizziness. This teeter dance causes a severe confusion for whoever is looking. They are shy towards humans, but sometimes they appear in towns looking really disoriented. Abilità: Mente Locale, Inversione.

Gliscor.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #472. Categoria: Pokémon Fang Scorp. Its flight is soundless. It uses its lengthy tail to carry off its prey, then uses its long fangs to do the rest. It is more playful than aggressive, but it is dangerous if you get close to the enormous claws. Abilità: Ipertaglio, Velencura.

Porygon-Z.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #474. Categoria: Pokémon Virtual. A software to explore another dimension was installed on Porygon. However, it began acting oddly due to glitches in the code. Since then, it has a fondness for videos of Meowth and Skitty on the internet. Abilità: Download, Adattabilità.

Alakazam (Mega Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #065. Categoria: Pokémon Psi. With the power of the Mega Stone it is constantly plagued with visions of the future which makes it great at evading attacks. Its body is feeble and it moves purely through psychic energy. Abilità: Traccia.

Ducklett.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #580. Categoria: Pokémon Water Bird. These bird Pokémon are excellent divers. They swim around in the water eating their favorite food: peat moss. They can shoot a spray of mist with their feathers to protect themselves from any predator that comes. Abilità: Sguardofermo, Pettinfuori.

Veluza.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #976. Categoria: Pokémon Jettison. These Pokémon shed parts of their flesh to increase their agility. The discarded flesh is considered delicious. Do not underestimate them for they are swift predators, Wiglett being their main food source. Abilità: Rompiforma, Affilama.

Rattata (Alolan Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #019. Categoria: Pokémon Mouse. Rattata first came to Alola through cargo ships. It thrived and almost destroyed the region's ecosystem. Attempts to exterminate this Pokémon made it more vicious than its regular counterpart. Abilità: Voracità, Tuttafretta.

Probopass.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #476. Categoria: Pokémon Compass. It exudes strong magnetic field. It controls three small units or 'Mini-Noses' that float around and serve as extensible limbs. Most of the time it stays motionless, unless attacked or provoked. Abilità: Vigore, Magnetismo.

Impidimp.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #859. Categoria: Pokémon Wily. Through its nose, it sucks in the dark emanations produced by people and Pokémon when they feel annoyed. It thrives off this negative energy. They love to take things that don't belong to them. Abilità: Burla, Indagine.

Nacli.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #932. Categoria: Pokémon Rock Salt. These Pokémon are born in layers of rock salt that exist underground. The ground scrapes the salt off as they travel, but they replenish it. This made them very appreciated in the old days as they shared their salt. Abilità: Sale Purificante, Corpochiaro.

Toucannon.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #733. Categoria: Pokémon Blade Quill. It can store and expel an extremely hot gas through its beak that ignites easily. The berry seeds it shoots can pierce boulders, leaving perfectly round holes in them. Fortunately, they nest deep in the jungle. Abilità: Abillegame, Forzabruta.

Basculegion (Female Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #902. Categoria: Pokémon Big Fish. There is a legend amongst fishers of Sinnoh that goes back to the era of Hisui, in which you must return the bones of any fish you eat back to the water for them to be reborn again and not become evil spirits. Abilità: Adattabilità, Rompiforma.

Umbreon.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #197. Categoria: Pokémon Moonlight. Umbreon evolved from exposure to the moon's energy pulses. It lurks in darkness and waits for its foes to move. The rings on its body glow when it leaps to attack. Its fur is drenched with poison. Abilità: Sincronismo, Forza Interiore.

Floatzel.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #419. Categoria: Pokémon Sea Weasel. It floats using its well-developed sack. They roam close to fishing spots to steal an easy meal. People allow them to hang around their boats because they help whenever a person falls into the water. Abilità: Nuotovelox, Idrovelo.

Metang.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #375. Categoria: Pokémon Iron Claw. Its two brains are joined by a magnetic nervous system. This allows Metang to use psychokinetic powers. It is able to float and move in midair at 60 mph (96 kph). To evolve further it will need more brain power. Abilità: Corpochiaro, Metalleggero.

Milotic.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #350. Categoria: Pokémon Tender. Milotic is considered to be one of the most beautiful Pokémon in existence. It has inspired music, paintings, and statues. It has the power to calm the anger and hostility of its foes. Abilità: Tenacia, Pelledura.

Marshadow.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #802. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . There is an old children's story about a boy who lost his shadow and the shadow became a Pokémon. There is a debate to which Pokémon the story is referring. Abilità: Tecnico.

Pachirisu.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #417. Categoria: Pokémon EleSquirrel. It lives on top of trees, gathering food for the cold winter months. It keeps warm by making fur balls charged with static electricity. Like other electric rodents, it stores electricity on its cheek pouches. Abilità: Raccolta, Assorbivolt.

Cramorant (Gorging Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #845. Categoria: Pokémon Gulp. Cramorant's Gorging Form. Somehow it caught a Pikachu after diving. Can use the Move Thunderbolt. Abilità: Inghiottimissile.

Morpeko.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #877. Categoria: Pokémon Two-Sided. Its 'Full-Belly' Mode is friendly and playful: it treasures food and treats. But as its hunger increases it goes into 'Hangry' Form and starts getting violent: the electricity in its cheek sacs turns into a Dark-type energy. Abilità: Pancialterna.

Haunter.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #093. Categoria: Pokémon Gas. Haunter is a dangerous Pokémon. It will try to lick you with its tongue to steal your life away. If you get the feeling of being watched in darkness when nobody is around, it means a Haunter is there. Abilità: Levitazione.

Salazzle.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #758. Categoria: Pokémon Toxic Lizard. This Pokémon is Female only. It releases a powerful toxic gas that is filled with pheromones that help her keep her reverse harem of Salandit in check. This gas can be purified into expensive perfumes. Abilità: Corrosione, Indifferenza.

Luxio.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #404. Categoria: Pokémon Spark. Female Luxio stay with the pride but males roam in marauding groups, trying to become strong enough to make their own pride. Its claws and teeth are charged with electricity; approach with caution. Abilità: Antagonismo, Prepotenza.

Fraxure.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #611. Categoria: Pokémon Axe Jaw. Their tusks can shatter rocks. Territory battles between Fraxure can be intensely violent. The tusks don't grow back anymore; if you find a Fraxure with both tusks whole, it means it's one of the strongest. Abilità: Antagonismo, Agitazione.

Phantump.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #708. Categoria: Pokémon Stump. According to the old tales, these Pokémon are stumps possessed by the spirits of children who were lost in the forest. They prefer to live in abandoned woods and lure people to the darkness to play with them. Abilità: Alternacura, Indagine.

Zebstrika.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #523. Categoria: Pokémon Thunderbolt. It is very ill-tempered and wild; there have been very few cases of it being successfully tamed. It can shoot lightning from its mane in all directions. If you try to mount it without warning, it will shock you. Abilità: Parafulmine, Elettrorapid.

Spiritomb.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #442. Categoria: Pokémon Forbidden. A legend from 500 years ago tells how it got bound into an Odd Keystone after cursing an entire town. Two have been found in recent times. It is said that its vortex has more than 100 haunted souls. Abilità: Pressione, Intrapasso.

Kartana.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #798. Categoria: Aether Foundation Log #014. Its paper-thin body and agility make it too dangerous to approach without serious risk of injury. Our team managed to immobilize it using a heat chamber, though I swear I feel its resentment to us. Abilità: Ultraboost.

Chinchou.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #170. Categoria: Pokémon Angler. In the dark ocean floor, its only means of communication is to constantly flash its lights. It is a clumsy but friendly Pokémon. Its antennae can be used to power up small electric appliances. Abilità: Risplendi, Assorbivolt.

Rolycoly.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #837. Categoria: Pokémon Coal. This Pokémon was discovered inside a coal mine. It looks like a clump of coal, only it moves like a unicycle. When it gets angry, it glows burning hot, but when it's happy, it lets out soft crackles and keeps a steady warmth. Abilità: Vapormacchina, Antifuoco.

Avalugg.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #713. Categoria: Pokémon Iceberg. They carry their Bergmite offspring on their backs. Its Ice body is hard as steel and its cumbersome frame crushes anything that stands in its way. They are capable of swimming but they move very slowly. Abilità: Corpogelo, Vigore.

Tepig.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #498. Categoria: Pokémon Fire Pig. It blows fire through its nose. When it catches a cold, the fire becomes pitch-black smoke instead. Tepig loves to eat roasted berries and its keen sense of smell allows it to find them easily. Abilità: Aiutofuoco, Grassospesso.

Slowpoke (Galarian Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #079. Categoria: Pokémon Dopey. Slowpoke born in Galar develop a sharper mind than others from their species, even though their expressions still seem a little dopey. Due to their different diets, the sap at the tip of their tails acquires a spicy flavor. Abilità: Voracità, Mente Locale.

Parasect.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #047. Categoria: Pokémon Mushroom. Their personality changes after evolution since the mushroom takes over its mind. Its body is now a husk devoid of nutrients. To survive, they cling to a tree and absorb the nutrients until the tree dies. Abilità: Spargispora, Pellearsa.

Typhlosion (Hisuian Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #157. Categoria: Pokémon Volcano. Some Hisuian documents and scrolls from hundreds of years ago depict Typhlosion as sullen Pokémon, user of sinister and shadowy energies. Modern Typhlosion do not exhibit these properties. Abilità: Aiutofuoco, Indagine.

Toxtricity (Amped Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #849. Categoria: Pokémon Punk. Commonly called 'Amped Form'. Its nature determines its evolution. If a Toxel is extroverted, it will evolve to be a short-tempered Toxtricity. They emit high-pitched sounds and let out powerful discharges to provoke others. Abilità: Punk Rock, Più.

Snubbull.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #209. Categoria: Pokémon Fairy. It may look frightening, but it is a loving and caring creature, active and playful. Snubbull are easily scared. When threatened by bigger foes, they run away or make scary faces; that makes them sad though. Abilità: Prepotenza, Fugafacile.

Cranidos.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #408. Categoria: Pokémon Head Butt. It was resurrected from an iron ball-like fossil. It downs prey with headbutts and tramples trees and walls with ease. They were plentiful 100 million years ago. You can't find one nowadays except as a fossil. Abilità: Rompiforma, Forzabruta.

Magmortar.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #467. Categoria: Pokémon Blast. Magmortar is extremely rare; if you're lucky you can find one living directly in volcanic craters. It raises the temperature of its body at will to the point of bursting into flames. The fire it produces is almost white. Abilità: Corpodifuoco, Spiritovivo.

Yamper.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #835. Categoria: Pokémon Puppy. Its energy and big smile make this Pokémon very popular as a herding dog. When it runs, it generates electricity from the base of its tail. It loves to fetch balls and if you give it some treats it will love you forever. Abilità: Raccattapalle, Paura.

Primeape.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #057. Categoria: Pokémon Pig Monkey. It grows angry if you look at its eyes and gets angrier if you run. If you fight it will go mad with rage. Not many trainers are capable of handling it. The angrier it gets the less intelligent it becomes. Abilità: Spiritovivo, Grancollera.

Archeops.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #567. Categoria: Pokémon First Bird. They used to form groups that cooperated to catch prey. From the ground, they used a running start to take flight. It is believed that they went extinct due to their poor tolerance for pain. Abilità: Sconforto.

Grovyle.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #253. Categoria: Pokémon Wood Gecko. Their leaves provide camouflage in the jungles. They appear to fly from tree to tree, jumping huge lengths with amazing speed. It's almost impossible to catch them once they start running away. Abilità: Erbaiuto, Agiltecnica.

Ogerpon (Cornerstone Mask Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #1017. Categoria: Pokémon Mask. Ancient myths and legends remain alive to this day. It is said Kitakami is visited by a destructive creature during the festival of masks. The creature thrashes the place and destroys all festive decorations. Abilità: Vigore, Albergamemorie.

Cottonee.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #546. Categoria: Pokémon Cotton Puff. They go wherever the wind takes them. On rainy days they can't float, so they take shelter beneath big trees. To defend from predators, they shed their cotton and leave it as a decoy while they escape. Abilità: Burla, Clorofilla.

Toedscool.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #948. Categoria: Pokémon Woodear. It was believed to be a variant of Tentacool. Genetic research revealed that it's an entirely different species. They live in muggy forests and can run quite fast. Their legs are pretty delicious to eat. Abilità: Micoforza.

Kyurem (Black Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #646. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . In the icy mountains at the east of Unova, you can hear the wails of a creature suffering as if it missed a part of its very soul. Dark clouds and lightning are sure to follow. Abilità: Teravolt.

Absol.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #359. Categoria: Pokémon Disaster. It is said that this Pokémon can live for 100 years. It has a bad reputation: whenever one is seen, a disaster is soon to follow - earthquakes, forest fires, and tidal waves. Absol lead a lonely life. Abilità: Pressione, Supersorte.

Charizard (Mega X Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #006. Categoria: Pokémon Flame. The power of the Mega Stone makes its inner flames burn so hot that its body turns black as coal, and blue fire escapes constantly from its mouth. It is filled with rage and its demeanor is unpredictable. Abilità: Unghiedure.

Serperior.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #497. Categoria: Pokémon Regal. It stops enemies dead in their tracks with just one intense glare. It is a noble and proud Pokémon. It is not aggressive, but it can be very stubborn. It takes a really strong foe for it to take the fight seriously. Abilità: Erbaiuto, Inversione.

Heliolisk.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #695. Categoria: Pokémon Generator. They flare their frills in the sun to recharge. A single Heliolisk is able to generate the power to light a skyscraper. For this reason, researchers are investing in the preservation and welfare of this species. Abilità: Pellearsa, Solarpotere.

Mewtwo (Mega X Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #150. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . The power of the Mega Stone was absorbed into its muscles. If it grapples you and its Psychic force does not crack, you its strong arms will. Abilità: Cuordeciso.

Shieldon.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #410. Categoria: Pokémon Shield. It was cloned from a fossil dug out from a layer of clay. It is outstandingly armored. As a result, it can eat grass and berries without having to fight many Pokémon who would dare to prey on it. Abilità: Vigore, Antisuono.

Turtonator.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #776. Categoria: Pokémon Blast Turtle. It lives in the volcanic areas of Alola, where it disguises itself among the rocks, waiting for prey to step on it to detonate an explosion. The hole on its chest is a weak point, but it is very difficult to access. Abilità: Guscioscudo.

Silicobra.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #843. Categoria: Pokémon Sand Snake. Silicobra can appear to be very aggressive but they just want to be left alone. They spew sand from their nostrils and while the foe is blinded, they burrow back into the ground to hide. Abilità: Sputasabbia, Muta.

Wormadam (Ground Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #413. Categoria: Pokémon Bagworm. When Burmy evolved, its Sand cloak became a part of its body. For this reason there are many variations in body and type. It is a calm Pokémon that loves odd-shaped stones. This Pokémon is female-only. Abilità: Presagio, Copricapo.

Piloswine.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #221. Categoria: Pokémon Swine. Their long hair obscures their sight, but they're sensitive to sound and smells. Piloswine's rugged hooves prevent it from slipping on icy terrain. Amazingly, their tusks are made of solid ice. Abilità: Indifferenza, Mantelneve.

Fuecoco.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #909. Categoria: Pokémon Fire Croc. The yellow scales on its belly and tail absorb heat from the environment and the one's on its head release the heat in the form of fiery flames. Fuecoco are easy-going creatures who love food and eating. Abilità: Aiutofuoco, Imprudenza.

Arbok.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #024. Categoria: Pokémon Cobra. This Pokémon has an incredibly strong constricting power. Once it wraps its body around its foe, escaping is almost impossible. The pattern on its body glows in the dark like a terrifying face. Abilità: Prepotenza, Muta.

Kleavor.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #900. Categoria: Pokémon Axe. There are ancient records of a Rock-Type evolution for Scyther using Black Augurite, but this mineral is completely mined out today. They were known to be solitary creatures that chopped wood in the forests. Abilità: Aiutinsetto, Forzabruta.

Squawkabilly.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #931. Categoria: Pokémon Parrot. These Pokémon live in flocks of the same color. Some colors prefer cities, while others prefer forests. They are very social but have a strong rivalry against flocks of different colors. Each color group shares a single Ability. Abilità: Prepotenza, Tuttafretta.

Bouffalant.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #626. Categoria: Pokémon Bash Buffalo. They form herds on the coldest plains. They charge and headbutt their foes. The fluffy fur on their heads absorbs damage to their skulls. Years ago, a Bouffalant struck and derailed a train with a bash. Abilità: Temerarietà, Mangiaerba.

Latias.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #380. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . The legend tells about two Pokémon that could take human shapes, use psychic powers and become invisible. They were raised by an old couple as their own children. The little girl had a red dress. Abilità: Levitazione.

Amoonguss.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #591. Categoria: Pokémon Mushroom. In ancient times, the tip of their caps had two eye-like patterns, and it made a swaying motion to lure prey to itself, but as they became Pokéball-looking, few Pokémon fell for it. It is still very venomous, though. Abilità: Spargispora, Rigenergia.

Manectric (Mega Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #310. Categoria: Pokémon Discharge. The power of the Mega Stone gives it an insurmountable amount of electricity that gives it an explosive velocity, but it is too much for it to bear. Its mane grows uncomfortably large, making it moody. Abilità: Prepotenza.

Gyarados.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #130. Categoria: Pokémon Atrocious. It's rarely seen in the wild. This huge and vicious Pokémon is known for the destruction it leaves in its wake. In ancient literature, there is a record of a Gyarados that razed a village when violence flared. Abilità: Prepotenza, Arroganza.

Vespiquen.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #416. Categoria: Pokémon Beehive. This Pokémon is female only. It raises grubs in the holes in its body and secretes pheromones to control Combee to fight and gather honey for it. It is a royal Pokémon that won't take orders from anyone. Abilità: Agitazione, Pressione.

Nihilego.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #793. Categoria: Aether Foundation Log #047. We are unable to determine if the creature is sentient or not; it adapts its behavior depending on its last host. It hasn't stopped behaving like a little girl since then. It's both unsettling and fascinating. Abilità: Ultraboost.

Centiskorch.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #851. Categoria: Pokémon Radiator. It lashes its body like a whip and launches itself at enemies. While its burning body is already dangerous on its own, this excessively hostile Pokémon also has large and very sharp fangs. Abilità: Fuocardore, Corpodifuoco.

Lanturn.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #171. Categoria: Pokémon Light. It is known for its soft light glow. They are not aggressive Pokémon. If you look into the dark sea at night you can sometimes see this Pokémon's light rising from the depths, making the sea look like a starry night. Abilità: Assorbivolt, Assorbacqua.

Brambleghast.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #947. Categoria: Pokémon Tumbleweed. They wander through arid regions. If an unsuspecting creature comes across them, they will enclose their brambles as a cage and slowly absorb the victim's life force, discarding only bones after they are done. Abilità: Vento Propizio, Intrapasso.

Onix.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #095. Categoria: Pokémon Rock Snake. It is not full-size when it's born. Years of eating boulders make it a real giant. It lives on mountains and dark tunnels. Its frightening roars travel as echoes through the caves. It is very aggressive towards others. Abilità: Testadura, Sottilguscio.

Sunkern.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #191. Categoria: Pokémon Seed. They suddenly appear after a cold winter. They survive by drinking only dewdrops from under the leaves of plants. It tries not to move a lot since lots of bird Pokémon prey on them. Abilità: Clorofilla, Solarpotere.

Morelull.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #755. Categoria: Pokémon Illuminating. Morelull are nocturnal Pokémon whose headbulbs emit a faint glow. They root into a tree and use its nutrients to power their light, when the tree is all dried up they are ready to evolve. Abilità: Risplendi, Spargispora.

Tauros (Paldean Form) (Aqua Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #128. Categoria: Pokémon Wild Bull. This is a male species. These Tauros are specially bred in Paldea for their ability to travel in water. Their body is thick with a fat layer under the skin that helps them float. They shoot powerful water jets from their horns. Abilità: Prepotenza, Grancollera.

Magnezone.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #462. Categoria: Pokémon Magnet Area. Magneton only evolves in very specific areas of the globe. It has the ability to repel itself from the ground using magnetism. If it is nervous, it pulls all the pieces of metal around it until it relaxes. Abilità: Magnetismo, Vigore.

Oricorio (Pa'u Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #741. Categoria: Pokémon Dancing. What was thought to be different species ended up being a single Pokémon. Oricorio Pa'u has an aloof but ultimately relaxed nature. Its dance is focused and has an hypnotic rhythm. Abilità: Sincrodanza.

Blitzle.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #522. Categoria: Pokémon Electrified. When storm clouds cover the plains, you can see them running around chasing the lightning bolts to absorb them with their mane. They form big herds and use the pattern on their skin to confuse predators. Abilità: Parafulmine, Elettrorapid.

Decidueye (Hisuian Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #724. Categoria: Pokémon Arrow Quill. Decidueye living in the Hisui region, centuries ago, suffered due to living in cold, snowy mountains and most went extinct. A few tried to adapt their feathers to be weatherproof, but they went extinct as well. Abilità: Erbaiuto, Distacco.

Chimchar.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #390. Categoria: Pokémon Chimp. They climb sheer cliffs to live at the top of the mountains. Small groups of them tend to visit human camping sites to steal food and objects. They are playful and will wreak havoc if they want to have fun. Abilità: Aiutofuoco, Ferropugno.

Capsakid.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #951. Categoria: Pokémon Spicy Pepper. These Pokémon produce a spicy chemical when exposed to sunlight; the more sun they get, the hotter it becomes. They shed their teeth and regrow new ones. The shed teeth can be used as a food ingredient. Abilità: Clorofilla, Insonnia.

Ledyba.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #165. Categoria: Pokémon Five Star. These timid Pokémon swarm in groups to keep each other warm during the winter. It communicates with others through a special scent. They often appear covered in the morning dew. Abilità: Aiutinsetto, Sveglialampo.

Cobalion.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #638. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . There is a story in Unova about four Pokémon that brought justice to the wrongdoers. Their leader was calm and composed, but unforgiving. Its cold stare forced people to obey its sacred law. Abilità: Giustizia.

Rotom (Wash Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #479. Categoria: Pokémon Plasma. A washing machine possessed by a Rotom. It uses Water powers and floods houses with torrents of water. While in this form it can use the move 'Hydro Pump'. Abilità: Levitazione.

Poltchageist (Counterfeit Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #1012. Categoria: Pokémon Matcha. This Pokémon haunts high quality tea caddies. It can leave traces of its own body powder on food and beverages to suck the life of those who so much as lick it. Although similar, it's unrelated to Sinistea. Abilità: Ospitalità, Antifuoco.

Goodra.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #706. Categoria: Pokémon Dragon. Definitely the friendliest of all Dragons. This Pokémon will hug its beloved Trainer, leaving them covered in sticky slime. In areas with heavy rainfall during the year, one or two may make an appearance. Abilità: Idratazione, Viscosità.

Scorbunny.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #813. Categoria: Pokémon Rabbit. Scorbunny is small and energetic. They love to run in large fields from one side to another for hours. There are heat pads on its feet and nose; as it runs or battles they can get burning hot. Abilità: Aiutofuoco, Libero.

Toxtricity (Low Key Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #849. Categoria: Pokémon Punk. Commonly called 'Low Key Form'. Its nature determines its evolution. If a Toxel is introverted, it will evolve to be a chill Toxtricity. They emit low-pitched sounds and look down on others who try to provoke them. Abilità: Punk Rock, Meno.

Mothim.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #414. Categoria: Pokémon Moth. It flies near the mountains in search of honey. It is an opportunist and won't gather any honey by itself. Instead, Mothim steals from Combee hives and other Pokémon. This Pokémon is male-only. Abilità: Aiutinsetto, Lentifumé.

Cleffa.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #173. Categoria: Pokémon Star Shape. An extremely elusive Pokémon. A few have appeared when the night skies are filled with shooting stars - but they always disappear at dawn. Friendship and love allows it to go into the next step of life. Abilità: Incantevole, Amicoscudo.

Ampharos (Mega Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #181. Categoria: Pokémon Light. With the power of the Mega Stone, the dormant dragon genes it has are awakened. Its wool grows back as a silky mane that flows and floats with the electricity its body is discharging. Abilità: Rompiforma.

Kingdra.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #230. Categoria: Pokémon Dragon. Kingdra sleeps on the seafloor where it is otherwise devoid of life. When a storm arrives, it is said to awaken and wander about in search of prey. They are known for creating twisters in the sea. Abilità: Cecchino, Nuotovelox.

Buneary.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #427. Categoria: Pokémon Rabbit. It lives in forests, grasslands, and even snowy mountains. It forms burrows and uses its soft fur to make nests and keep warm. You can see how it feels by the position of its ears. They are easily scared by humans. Abilità: Fugafacile, Impaccio.

Goldeen.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #118. Categoria: Pokémon Goldfish. Goldeen loves swimming wild and free in rivers and ponds. If one of these Pokémon is placed in an aquarium, it will shatter the glass with its horn and make its escape. Abilità: Nuotovelox, Idrovelo.

Dewgong.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #087. Categoria: Pokémon Sea Lion. Its body is covered with a pure white fur. The colder the weather, the more active it becomes. It hunts at night and it's excellent at catching fish Pokémon. It is also very intelligent and playful. Abilità: Grassospesso, Corpogelo.

Whiscash.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #340. Categoria: Pokémon Whiskers. Dangerous and territorial, they claim entire ponds as their homes and will crush whoever dares to dive in with earthquakes. They eat anything alive in their pond or swamp. They have learned to foretell real tremors. Abilità: Presagio, Idratazione.

Drizzile.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #817. Categoria: Pokémon Water Lizard. Its demeanor changes drastically from shy to aloof and lazy. It can create water balloons with the moisture secreted from its paws. It is incredibly intelligent and is known to lay traps for others in the wild. Abilità: Acquaiuto, Cecchino.

Hoopa (Unbound Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #720. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . There is a story of an old demon whose power unleashed horrors from other dimensions onto earth. Ripping the fabric of existence, it opened portals to bring evil upon all. Abilità: Prestigiatore.

Gyarados (Mega Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #130. Categoria: Pokémon Atrocious. With the power of the Mega Stone, its body suffers a lot of strain, making it faster and stronger but also angrier and uncontrollable. It must have a strong bond or it will fall into a destructive rampage. Abilità: Rompiforma.

Diglett (Alolan Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #050. Categoria: Pokémon Mole. This variant of Diglett is only found in the Alola region. The small hairs on its head are used to perceive its surroundings while burrowed. Do not cut them or Diglett will become very sick. Abilità: Sabbiavelo, Boccolidoro.

Aromatisse.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #683. Categoria: Pokémon Fragance. Its scent is so overpowering that it makes it difficult to simply be in close proximity to it. It emits scents that its foes dislike in order to gain an edge in battle. They can also produce pleasant and healing aromas. Abilità: Curacuore, Aromavelo.

Eternatus.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #890. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . A large meteorite fell on the Galar region 20,000 years ago. Ever since this happened, a power surge has been causing Pokémon to grow gigantic; this phenomenon is happening more in recent years. Abilità: Pressione.

Carbink.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #703. Categoria: Pokémon Jewel. It's occasionally found at drilling zones and excavations in caves. Born from temperature and pressure deep underground, it shoots beams from the stone in its head. They can live for hundreds of years. Abilità: Corpochiaro, Vigore.

Regice.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #378. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. It is said to be indistinguishable from a gigantic iceberg. Its myth says its body can't be melted even if submerged in magma. Regice could freeze the air to bring a new ice age. Abilità: Corpochiaro, Corpogelo.

Shellder.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #090. Categoria: Pokémon Bivalve. It lives at the bottom of the sea and rivers. It feeds on algae but it's attracted to sweet substances. When frightened it will shut its clam and lock it to be almost impossible to open. Abilità: Guscioscudo, Abillegame.

Hatterene.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #858. Categoria: Pokémon Silent. If you're too loud around it, you risk being torn apart by the claws on its tentacle. This Pokémon is also known as the Forest Witch. It is very sensitive to the emotions of others. If it senses doubt, fear or anger, it will attack you. Abilità: Curacuore, Presagio.

Abra.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #063. Categoria: Pokémon Psi. They are attracted to the cities and tend to live close to humans. Its Psychic abilities are still developing; it must sleep 18 hours a day or else it won't be able to use them. When in danger, it teleports away. Abilità: Sincronismo, Forza Interiore.

Lokix.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #920. Categoria: Pokémon Grasshopper. If this Pokémon unfolds the legs on its back it means it will battle going all-out. When they do this, the battle doesn't usually last long. If a large swarm gathers, it won't be good for the crops in the area. Abilità: Aiutinsetto, Lentifumé.

Claydol.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #344. Categoria: Pokémon Clay Doll. It is made entirely of clay. The first one was discovered in ruins from 20,000 years ago. A strange light is said to be the source of its life and Psychic abilities. Its eight eyes are always alert and always watching. Abilità: Levitazione.

Steenee.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #762. Categoria: Pokémon Fruit. Its sweet aroma keeps attracting predators but it fends them away with its hard and bitter head leaves. It likes to be taken seriously and can be hard to deal with, if you make it mad you'll receive a kick. Abilità: Fogliamanto, Indifferenza.

Darumaka.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #554. Categoria: Pokémon Zen Charm. Lives in deserts and arid terrains. It has a flame inside its body. When the flame burns brightly it becomes very active, running around. When the flame is low, it falls asleep. Their droppings double as a bonfire. Abilità: Tuttafretta, Forza Interiore.

Iron Hands.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #992. Categoria: Pokémon Paradox. A sumo wrestler given a second chance at life. Cybernetic enhancements allow for its hands to move independent of its body to send speeding cars into the air. Abilità: Carica Quark.

Shellos.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #422. Categoria: Pokémon Sea Slug. Its shape and coloration change depending on its habitat of salt or fresh water. Their body is very soft and squishy but they can stretch to long lengths. It releases a purple liquid from its body if threatened. Abilità: Acquascolo, Antifurto.

Stunfisk (Galarian Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #618. Categoria: Pokémon Trap. Stunfisk lives in mud with high iron content. Those nutrients turned its body into a Steel Type. Stunfisk's lips are hard to spot in the mud, but if someone steps on it, its jagged steel clamps their prey. Abilità: Mimetismo, Sabbiavelo.

Aerodactyl (Mega Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #142. Categoria: Pokémon Fossil. With the power of the Mega Stone, it restores the original appearance it had millions of years ago with its body covered in sharp rocks. It is very aggressive and will attack anything that moves. Abilità: Unghiedure.

Mewtwo (Mega Y Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #150. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . With the power of the Mega Stone, its body got smaller but its power grew immensely. It can blow up even a skyscraper with just its thoughts. Abilità: Insonnia.

Pichu.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #172. Categoria: Pokémon Tiny Mouse. Its cheek pouches are not fully developed yet. Pichu gets startled if its cheeks release electricity jolts. It needs a friendly environment to grow happy. It can be quite the rascal, though. Abilità: Statico, Parafulmine.

Great Tusk.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #984. Categoria: Pokémon Paradox. A mysterious life-form resembling a Donphan with gigantic tusks and tough scales. Our ongoing research appears to indicate it has a very aggressive disposition. Abilità: Paleoattivazione.

Snover.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #459. Categoria: Pokémon Frosted Tree. During cold seasons, it migrates to the mountain's lower reaches and returns to the summit in the spring. They are rarely in contact with humans, but are sought for the frozen berries they grow. Abilità: Scendineve, Antisuono.

Poipole.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #803. Categoria: Aether Foundation Log #162. Thanks to the Recon Squad we've managed to secure a location on the other side. UB-06 Adhesive have been a great help; their intelligence and friendliness would make them very popular in our world. Abilità: Ultraboost.

Honchkrow.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #430. Categoria: Pokémon Big Boss. It lets out a deep cry to summon Murkrow, which fetch food and shiny objects for Honchkrow. It is, however, a tyrant to the Murkrow. It only goes out at night to carry out evil deeds. Abilità: Arroganza, Supersorte.

Skiddo.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #672. Categoria: Pokémon Mount. It's thought to be one of the first Pokémon to live in harmony with humans. If it has sunshine and water it doesn't need to eat - the leaves on its back will produce the energy for it. Abilità: Mangiaerba, Peloderba.

Cloyster.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #091. Categoria: Pokémon Bivalve. If it lives in seas with harsh currents, it will grow larger and sharper spikes on its shells than those that live in calm waters. Its shell is extremely hard - you would need explosives to try to open it. Abilità: Guscioscudo, Abillegame.

Butterfree.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #012. Categoria: Pokémon Butterfly. It can be found in forests and plains. It loves the honey in some flowers even with tiny amounts of pollen. Its wings are covered by dust that allows it to fly even when it's raining. Abilità: Insettocchi, Lentifumé.

Scraggy.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #559. Categoria: Pokémon Shedding. It sheds skin constantly, but keeps wearing it since the old skin has a rubber-like texture and it can pull it all the way up to its head. It bashes foes with headbutts and is known for making dirty moves while fighting. Abilità: Muta, Arroganza.

Pyukumuku.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #771. Categoria: Pokémon Sea Cucumber. Once this Pokémon finds a spot it likes it will remain there without moving, even if food is out of reach. It can expel its organs through its mouth and use them like an arm. It's slimy and not many people like it. Abilità: Espellinterno, Imprudenza.

Salamence.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #373. Categoria: Pokémon Dragon. After a lifetime of struggling for a dream, it finally grew its wings. Salamence, however, is extremely dangerous; it scorches entire fields and mountains. It's easily angered and completely uncontrollable. Abilità: Prepotenza, Arroganza.

Smeargle.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #235. Categoria: Pokémon Painter. A special ink oozes from its tail to mark its territory. They are skilled artists, known for painting action scenes from great battles. If they study their painting for a long time, they learn those moves. Abilità: Mente Locale, Tecnico.

Seadra.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #117. Categoria: Pokémon Dragon. The poisonous barbs all over its body are highly valued as ingredients for making traditional medicine. It will show no mercy if anything approaches its nest. Its back fin has a numbing substance. Abilità: Nuotovelox, Cecchino.

Skarmory.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #227. Categoria: Pokémon Armor Bird. Their wings are hollow and light. They nest inside bramble bushes, growing stronger from scratches made by thorns. Their wings were used as swords and knives in old times. Beware of their sharp beak. Abilità: Sguardofermo, Vigore.

Zorua.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #570. Categoria: Pokémon Tricky Fox. They are very hard to find as they can transform into people and other Pokémon. They cannot speak when transformed and their tail remains visible. They ruin reputations by creating mischief in disguise. Abilità: Illusione.

Slowpoke.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #079. Categoria: Pokémon Dopey. It lives close to water. This Pokémon has a low intellect, and it's slow to react to any stimuli. Its tail seeps a sweet substance it uses to lure prey to eat. When the tip turns white, Shellder will be attracted to it. Abilità: Indifferenza, Mente Locale.

Rattata.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #019. Categoria: Pokémon Mouse. It can live anywhere it can find food, but they are often in cities and fields. They form large families in their burrows. Since they are often preyed on, Rattatas are always alert and quick to flee. Abilità: Fugafacile, Dentistretti.

Cramorant (Gulping Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #845. Categoria: Pokémon Gulp. Cramorant's Gulping Form. It dove in the sea and caught an Arrokuda. Can use the Move Bite. Abilità: Inghiottimissile.

Pignite.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #499. Categoria: Pokémon Fire Pig. Whatever it eats becomes fuel for the flame in its stomach. When it is angered, the intensity of the flame increases. It is not common to see them the wild. They are mostly found living in warm places. Abilità: Aiutofuoco, Grassospesso.

Cursola.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #864. Categoria: Pokémon Coral. The ectoplasm serves as protection for its soul; do not touch it or you'll become stiff as stone. This Pokémon longs for the days where coral reefs were full of life. It holds a grudge against those who destroyed them. Abilità: Sottilguscio, Ultimotocco.

Stoutland.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #508. Categoria: Pokémon Big-Hearted. For many years this Pokémon has helped with rescue missions in hostile places. Its outer coat is hard on the exterior but soft and silky on the inside. They keep people safe and warm while help is on the way. Abilità: Prepotenza, Remasabbia.

Sneasler.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #903. Categoria: Pokémon Free Climb. Sneasler were great hunters of the Hisuian mountain range. However, as the climate got colder and snow covered the mountains, their prey moved or perished. Weavile were more successful and replaced them. Abilità: Pressione, Velentocco.

Enamorus (Therian Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #905. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . Some Pokémon reveal their true forms after recovering power lost to them. Great forces of nature can help them recover their strength such as tornadoes, lightning, and even... the power of love?. Abilità: Incantevole, Copricapo.

Articuno (Galarian Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #144. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . Galarians talk about a bird whose feathers are made of energy. It is said to be a cruel and indolent creature that freezes people with a strange power and leaves them immobile in the mountains. Abilità: Tenacia.

Pikachu.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #025. Categoria: Pokémon Mouse. They live in forests, forming small groups but they mostly stay hidden. Pikachu stores electricity inside the sacs on its cheeks and uses its tail to ground the excess charge. They can take on foes bigger than them. Abilità: Statico, Parafulmine.

Buizel.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #418. Categoria: Pokémon Sea Weasel. It is usually seen close to streams and rivers. Buizel swims by rotating its two tails like a screw; the sack around its neck swells to help it float or deflates to dive underwater and catch prey. Abilità: Nuotovelox, Idrovelo.

Camerupt.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #323. Categoria: Pokémon Eruption. Sometimes the humps on their back make an eruption when they get really angry; otherwise they'd only erupt every 10 years. Camerupt live inside the craters of volcanoes. They are indifferent to humans. Abilità: Magmascudo, Solidroccia.

Slowking.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #199. Categoria: Pokémon Royal. It is extremely rare. The Shellder on its head injects a poison that makes it super intelligent. It takes a lot of interest in learning about Pokémon lore and legends. But, if Shellder is knocked out, it will forget everything. Abilità: Indifferenza, Rigenergia.

Rookidee.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #821. Categoria: Pokémon Tiny Bird. Feisty little creatures, Rookidee are known for challenging foes much larger than themselves, and even if they are defeated they don't give up and try again later. They use their small size as an advantage. Abilità: Sguardofermo, Agitazione.

Graveler (Alolan Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #075. Categoria: Pokémon Rock. These Pokémon charge themselves by rolling around. It is dangerous if two of them collide: a loud noise and a flash of light will be seen and heard at great distance. They feed on golden dravite. Abilità: Magnetismo, Vigore.

Scolipede.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #545. Categoria: Pokémon Megapede. Highly aggressive, it uses the claws on its neck to immobilize its prey and then inject them with poison to finish them off. Be very careful around this Pokémon as it will chase you relentlessly until it gets you. Abilità: Velenopunto, Acceleratore.

Landorus (Therian Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #645. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . Some Pokémon reveal their true forms after recovering power lost to them. Great forces of nature can help them recover their strength such as tornadoes, lightning, and even a landslide. Abilità: Prepotenza.

Flygon.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #330. Categoria: Pokémon Mystic. Known as the 'Elemental Spirit of the Desert'. Their wings create a cloud of dust that surrounds this Pokémon while flying, while their flapping produces a sound that resembles a woman singing. Abilità: Levitazione.

Gurdurr.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #533. Categoria: Pokémon Muscular. This Pokémon is very muscular and strongly-built. It likes to show off its strength and muscles. Years back, a famous wrestler got defeated in just a few seconds by one of these Pokémon. Abilità: Ferropugno, Forzabruta.

Blastoise (Mega Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #009. Categoria: Pokémon Shellfish. With the power of the Mega Stone the canon on its back can shoot exploding water projectiles that can pierce through concrete. Its body is incredibly hard and its hind legs root themselves to prevent recoil. Abilità: Megalancio.

Chien-Pao.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #1002. Categoria: Pokémon Ruinous. A broken sword turned into a living entity from the intense hatred of all the victims it struck down. It has gained a snowy form and contently leaps around in frigid areas, causing devastating avalanches wherever it goes. Abilità: Spada Nefasta.

Charjabug.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #737. Categoria: Pokémon Battery. Whatever this Pokémon eats is transformed into electricity. People often use them to power up small appliances in their homes. This Pokémon rarely moves since it is preparing to evolve. Abilità: Batteria.

Barboach.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #339. Categoria: Pokémon Whiskers. Their whiskers work as a super sensitive radar. They hide inside the mud, leaving only their whiskers exposed while waiting for prey to come. If the mud dries, they move back into the water. Abilità: Indifferenza, Presagio.

Herdier.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #507. Categoria: Pokémon Loyal Dog. It loyally follows its trainer's orders. For ages, they have helped trainers to raise well behaved Pokémon. It has black, cape-like fur that is very hard and keeps it protected from the weather. Abilità: Prepotenza, Remasabbia.

Gumshoos.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #735. Categoria: Pokémon Stakeout. Alolan Ratatta became nocturnal to evade this Pokémon, as it is their main predator. Gumshoos now go hungry for days before they find something suitable to eat; they compensate by sleeping a lot. Abilità: Adattabilità, Ferromascella.

Wattrel.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #940. Categoria: Pokémon Storm Petrel. They can be seen flying above the ocean. To catch prey they dive into the water and zap their victim. Their body is adapted to withstand fierce storms. For some reason, people eat their nests as gourmet food. Abilità: Energia Eolica, Tenacia.

Golisopod.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #768. Categoria: Pokémon Hard Scale. This Pokémon is a rare sight, for most Wimpods never evolve and, when they do, Golisopod spend most of their lives in deep sea caves, meditating. It is extremely strong: its claws can tear through everything. Abilità: Passoindietro.

Hoopa.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #720. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . There is a story of an old demon whose power had to be contained by a spell. The spell was a partial success as the demon could still roam free, but its power and evil was greatly diminished. Abilità: Prestigiatore.

Beheeyem.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #606. Categoria: Pokémon Cerebral. Apparently, it communicates by flashing its three fingers, but the patterns haven't been decoded. It uses psychic power to control an opponent's brain and tampers with its memories and personality. Abilità: Telepatia, Ponderazione.

Walking Wake.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #1009. Categoria: Pokémon Paradox. Pokédex glitches as it has no data. On a remote island, an experiment gone wrong made it to the news when several wild Pokémon attacked the visitors of what was planned to be an amusement park. Abilità: Paleoattivazione.

Hoppip.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #187. Categoria: Pokémon Cottonweed. This Pokémon drifts away by floating on the wind. Even the weakest current can lift them up. By the end of the winter you can see them flying above cities and fields. This means that spring is coming soon. Abilità: Clorofilla, Fogliamanto.

Klang.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #600. Categoria: Pokémon Gear. Mini-gear and big-gear comprise its body. If the mini-gear is detached, it will turn off both gears. It communicates with others by rotating. When it's angry or afraid, it rotates faster. Abilità: Più, Meno.

Kilowattrel.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #941. Categoria: Pokémon Frigatebird. They use their throat sac to store electricity, this energy allows them to fly for long distances over the sea. As much as they excel at soaring the sky, they are very poor swimmers and dislike getting wet. Abilità: Energia Eolica, Assorbivolt.

Magearna.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #801. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . 500 years ago a famous scientist left a manuscript with details on how to create a mechanical Pokémon. His investigation led to the creation of the modern Pokéball. Abilità: Cuoreanima.

Qwilfish.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #211. Categoria: Pokémon Balloon. It swallows water to inflate its body to appear bigger than its foes. Qwilfish must swallow 2 gallons of water to be able to shoot its stings. The poison produced by Qwilfish is known to cause fainting. Abilità: Velenopunto, Nuotovelox.

Minior Core.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #774. Categoria: Pokémon Meteor. Without its shell Minior can move faster. They have playful and colorful personalities. If a Minior wants to regrow their shell they must go to the stratosphere for a few days. Some of them never return, though. Abilità: Scudosoglia.

Horsea.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #116. Categoria: Pokémon Dragon. It makes its nest in the shade of corals in shallow parts of the sea. If it senses danger, it spits a murky ink and flees. It has been seen shooting down flying bugs to eat them. Abilità: Nuotovelox, Cecchino.

Rotom (Fan Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #479. Categoria: Pokémon Plasma. A desk fan possessed by a Rotom. It uses Flying powers and scatters everything around with terrible air currents. While in this form it can use the move 'Air Slash'. Abilità: Levitazione.

Quaxwell.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #913. Categoria: Pokémon Practicing. They are very observant Pokémon, trying to incorporate the movements they see into their dance. They practice in shallow water, kicking gracefully until they make no splash at all. A serious and diligent Pokémon. Abilità: Acquaiuto, Arroganza.

Tatsugiri (Curly Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #978. Categoria: Pokémon Mimicry. These small dragon Pokémon are very cunning: they hide inside the mouths of Dondozo, then feign weakness to lure prey and order their partner to attack. Orange Tatsugiri focus on offensive tactics. Abilità: Torre di Comando, Acquascolo.

Swoobat.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #528. Categoria: Pokémon Courting. They communicate by emitting ultrasonic waves through their noses. This sound is not perceptible by humans, but it can affect their mood and emotions. It hunts bug Pokémon and loves fresh fruit. Abilità: Imprudenza, Disinvoltura.

Seel.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #086. Categoria: Pokémon Sea Lion. A Pokémon that lives on icebergs. It swims in the sea using the point on its head to break up the ice. It sleeps a lot during the day, being most active at dawn when the temperature starts to cool. Abilità: Grassospesso, Idratazione.

Xerneas.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #716. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . A Kalos legend about the eternal struggle between life and death tells the story of an ancient king who tried to obtain eternal life and the power to make his departed loved ones live once again. Abilità: Aurafolletto.

Liepard.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #510. Categoria: Pokémon Cruel. It's difficult to see one in the wild. These Pokémon vanish and appear, attacking unexpectedly. Many Trainers are drawn to their beautiful fur and elegant appeal, but they can be quite dangerous. Abilità: Scioltezza, Burla.

Loudred.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #294. Categoria: Pokémon Big Voice. Their ears work as loudspeakers capable of breaking glass or even blowing apart a wooden house. When they finish shouting, even they are deafened for a while. They have noisy competitions in their packs. Abilità: Antisuono, Nervisaldi.

Plusle.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #311. Categoria: Pokémon Cheering. They are often seen cheerleading their friends. When someone they like does a great job, they shower the field with sparks, but when they lose, Plusles cry loudly. This Pokémon drains power from telephone poles. Abilità: Più, Parafulmine.

Passimian.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #766. Categoria: Pokémon Teamwork. They live in packs of 20 members. They are all coordinated to pass around the food and to defend their nest. Their leader is not the strongest but the best teamworker of the pack. A very loyal Pokémon. Abilità: Ricezione, Agonismo.

Noivern.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #715. Categoria: Pokémon Sound Wave. They fly during the new moon and attack careless prey. Nothing can beat them in a battle in the dark. To keep them calm you should feed them fruit or else they’ll release shocking ultrasonic waves. Abilità: Telepatia, Intrapasso.

Porygon.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #137. Categoria: Pokémon Virtual. The first case of a man-made Pokémon created as computer data. It is capable of reverting itself into a program in order to enter the cyberspace. Its software has a firewall so it cannot be copied. Abilità: Traccia, Download.

Makuhita.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #296. Categoria: Pokémon Guts. A tenacious Pokémon that will get back up no matter how many times it gets knocked down. They have a tireless spirit, and never give up hope. Makuhita put all their hearts into everything they do. Abilità: Dentistretti, Grassospesso.

Lairon.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #305. Categoria: Pokémon Iron Armor. Their armor gets stronger by eating iron ore and drinking mineral spring water, so they usually nest close to ponds. Lairon often attack human miners. They are territorial creatures, very stubborn and resilient. Abilità: Testadura, Vigore.

Pinsir.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #127. Categoria: Pokémon Stag Beetle. Their pincers are strong enough to shatter thick logs. Because they dislike cold, Pinsirs burrow and sleep under the ground on chilly nights. They like to eat sap and honey, but they are aggressive by nature. Abilità: Ipertaglio, Rompiforma.

Houndoom (Mega Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #229. Categoria: Pokémon Dark. With the power of the Mega Stone, its whole body radiates tremendous heat, so much that its claws are searing hot and turn red as a result; for this reason it can be painful for it to walk or run. Abilità: Solarpotere.

Oinkologne (Male Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #916. Categoria: Pokémon Hog. Males are proud creatures, they emit a lingering perfumated scent rom the tip of their tails. Their skin is also very glossy and it loves to keep it clean. This delicious aroma also lingers beautifully well in bacon. Abilità: Odore Tenace, Grassospesso.

Furret.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #162. Categoria: Pokémon Long Body. It lives along its Sentret family and acts as the hunter and caregiver of the pack. It can move really fast. If it is cornered, it will squirm through even the narrowest of gaps to escape safe and sound. Abilità: Fugafacile, Sguardofermo.

Hydrapple.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #1019. Categoria: Pokémon Apple Hydra. Up to seven serpent Pokémon have been found living inside one of these sticky apples. The larger serpent becomes the leader. Each with its own personality, their moods and motives rarely allign. Abilità: Rigenergia, Sciroppo Sublime.

Throh.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #538. Categoria: Pokémon Judo. When they encounter foes bigger than themselves, they try to throw them away. In the wild they always travel in packs of five and make their clothes and belts out of plants and vines. Abilità: Dentistretti, Forza Interiore.

Deoxys.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #386. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . A space expedition had to be aborted due to an emergency. The ship's crew mentioned a creature attacking them inside their ship. They all gave different descriptions of said creature. Abilità: Pressione.

Machamp.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #068. Categoria: Pokémon Superpower. There are a few roaming in the mountains. Machamp has the power to hurl anything aside. However, trying to do any work that requires care and dexterity may cause its arms to get tangled. Abilità: Dentistretti, Cuordeciso.

Phanpy.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #231. Categoria: Pokémon Long Nose. They are affectionate and playful, but their snout is so strong that they may hurt others while playing. They dig pits at the edge of rivers and mark them so everyone knows that place is taken. Abilità: Raccolta, Sabbiavelo.

Arcanine (Hisuian Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #059. Categoria: Pokémon Legendary. In the ancient land of Hisui, there were myths of a mighty beast made of fire and stone. It is believed to have been an Arcanine, but today's specimens barely resemble the mighty creature in the old scrolls. Abilità: Prepotenza, Giustizia.

Dustox.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #269. Categoria: Pokémon Poison Moth. They travel in big groups during the night, attracted to bright lights and big cities. Their flight releases a poisonous, shining dust that causes mayhem in towns. For this reason, people dislike them. Abilità: Polvoscudo, Insettocchi.

Lopunny.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #428. Categoria: Pokémon Rabbit. Lopunny is extremely cautious; it quickly bounds off when it senses danger. If they are touched roughly, they throw kicks and jump away. Keep the fur it sheds as it's highly valued to make quality yarn. Abilità: Incantevole, Scioltezza.

Simisage.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #512. Categoria: Pokémon Thorn Monkey. It becomes somewhat ill-tempered after it evolves. The leaves on its head can be turned into a bitter but effective medicine; however, it will attack with its thorned tail anyone trying to take them. Abilità: Erbaiuto, Voracità.

Tyranitar.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #248. Categoria: Pokémon Armor. Its body is hardly damaged by any attack, so it's always eager to fight. They are extremely strong; their rage can change landscapes. Tyranitar are insolents, rebels and they care about no-one. Abilità: Sabbiafiume.

Unfezant.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #521. Categoria: Pokémon Proud. Males swing the beautiful plumage on their heads to threaten others and to court females. Although less visually appealing, females are better at flying. Once they form a pair, they are mated for life. Abilità: Antagonismo, Supersorte.

Diglett.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #050. Categoria: Pokémon Mole. It prefers dark places and spends most of its time underground. It has a very thin skin. It's frail and has problems regulating its own temperature. Keep it burrowed or it will get sick. Abilità: Sabbiavelo, Trappoarena.

Cutiefly.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #742. Categoria: Pokémon Bee Fly. These delicate Pokémon gather by the number in flower meadows. They are attracted to happy and joyful people: the story says that Cutiefly see their auras and they resemble flowers. Abilità: Mielincetta, Polvoscudo.

Hippopotas.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #449. Categoria: Pokémon Hippo. It lives in arid places where it forms small groups. It closes its nostrils and submerges under the sand to rest. Females have a different coloration, usually a darker and duller color. They are easy-going Pokémon. Abilità: Sabbiafiume, Silicoforza.

Dedenne.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #702. Categoria: Pokémon Antenna. The tail is used to absorb electricity from power outlets. They communicate with each other by feeling the static on their whiskers. Its cute and cuddly appearance make it a favorite pet. Abilità: Guancegonfie, Più.

Swellow.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #277. Categoria: Pokémon Swallow. They are vain Pokémon, acting with grace and elegance. Swellow are seen circling the skies looking for prey. They can be incredibly fast. If two Swellow meet, they will clean each other's wings as a sign of peace. Abilità: Dentistretti, Nervisaldi.

Iron Thorns.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #995. Categoria: Pokémon Paradox. A killing machine from the far future. It's been re-programmed and sent to the past to protect a certain individual. It is highly intelligent and only fights when necessary. Abilità: Carica Quark.

Omanyte.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #138. Categoria: Pokémon Spiral. One of the ancient and extinct Pokémon that have been revived from fossils by science. If attacked, it withdraws into its hard shell. It is not found in the wild anymore, but fossils can be found in the sea. Abilità: Nuotovelox, Sottilguscio.

Rotom (Frost Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #479. Categoria: Pokémon Plasma. A refrigerator possessed by a Rotom. It uses Ice powers, traps people inside and freezes them in solid ice blocks. While in this form it can use the move 'Blizzard'. Abilità: Levitazione.

Type: Null.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #772. Categoria: Pokémon Synthetic. A synthetic Pokémon made by the Aether Foundation. Currently only three specimens exist in cryogenic stasis, but they are deemed too dangerous even with a limiter helmet on. They must never be reanimated. Abilità: Lottascudo.

Audino (Mega Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #531. Categoria: Pokémon Hearing. The power of the Mega Stone increases the purity of this Pokémon, revealing its Fairy Type. It is so caring and protective of its trainer that it can hear their cries for help from miles away. It loves to soothe and care for others. Abilità: Curacuore.

Munchlax.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #446. Categoria: Pokémon Big Eater. A Munchlax stomach is never full. It can eat its weight in food daily, but it will usually not care about the food's quality. They tend to pick up anything that looks edible and snack on it later. Abilità: Raccolta, Grassospesso.

Dachsbun.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #927. Categoria: Pokémon Dog. Dachsbun is every wheat farmer's best friend, as the delicious aroma it emanates helps the fields grow with golden grains. Their body can harden when exposed to heat, and they are excellent vermin hunters. Abilità: Bentostato, Aromavelo.

Slither Wing.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #988. Categoria: Pokémon Paradox. Pokédex registers it as #637. It shares striking similarities with Volcarona. However, it behaves as if it were a beast brought back from ancient times, wreaking havoc wherever it goes. Abilità: Paleoattivazione.

Necrozma (Dusk Mane Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #800. Categoria: Aether Foundation Log #182. The shadowy creature is in pain, and it hungers for any light it can find. I wonder how would it fare on the other side, back in our world. Would the sunlight ease its spirit or release a terrible monster?. Abilità: Scudoprisma.

Boldore.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #525. Categoria: Pokémon Ore. It releases its excess of energy in the form of red crystals. Still blind, it looks for for water sources inside underground caves by using echolocation. It is a pacifistic creature that keeps to itself most of the time. Abilità: Vigore, Sottilguscio.

Blaziken.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #257. Categoria: Pokémon Blaze. They can jump to incredible heights. As they grow older, their feathers combust as new feathers grow back. They are courageous fighters and expert martial artists. Their wrists light in flames when they're about to attack. Abilità: Aiutofuoco, Acceleratore.

Bagon.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #371. Categoria: Pokémon Rock Head. Bagon dream of soaring the sky. This leads to a lot of frustration that makes them dive off cliffs in an attempt to fly. Their head is tough enough to survive the fall. They are very ill-tempered and violent. Abilità: Testadura, Forzabruta.

Mawile.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #303. Categoria: Pokémon Deceiver. They appear to be cute and docile, luring their prey and lowering their guards. Then, Mawile chomps the prey with huge steel jaws. They are very rare, though. Only a few have been seen in Hoenn's Victory Road. Abilità: Ipertaglio, Prepotenza.

Wooper.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #194. Categoria: Pokémon Water Fish. Inhabits cold water sources and only comes out during the evening when the land has cooled, to find something to eat. Under this ideal environment it has rarely been seen at its evolved stage. Abilità: Assorbacqua, Imprudenza.

Infernape.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #392. Categoria: Pokémon Flame. Its fire crown showcases its proud and fiery nature. Infernape won't hesitate to fight bigger foes and will take on any challenge they face. Once Infernape enters a battle, it won't back down until it wins. Abilità: Aiutofuoco, Ferropugno.

Zamazenta.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #889. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . There is a legend of a hero who through sheer might wielded the shield of heroes to protect the people from the greatest evil. Abilità: Scudo Saldo.

Snivy.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #495. Categoria: Pokémon Grass Snake. It is very intelligent and independent; although it seems calm, it doesn't like being bossed around. Being exposed to lots of sunlight makes its movements swifter. Its tail drops if it is not feeling well. Abilità: Erbaiuto, Inversione.

Sizzlipede.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #850. Categoria: Pokémon Radiator. It stores flammable gas in its body and uses it to generate heat. The yellow sections on its belly get very hot. It wraps prey with its body heated to cook them, then it nibbles them down until nothing remains. Abilità: Fuocardore, Fumochiaro.

Grimer (Alolan Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #088. Categoria: Pokémon Sludge. Grimer were brought into Alola to eat garbage in the region. It seemed like a counterintuitive measure but ended up solving the problem. But now Grimer are incredibly noxious, much more toxic than usual. Abilità: Voracità, Antifurto.

Palpitoad.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #536. Categoria: Pokémon Vibration. It lives both in water and on land. It uses its long, sticky tongue to capture prey. When they vibrate the bumps on their heads, they can make waves in the water and even earthquake-like vibrations on land. Abilità: Nuotovelox, Assorbacqua.

Tentacruel.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #073. Categoria: Pokémon Jellyfish. Lives in rock formations at the bottom of the ocean. It can grow tentacles at will and uses them to immobilize prey. Records exist of a giant Tentacruel that sunk a fleet of pirate ships filled with treasure. Abilità: Corpochiaro, Copripioggia.

Bramblin.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #946. Categoria: Pokémon Tumbleweed. It is said that the wandering souls who are unable to move onto the afterlife sometimes get trapped in dried grass and become this Pokémon. Lonesome creatures, they're blown by the wind with no direction. Abilità: Vento Propizio, Intrapasso.

Skeledirge.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #911. Categoria: Pokémon Singer. Despite its fearsome appearance, it sings a gentle and soothing song. The egg on its head gave birth to a flame bird companion who changes its shape when Skeledirge attacks. A gentle giant, protector of life. Abilità: Aiutofuoco, Imprudenza.

Shiinotic.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #756. Categoria: Pokémon Illuminating. Forests where Shiinotic live are treacherous to travel. People tell stories about strange lights that put others into a deep slumber who are then drained of their energy by these Pokémon, never to return home. Abilità: Copripioggia, Spargispora.

Aurorus.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #699. Categoria: Pokémon Tundra. It produced a freezing cold mist from the crystals on its sides and relied on size to deter predators. It also created tall walls of ice to block them. The one restored from a fossil is calm and has adapted well. Abilità: Pellegelo, Scendineve.

Abomasnow (Mega Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #460. Categoria: Pokémon Frosted Tree. The power of the Mega Stone freezes part of its body, creating pointy icicles that hail upon its enemies in a blizzard. The angrier it becomes, the longer the storm will last. Abilità: Scendineve.

Charcadet.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #935. Categoria: Pokémon Fire Child. It is said a burnt charcoal came to life after being possesed by a fiery spirit. They are brave little creatures who won't retreat from a battle, attacking with raging flames. They are known to love fatty foods. Abilità: Fuocardore, Corpodifuoco.

Gastrodon.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #423. Categoria: Pokémon Sea Slug. It has a pliable body without any bones. If any part of its body is torn off, it will grow back in minutes. There is evidence that it had a hard shell on its back for protection in prehistoric times. Abilità: Acquascolo, Silicoforza.

Sudowoodo.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #185. Categoria: Pokémon Imitation. Sudowoodo camouflages itself as a tree to avoid being attacked by enemies. However, because its arms remain green throughout the year, this Pokémon is easy to identify in winter. It's a little wary of humans. Abilità: Vigore, Testadura.

Flabébé.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #669. Categoria: Pokémon Single Bloom. This species is female-only. They are so tiny it is difficult to spot them in the wild. They pick a flower as soon as they are born and it becomes a part of their body. These small Pokémon are shy but adorable. Abilità: Fiorvelo, Simbiosi.

Spritzee.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #682. Categoria: Pokémon Perfume. In the past, rather than using a perfume, royal ladies had a Spritzee that would waft a fragrance they liked. They are popular today for this same reason. They are said to attract the one you like most. Abilità: Curacuore, Aromavelo.

Happiny.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #440. Categoria: Pokémon Playhouse. It is not common to see Happiny. This baby Pokémon cannot produce eggs yet, so it searches for white stones and carries them in its pouch. They like to look pretty and always try to act adorable. Abilità: Alternacura, Leggiadro.

Victreebel.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #071. Categoria: Pokémon Flycatcher. They live together in small groups in tropical areas. Victreebel uses a sweet, honey-like smell to lure and attract prey. They also use their long vines to rustle bushes around. They are territorial and aggressive. Abilità: Clorofilla, Voracità.

Rampardos.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #409. Categoria: Pokémon Head Butt. Its skull withstands any magnitude of impact. As a result, its brain never gets the chance to grow. This may have been the cause of its extinction. It is capable of rolling a truck over with a single strike. Abilità: Rompiforma, Forzabruta.

Latias (Mega Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #380. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . Latias is very in sync with human emotions; it can communicate using telepathy. With the power of the Mega Stone, all of its capabilities are enhanced, although its personality becomes more distant than usual. Abilità: Levitazione.

Seviper.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #336. Categoria: Pokémon Fang Snake. Their hate for the Zangoose has been boiling for so long it's now a basic instinct. They battle using their sword-edged poisonous tail, hiding in tall grass until an unwary prey gets close enough. Abilità: Muta, Intrapasso.

Arctovish.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #883. Categoria: Pokémon Fossil. This mix of DNA made a more stable creature. Able to move, breathe, and resist cold weather, the only problem is that its head is upside down. If it's not fed it cannot hunt on its own and will die of hunger in a few days. Abilità: Assorbacqua, Corpogelo.

Oshawott.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #501. Categoria: Pokémon Sea Otter. It is only seen in a few locations, always close to the sea. Oshawott uses the scalchop on its chest as a tool for multiple purposes and as a weapon to slash and fight. It is small, but brave and daring. Abilità: Acquaiuto, Guscioscudo.

Meowth (Alolan Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #052. Categoria: Pokémon Scratch Cat. In olden times, Meowth were taken to Alola as gifts for the tribe's royals. This caused them to become incredibly greedy and pampered. Nowadays they are feral, but their prideful nature remains. Abilità: Raccolta, Tecnico.

Vanillish.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #583. Categoria: Pokémon Icy Snow. Snowy mountains are this Pokémon's habitat. It conceals itself from enemy eyes by creating many small ice bundles and hiding around them. It may attach itself to the ceiling of ice caves to hide around the ice. Abilità: Corpogelo, Mantelneve.

Espathra.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #956. Categoria: Pokémon Ostrich. Despite their gentle appearance and elegant demeanor they have a vicious temperament. Known for immobilizing those who stare into their eyes. Their record speed goes beyond 120 mph (193 kph). Abilità: Scrocco, Acceleratore.

Mr. Mime.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #122. Categoria: Pokémon Barrier. You don't find this Pokémon, it finds you. It is really smart and amuses itself by showing people its power to create barriers with pantomime. It creates an invisible box and flees when you try to figure out the exit. Abilità: Tecnico, Filtro.

Noibat.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #714. Categoria: Pokémon Sound Wave. They live in dark caves and use echolocation to move around. Their enormous ears can emit ultrasonic waves that cause dizziness. Groups of them can even take on prey several times their size. Abilità: Indagine, Intrapasso.

Cyclizar.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #967. Categoria: Pokémon Mount. There are old murals depicting their use as a mount. It is believed they allowed humans to ride them due to being cold-blooded: humans served as a source of heat. They can go over 70 mph (112 kph). Abilità: Muta, Rigenergia.

Starmie.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #121. Categoria: Pokémon Mysterious. This Pokémon has been given the nickname 'the gem of the sea.' It swims through water by spinning its star-shaped body as if it were a propeller on a ship. The core at the center glows with different colors. Abilità: Ponderazione, Alternacura.

Banette (Mega Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #354. Categoria: Pokémon Marionette. The power of the Mega Stone rips the layer keeping all the cursed energy in. Its vindictive nature is so overwhelming that it can't help but to curse its own Trainer. Abilità: Burla.

Sawsbuck.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #586. Categoria: Pokémon Season. The plants growing on its horns change according to the season. They live in herds that migrate in search of grass. The leaders of the herd possess magnificent horns. They tend to be peaceful creatures. Abilità: Clorofilla, Mangiaerba.

Silvally.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #773. Categoria: Pokémon Synthetic. Pokédex has no data. It was seen in the company of a boy. It appears to be a perfected or evolved form of Type: Null. The boy gave it some strange disks that allowed it to change its type. Abilità: Sistema Primevo.

Conkeldurr.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #534. Categoria: Pokémon Muscular. They use concrete pillars as walking canes and swing the pillars freely in battle. Anthropology research says that this Pokémon may have taught humans how to make concrete out of rocks thousands of years ago. Abilità: Dentistretti, Forzabruta.

Dubwool.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #832. Categoria: Pokémon Sheep. Humble and calm, their wool has springy properties. A king in ancient times ordered a carpet made from 100 Dubwool. When it was done, people started to bounce the moment they set foot on it. Abilità: Antiproiettile, Cuordeciso.

Metagross (Mega Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #376. Categoria: Pokémon Iron Leg. The power of the Mega Stone made its four minds combine. It is now a merciless machine-like beast. If it calculates its chances to win are diminishing it will clamp itself onto its foe and self-destruct. Abilità: Unghiedure.
