Girafarig.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #203. Categoria: Pokémon Long Neck. Its tail is a head on its own. It bites if anything comes close and never rests. Some say that the sum of its two heads grant it Psychic powers. Even if that's true, the tail isn't very bright, but it is quite vicious. Abilità: Forza Interiore, Mangiaerba.

Pumpkaboo.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #710. Categoria: Pokémon Pumpkin. You can see them dwelling on farms during the autumn season. The pumpkin body is inhabited by a spirit trapped in this world. As the sun sets, it becomes restless and active. Don't ever follow their light at night. Abilità: Raccolta, Indagine.

Nidoran F.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #029. Categoria: Pokémon Poison Pin. A female-only species. It lives close to meadows and forests. They are mellow Pokémon. To protect herself, she secretes a powerful toxin through her body. Her horn is small but venomous to the touch. Abilità: Velenopunto, Antagonismo.

Sandslash (Alolan Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #028. Categoria: Pokémon Mouse. These Pokémon make their burrows in Alola's ice caverns, hidden in plain sight. Careful with its spikes; any puncture into the skin and you can get severe frostbite. They can't stand high temperatures. Abilità: Mantelneve, Spalaneve.

Tatsugiri (Stretchy Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #978. Categoria: Pokémon Mimicry. These small dragon Pokémon are very cunning: they hide inside the mouths of Dondozo, then feign weakness to lure prey and order their partner to attack. Yellow Tatsugiri focus on speed tactics. Abilità: Torre di Comando, Acquascolo.

Malamar.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #687. Categoria: Pokémon Overturning. It lures prey close with hypnotic motions, then wraps its tentacles around it before finishing it off to eat it. These Pokémon are difficult to handle as they use their Psychic abilities for evil purposes. Abilità: Inversione, Intrapasso.

Bounsweet.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #761. Categoria: Pokémon Fruit. This happy-go-lucky Pokémon produces a delicious aroma that unfortunately attracts predators to it. When it escapes, it looks as if it's happily skipping around so it rarely gets the help it needs. Abilità: Fogliamanto, Dolcevelo.

Necrozma (Dawn Wings Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #800. Categoria: Aether Foundation Log #182. The shadowy creature is in pain, and it hungers for any light it can find. I wonder how would it fare on the other side, back in our world. Would the moonlight ease its spirit or release a terrible monster?. Abilità: Scudoprisma.

Weavile.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #461. Categoria: Pokémon Sharp Claw. They live in cold regions, forming groups of four that hunt prey with impressive coordination. They leave claw marks and patterns to indicate their territory. They are devious and love to cause trouble. Abilità: Pressione, Arraffalesto.

Darumaka (Galarian Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #554. Categoria: Pokémon Zen Charm. When forced to live in snow, its fire sac froze and now it generates cold. Darumaka uses low temperatures as energy, making it very energetic in winter. It is playful and likes to throw snowballs. Abilità: Tuttafretta, Forza Interiore.

Guzzlord.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #799. Categoria: Aether Foundation Log #074. One disaster after another. This time we lost an entire facility. UB-05 is a monster, there is no other way to say it. It swallowed documents, vehicles, and even an entire building. There is no end to its hunger. Abilità: Ultraboost.

Zweilous.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #634. Categoria: Pokémon Hostile. The two heads do not get along with each other as they compete for food. For this reason, Zweilous usually eats more than it should. Touching it carelessly can get you attacked by one or both heads. Abilità: Tuttafretta.

Maschiff.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #942. Categoria: Pokémon Rascal. These chubby puppies are troublemakers. They snarl, bite, destroy toys, and bark at everyone, but even though they make an effort of being mean, people can't help but find them adorable. Abilità: Sorveglianza, Fugafacile.

Keldeo (Resolute Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #647. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . The old fairy tale ends with the youngest Pokémon rising above evil and injustice due to its resolute and determined desire for justice. The mentorship of the other three Pokémon finally bore fruits. Abilità: Giustizia.

Mesprit.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #481. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . The myth talks about three creatures being born from one of Arceus' eggs. The pink one was the being who granted humanity with emotions. It could paralyze its enemies by numbing their hearts cold. Abilità: Levitazione.

Wyrdeer.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #899. Categoria: Pokémon Big Horn. Before these Pokémon went extinct they were used by Hisuian tribes as rides through snowy terrain. Their fur was also used to make insulated winter coats. Sadly, not a single one has been seen in centuries. Abilità: Prepotenza, Mangiaerba.

Thundurus.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #642. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. There are constant forest fires all through the Unova region. These fires are always the result of a giant thunder storm. Forest rangers tell about a blue demon's shadow that lives inside the storm clouds. Abilità: Burla, Agonismo.

Wailmer.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #320. Categoria: Pokémon Ball Whale. Wailmer has a playful nature. They can store water inside their body to inflate like a ball and bounce, then startle people by snorting the water from their nostrils. This Pokémon needs lots of food everyday. Abilità: Indifferenza, Idrovelo.

Exeggutor.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #103. Categoria: Pokémon Coconut. Originally from tropical areas. Exeggutor's heads grow larger with strong sunlight. Each head thinks independently. They are friendly and provide their shade to other Pokémon. Abilità: Clorofilla, Coglibacche.

Dewpider.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #751. Categoria: Pokémon Water Bubble. It lives in shallow water pools, but goes onto land to find prey. Its water bubble allows it to breathe outside of its pool and serves as a weapon to hunt or defend itself. As it grows, its bubble grows as well. Abilità: Bolladacqua, Assorbacqua.

Roserade.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #407. Categoria: Pokémon Bouquet. Luring prey with a sweet scent, it uses the poison on its thorn-filled arm-whips to poison, bind, and finish off its prey. It has a dangerous appeal mixed with a graceful personality. It's very rare in the wild. Abilità: Velenopunto, Tecnico.

Wishiwashi (Swarm Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #746. Categoria: Pokémon Small Fry. A school of Wishiwashi is the demon of the sea. Even Gyarados flee in terror when one approaches. Since it is formed by lots of members, it's impossible to control. They disband after the threat is 'neutralized'. Abilità: Banco.

Monferno.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #391. Categoria: Pokémon Playful. It bounces off walls and ceilings to launch aerial attacks. They live in packs in distant mountains. The size of their flame and the blue pattern on their faces determine their rank. They are small but very strong. Abilità: Aiutofuoco, Ferropugno.

Weezing (Galarian Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #110. Categoria: Pokémon Poison Gas. This Pokémon eats the contamination in the air, and instead of droppings, it expels clean air. Its Galar Form was first spotted long ago when factories polluted the city. Abilità: Levitazione, Gas Reagente.

Arcanine.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #059. Categoria: Pokémon Legendary. Its proud and regal appearance has made it be revered by people of ancient societies. Its magnificent bark conveys a sense of majesty. Anyone in front of Arcanine can't help but stare in awe. Abilità: Prepotenza, Fuocardore.

Cresselia.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #488. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . The embodiment of dreams comes to life during crescent moon nights. You will be blessed with a lovely and peaceful slumber if you keep one of its feathers... or so they say. Abilità: Levitazione.

Spidops.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #918. Categoria: Pokémon Trap. They are incredibly stealthy. If you find an area covered with sticky threads, stay away, for it is most certainly a trap, and once it catches any potential prey, the victim will not escape. Abilità: Insonnia, Sorveglianza.

Gourgeist.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #711. Categoria: Pokémon Pumpkin. They wander in the town streets every new moon. It wraps its prey on its arms and sings joyfully as it observes the suffering of the victim. Hearing it sing will give you horrible nightmares. Abilità: Raccolta, Insonnia.

Tentacool.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #072. Categoria: Pokémon Jellyfish. It lives in the seas all around the world. They release a toxic ink if startled. It is a surprisingly intelligent Pokémon and can use its tentacles to briefly establish a link between its mind and another creature. Abilità: Corpochiaro, Melma.

Yungoos.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #734. Categoria: Pokémon Loitering. This Pokémon was brought to Alola in an attempt to eradicate Ratatta. It spends all day searching for prey and it's constantly hungry. When the sun sets, it falls asleep right where it was standing. Abilità: Sorveglianza, Ferromascella.

Marill.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #183. Categoria: Pokémon Aqua Mouse. Marill's tail acts like a floater. Seeing its tail bobbing on the water's surface is a sure indication that this Pokémon is diving to feed on algae and aquatic plants. This Pokémon is curious towards humans. Abilità: Grassospesso, Macroforza.

Venusaur (Mega Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #003. Categoria: Pokémon Seed. With the power of the Mega Stone, this Pokémon grows taller and thicker. Its bark and skin are now impervious to the elements. Its demeanor becomes even more serious and determined. Abilità: Grassospesso.

Yveltal.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #717. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . A Kalos legend about the eternal struggle between life and death tells the story of a king who was full of grief after sacrificing everyone he loved. He built a doomsday machine that would destroy the world. Abilità: Auratetra.

Houndstone.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #972. Categoria: Pokémon Ghost Dog. Houndstone can be found resting in graveyards. It is said they guide and guard the souls of the departed. It is a fiercely loyal Pokémon that not even death could tear apart from its master. Abilità: Remasabbia, Morbidone.

Thievul.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #828. Categoria: Pokémon Fox. They have long been hunted down by packs of Boltund because of all the trouble they cause in human settlements. They are experts at stealing food and Pokémon eggs, never leaving a trace behind. Abilità: Fugafacile, Agiltecnica.

Blaziken (Mega Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #257. Categoria: Pokémon Blaze. The power of the Mega Stone makes its inner fire burn so strong that it sets its limbs ablaze. This allows it to move faster than ever, but it also takes a toll on its feathers as they burn to black cinders. Abilità: Acceleratore.

Magikarp.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #129. Categoria: Pokémon Fish. Magikarp is a pathetic excuse of a Pokémon that is not even good to eat. It's only capable of flopping and splashing. However, it can survive in any body of water no matter how polluted it is. Abilità: Nuotovelox, Paura.

Crabrawler.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #739. Categoria: Pokémon Boxing. They can be found at the beach, but as they grow stronger, they also venture more into the land where they fight for ripe berries. They punch with their pincers -- which are delicious with butter by the way. Abilità: Ipertaglio, Ferropugno.

Drifblim.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #426. Categoria: Pokémon Blimp. They float in groups in the evenings, sometimes carrying people or Pokémon. If you notice them, they suddenly vanish. No one knows where they go at night, and those who follow them never return. Abilità: Scoppio, Bruciaimpeto.

Nidorina.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #030. Categoria: Pokémon Poison Pin. Nidorina are jealous creatures. They don't like other females near their mates. Otherwise, they are very social creatures. When it’s around friends or family, their barbs are tucked away to prevent injury. Abilità: Velenopunto, Antagonismo.

Azumarill.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #184. Categoria: Pokémon Aqua Rabbit. It stays in water virtually all day long. Its blue fur makes it difficult to spot when submerged. Azumarill uses its sensitive ears to locate prey even underwater. They are not aggressive and even get close to humans. Abilità: Macroforza, Mangiaerba.

Swirlix.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #684. Categoria: Pokémon Cotton Candy. Because it eats nothing but sweet fruit, honey and sugars, its fur is as sticky and sweet as cotton candy. To entangle its opponents in battle, it extrudes white and sticky threads, but the foes end up eating them. Abilità: Dolcevelo, Agiltecnica.

Xatu.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #178. Categoria: Pokémon Mystic. Xatu is known to stand motionless while staring at the sun all day long. Some people revere it as a mystical Pokémon out of their belief that Xatu have the power to see into the future. Abilità: Sincronismo, Magispecchio.

Latios.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #381. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . The legend tells about two Pokémon that could take human shapes, use psychic powers and become invisible. They were raised by an old couple as their own children. The boy was the oldest and wore a blue shirt. Abilità: Levitazione.

Litten.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #725. Categoria: Pokémon Fire Cat. It has an aloof personality and likes to be alone. Its fur produces flammable oils and its rough tongue lights them every time it grooms itself. Not recommended as a pet, as they cause house fires easily. Abilità: Aiutofuoco, Prepotenza.

Fidough.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #926. Categoria: Pokémon Puppy. They are smooth and squishy to the touch. Their breath can be used as yeast to bake bread and cakes. Their body is so soft, people can't help but protect them. They love to rest in warm and moist places. Abilità: Mente Locale, Impaccio.

Meowth (Galarian Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #052. Categoria: Pokémon Scratch Cat. The coin on its head has rusted. Meowth were taken onto viking ships on long travels over the sea. Living for so long in such harsh conditions toughened it up so much that parts of it have turned to iron. Abilità: Raccolta, Unghiedure.

Tranquill.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #520. Categoria: Pokémon Wild Pigeon. During war and old times people made use of Tranquill's sense of location to send letters. It will never fail to find its way back home. They like forests and enjoy relaxing in the peace and quiet of their nest. Abilità: Pettinfuori, Supersorte.

Deoxys (Attack Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #386. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . The main engineer of the space crew reported a tentacled creature that ripped with ease through the thick metal hull of the ship to escape. The ship was recovered and was indeed torn in two sections. Abilità: Pressione.

Eiscue (No Ice Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #875. Categoria: Pokémon Penguin. Eiscue (No-Ice) Form is actually its true Form. Without the ice to protect it you can see its worried expression, it's actually quite endearing. It can now move faster but you can see it feels anxious. Abilità: Gelofaccia.

Squirtle.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #007. Categoria: Pokémon Tiny turtle. It is scarce in the wild. The shell is not just for protection - it also helps to minimize resistance in water, enabling Squirtle to swim at high speeds. It's usually a calm and easygoing Pokémon. Abilità: Acquaiuto, Copripioggia.

Froakie.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #656. Categoria: Pokémon Bubble Frog. It protects its skin by covering its body in bubbly foam. In contrast to its happy-go-lucky attitude, it hides a watchful eye on its surroundings. It needs good discipline or it will be bad-mannered with others. Abilità: Acquaiuto, Mutatipo.

Greedent.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #820. Categoria: Pokémon Greedy. They are a little dim-witted as they think of nothing but eating. Greedent hide and store berries in their tails. Many of them fall out, becoming new trees the next year. Their teeth are very strong. Abilità: Guancegonfie, Voracità.

Diancie (Mega Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #719. Categoria: Registered as #703 Carbink. The popular saying goes like this: 'If you put carbon under pressure, you will get a diamond', but it surely was not referring to a Pokémon... or was it?. Abilità: Magispecchio.

Castform.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #351. Categoria: Pokémon Weather. This Pokémon reacts to the weather by changing its type and looks. It can also change the weather at will. When there is a drought, farmers lure them with small hanging dolls to ask them for rain. Abilità: Previsioni.

Maractus.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #556. Categoria: Pokémon Cactus. If you see a Maractus in the desert, follow it, as they make their nests in water oases. This pacifistic Pokémon makes a sound similar to a maraca to drive away bird Pokémon that prey on its seeds and fruit. Abilità: Assorbacqua, Clorofilla.

Electivire.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #466. Categoria: Pokémon Thunderbolt. This Pokémon is reckless and has a short temper. As its electric charge amplifies, blue sparks begin to crackle between its horns. It has registered charge levels of over 20,000 volts. Abilità: Elettrorapid, Spiritovivo.

Pheromosa.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #795. Categoria: Aether Foundation Log #012. This one also appears to be unable to enter a Pokéball, the rays just won't surround them. This one has refused to touch anything we give to it and appears displeased by my mere presence. Abilità: Ultraboost.

Rabsca.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #954. Categoria: Pokémon Rolling. Rabsca's body barely moves. With its psychic abilities finally developed, it floats to get around. Sometimes you can see a baby Rellor poking outside the ball it carries. Rabsca are gentle and selfless parents. Abilità: Sincronismo, Telepatia.

Zubat.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #041. Categoria: Pokémon Bat. It lives in dark caves all around the world. Prolonged exposure to the sun will make it unhealthy. It is blind but uses echolocation to find its way. At night, they leave their cave to feed on fruit and bug Pokémon. Abilità: Forza Interiore, Intrapasso.

Coalossal.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #839. Categoria: Pokémon Coal. They are usually calm creatures. If they see you are kind they'll share their warmth with you, but if you enrage one you risk being burned down to ashes. They spit a tarry substance that is very flammable. Abilità: Vapormacchina, Corpodifuoco.

Eelektrik.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #603. Categoria: Pokémon EleFish. These Pokemon have a really big appetite. When they spot their prey, they coil around it and shock it with their electricity-generating organs, which are the yellow circles on it's skin. Abilità: Levitazione.

Cetitan.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #975. Categoria: Pokémon Terra Whale. These Pokémon wander around snowy areas; the thick layer of fat on their bodies protects them from the figid temperatures. They are not particularly aggressive, but are fiercely protective of their young. Abilità: Spalaneve, Forzabruta.

Stantler.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #234. Categoria: Pokémon Big Horn. Their antlers create a distortion in space that causes confusion. They were hunted for their magnificent antlers, that were sold at high prices, nearly driving Stantler extinct. Their antlers don't grow as big as a result. Abilità: Indagine, Prepotenza.

Inteleon.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #818. Categoria: Pokémon Secret Agent. Its fingertips can create quick jets of water that travel at incredibly high speeds; these jets can even pierce thick metal plates. It usually hunts from a high place, shoots, and then glides down to eat its prey. Abilità: Acquaiuto, Cecchino.

Skiploom.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #188. Categoria: Pokémon Cottonweed. It blooms when the weather is warm. If the weather gets cold, the bloom will close and it will stop flying. This is not an aggressive Pokémon, but it can cause allergies if it floats directly above you. Abilità: Clorofilla, Fogliamanto.

Vigoroth.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #288. Categoria: Pokémon Wild Monkey. They are always agitated, anxious, excited, or upset, rampaging over anything. They can't be still and they can't sleep. They get angry if they get bored and violent if there is no activity for them. Abilità: Spiritovivo.

Oranguru.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #765. Categoria: Pokémon Sage. This solitary Pokémon lives deep in the forests where it provides food and herbal medicine to those in need. It is incredibly smart, even learning how to use Pokéballs. For that reason it dislikes being ordered around. Abilità: Forza Interiore, Telepatia.

Rockruff.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #744. Categoria: Pokémon Puppy. Rockruff are very social and friendly. Their keen sense of smell allows them to find their trainers easily. However, as they age they become wilder and rebellious. Do not let them roam alone at night. Abilità: Sguardofermo, Spiritovivo.

Hypno.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #097. Categoria: Pokémon Hypnosis. Old children stories tell of an Hypno who takes away naughty kids and feasts on their dreams until they are old men. They have an urge to eat the dreams of others since they cannot sleep themselves. Abilità: Insonnia, Premonizione.

Mewtwo.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #150. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . An article in a science magazine talked about how much cloning research was progressing, but... could it be?. Abilità: Pressione.

Hippowdon.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #450. Categoria: Pokémon Heavyweight. It becomes territorial and aggressive after evolving. Its open mouth stands over 7 ft. tall, so beware. There are records of one that came out of the sand and crushed a truck that was passing over its territory. Abilità: Sabbiafiume, Silicoforza.

Remoraid.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #223. Categoria: Pokémon Jet. Remoraid has a remarkable aim with its water gun. This ability is used to hunt by shooting down Pokémon above the sea. They can be seen clinging on a Mantine's flaps to travel faster. Abilità: Tuttafretta, Cecchino.

Omastar.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #139. Categoria: Pokémon Spiral. An Omastar used its tentacles to ensnare and capture its prey. It is believed to have become extinct because the shell grew too large, making it slow and ponderous. It is not found in the wild anymore. Abilità: Nuotovelox, Guscioscudo.

Hitmonlee.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #106. Categoria: Pokémon Kicking. Its legs freely stretch and contract. It bowls over foes with devastating kicks. It is very disciplined and trains every day. It is very rare in the wild, and it is mostly found in urban areas. Abilità: Scioltezza, Temerarietà.

Chi-Yu.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #1004. Categoria: Pokémon Ruinous. A pair of precious, coveted jewels that have acquired life from the envy of those who foolishly started wars to claim them. With a body of fire, it melts rocks and sand into a sea of lava, moving as if swimming through water. Abilità: Monile Nefasto.

Regidrago.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #895. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. There's a spooky Galarian legend talking of a disembodied and giant dragon head that unleashes its wrath upon anyone it comes across. But surely it's just a silly tale to scare the children, right?. Abilità: Dragomascelle.

Karrablast.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #588. Categoria: Pokémon Clamping. When they feel threatened, they spit an acidic liquid to drive attackers away. This Pokémon targets Shelmet as they compete for food. It only evolves when it has a Shelmet's shell as its new home. Abilità: Aiutinsetto, Muta.

Simipour.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #516. Categoria: Pokémon Geyser. It prefers places with clean water. When its tuft runs low, it replenishes it by siphoning water up with its tail. It is said that if you see a Simipour swimming in a pond, the water is safe to drink. Abilità: Acquaiuto, Voracità.

Sharpedo (Mega Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #319. Categoria: Pokémon Brutal. As soon as it feels the power of the Mega Stone surge through its body, its mind goes blank with fury and violence. Its sharp spikes and teeth regrow sharper if it loses them. The yellow marks on its body are scars. Abilità: Ferromascella.

Sneasel.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #215. Categoria: Pokémon Sharp Claw. It drives weaker Pokémon from their homes and eats their eggs. They are vicious and cunning. They wait for prey hidden in the darkness and enjoy slashing their foes until they get tired or the foe stops moving. Abilità: Forza Interiore, Sguardofermo.

Sandy Shocks.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #989. Categoria: Pokémon Paradox. A Magneton that's been alive for thousands and thousands of years. It attacks those unlucky enough to find themselves in the line of sight of its three vicious eyes. Abilità: Paleoattivazione.

Burmy.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #412. Categoria: Pokémon Bagworm. This Pokémon has adapted to live in forests, deserts, and in the city. It makes a cloak with the materials close to it to protect itself from the weather. Males evolve into Mothim and females into Wormadam. Abilità: Muta, Copricapo.

Drapion.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #452. Categoria: Pokémon Ogre Scorp. This Pokémon is very aggressive. It can completely rotate its head over its body. Because of this, Drapion has no blind spots. Its venom is deadly and it won't hesitate to use it. Abilità: Lottascudo, Cecchino.

Noctowl.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #164. Categoria: Pokémon Owl. It can hunt in full darkness without fail. All Noctowl owe their success to their superior vision that allows them to see in minimal light, and to their agile and silent wings. They are very intelligent and critical Pokémon. Abilità: Insonnia, Lentifumé.

Latios (Mega Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #381. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . Latios is very in sync with human logic; it can communicate using telepathy. With the power of the Mega Stone, all of its capabilities are enhanced, although its personality becomes more caring than usual. Abilità: Levitazione.

Raikou.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #243. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. Johto legends tell about a Pokémon born from lightning, with a roar like crashing thunder, soaring the lands, sending resounding shockwaves as it walks. Abilità: Pressione, Forza Interiore.

Arctozolt.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #881. Categoria: Pokémon Fossil. This DNA hybrid has a hard time walking around. The bottom part is from a Pokémon from an arctic region and the upper lived in warm jungles. Poor thing is always shivering and sneezing without control. Abilità: Assorbivolt, Spalaneve.

Haxorus.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #612. Categoria: Pokémon Axe Jaw. Their sturdy tusks will stay sharp even if they are used to cut steel. These Pokémon are covered in hard armor. They are incredibly aggressive; if their territory is trespassed upon, they chase and slash mercilessly. Abilità: Antagonismo, Rompiforma.

Espurr.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #677. Categoria: Pokémon Restraint. The organs that emit its intense psychic power are tucked under its ears to keep energy from escaping. It still does not control its power and could destroy something without realizing it. Abilità: Sguardofermo, Mente Locale.

Meowstic.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #678. Categoria: Pokémon Constraint. The eye patterns inside its ears emit psychic energy. It keeps them shut tight because the power can be overwhelming. Females are white in color and more aggressive than the mild-mannered males. Abilità: Sguardofermo, Intrapasso.

Gigalith.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #526. Categoria: Pokémon Compressed. It is a serious Pokémon that doesn't interact with others too much. It uses the sharp crystals on its body to recharge using the sun's energy. If angered, it can bury its foe under giant rock slides or explode at will. Abilità: Vigore, Sabbiafiume.

Urshifu (Rapid Strike Style Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #892. Categoria: Pokémon Wushu. This Pokémon passed through a series of trials inside a temple of water. Its style focuses on a series of rapid stikes to steadily weaken its foes. It's a firm believer in using its opponent's strength against it. Abilità: Pugni Invisibili.

Sewaddle.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #540. Categoria: Pokémon Sewing. It is a sweet Pokémon that loves its family. It hides its head in the leaf hood while it is sleeping. The silk they produce is highly valued to make expensive clothing; this makes it a popular pet for fashion designers. Abilità: Aiutinsetto, Clorofilla.

Moltres (Galarian Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #146. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . Folktales speak of a horrendous black bird whose evil aura burns the spirit within. Leaving its poor victims alive but empty shells of their former selves. If such pokémon exists it should be avoided at all costs. Abilità: Furore.

Leavanny.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #542. Categoria: Pokémon Nurturing. It is a gentle and caring Pokémon. Mostly known for making clothes out of leaves and silk for any small Pokémon it finds. It warms and protects its eggs, making nests of fermenting leaves. Abilità: Aiutinsetto, Clorofilla.

Naclstack.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #933. Categoria: Pokémon Rock Salt. These Pokémon cure their prey in salt, until they resemble salt statues. They compress salt inside their body and then shoot the hardened pellets with enough force to perforate an iron sheet. Abilità: Sale Purificante, Corpochiaro.

Wormadam (Steel Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #413. Categoria: Pokémon Bagworm. When Burmy evolved, its Trash cloak became a part of its body. For this reason there are many variations in body and type. It is a calm Pokémon that loves foil wrapping. This Pokémon is female-only. Abilità: Presagio, Copricapo.

Melmetal.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #809. Categoria: Pokémon Hex Nut. There is an ancient myth that a Pokémon once taught a group of humans how to work the iron, melt it, and shape it into tools; but it was punished for this and cast away, never to be seen again. Abilità: Ferropugno.

Eiscue.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #875. Categoria: Pokémon Penguin. This Pokemon keeps its head cool with ice. It fishes for its food by dangling its single hair into the sea to lure in prey. When they tire of swimming they simply let their ice head be drifted away by the sea. Abilità: Gelofaccia.

Delcatty.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #301. Categoria: Pokémon Prim. They like to live without restrictions, spending their time eating and sleeping whenever they feel like it. Popular among females. Delcatties love clean places, good food, and grooming themselves. Abilità: Normalità, Splendicute.

Inkay.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #686. Categoria: Pokémon Revolving. It lives at the darkest parts of the sea. The spots on its body flash to confuse predators and give it the opportunity to scuttle away. From time to time it likes to float upside down, it means it's close to evolving. Abilità: Inversione, Ventose.

Rayquaza.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #384. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. The legend tells how Rayquaza lived in the outer layer of this world. It came to end the quarrel between Groudon and Kyogre, granted the world with blue skies, and then left. Abilità: Riparo.

Trapinch.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #328. Categoria: Pokémon Ant Pit. Their nest is like a bowl pit dug in sand. Trapinch wait for prey to tumble down their pit, later to be crushed between this Pokémon's jaws. Beware of them, as their bite can cause serious damage. Abilità: Ipertaglio, Trappoarena.

Keldeo.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #647. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . Age-old fairy tales of Unova tell the story of four Pokémon who lead the land into a golden age. The young one of the group was brave and naive. It could gallop on the water's surface, leaving a rainbow behind. Abilità: Giustizia.

Teddiursa.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #216. Categoria: Pokémon Little Bear. If they find honey, their crescent moon mark glows. They hoard food for winter and concoct their own honey by mixing fruits and pollen collected by Beedrill. Beware, as their mothers are always close. Abilità: Raccolta, Mielincetta.

Starly.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #396. Categoria: Pokémon Starling. They flock in dozens because they are very weak on their own. They live around mountains and fields, chasing Bug Pokémon. Everyone hates their annoying and strident singing. Abilità: Sguardofermo, Temerarietà.

Ogerpon (Hearthflame Mask Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #1017. Categoria: Pokémon Mask. Ancient myths and legends remain alive to this day. It is said Kitakami is visited by an angry creature during the festival of masks. The creature looks menacing and sets the town's decoration on fire. Abilità: Rompiforma, Albergamemorie.

Mabosstiff.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #943. Categoria: Pokémon Boss. They are gentle with children, loyal and caring with their family. But be careful around them as they are not keen on strangers and can be very vicious and vindictive against those that cross them or their family. Abilità: Prepotenza, Cane da Guardia.

Sableye (Mega Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #302. Categoria: Pokémon Darkness. The power of the Mega Stone made the jewel on its chest grow. It now uses it as a shield to repel any attack, but its movement is limited due to how heavy it is. Its greed for the jewel can make it aggressive. Abilità: Magispecchio.

Wooper (Paldean Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #194. Categoria: Pokémon Poison Fish. Paldean waters weren't kind to this Pokémon. Too many predators drove Wooper to live in muddy swamps instead of ponds. They developed a poisonous film on their skin to protect themselves. Abilità: Velenopunto, Imprudenza.

Pancham.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #674. Categoria: Pokémon Playful. It lives in bamboo forests. It is very energetic and playful. It wishes to be taken seriously but has a hard time due to its cute appearance. For this reason it may start hanging out with the wrong crowd. Abilità: Ferropugno, Nervisaldi.

Slowbro (Galarian Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #080. Categoria: Pokémon Hermit Crab. Slowbro in Galar do not wait for Shellder to bite their tails; they grab them by the tongue. The Shellder will defend itself by injecting poison, but Slowbro's spicy sap protects it, turning it into a Poison-Type instead. Abilità: Colpolesto, Mente Locale.

Poliwrath.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #062. Categoria: Pokémon Tadpole. It's not common to find it in the wild. Most sightings take place when it is on land. Once it is inside the water, it will swim far away. This Pokémon is an outstanding swimmer, capable of beating any human. Abilità: Assorbacqua, Nuotovelox.

Vullaby.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #629. Categoria: Pokémon Diapered. This is a female-only species. They stay with their Mandibuzz mothers from birth until they can finally fly. They feed on the carrion meat the mothers bring back to the nest and keep the bones to make accessories. Abilità: Copricapo, Sottilguscio.

Cosmog.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #789. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . A creature like this was observed on a telescope. It is rumored to be a Pokémon from another world, but no specific details are known. Abilità: Imprudenza.

Ogerpon (Wellspring Mask Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #1017. Categoria: Pokémon Mask. Ancient myths and legends remain alive to this day. It is said Kitakami is visited by a treacherous creature during the festival of masks. The creature appears serene but it calls upon rain that ruins the festivities. Abilità: Assorbacqua, Albergamemorie.

Flareon.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #136. Categoria: Pokémon Flame. A few have been seen in volcanic areas, but just like its counterparts is more common to see it being the pet of wealthy people. Its flaming fur is most appreciated for its warm glow and silky touch. Abilità: Fuocardore, Dentistretti.

Rhyperior.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #464. Categoria: Pokémon Drill. They are very scarce in the wild and only live on tall mountains. The holes on their hands are used like cannons to shoot boulders and ocasionally other Pokémon. Be careful; they are aggressive, but not very smart. Abilità: Solidroccia, Parafulmine.

Absol (Mega Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #359. Categoria: Pokémon Disaster. The power of the Mega Stone makes its fur elongate. What you see are not wings, just puffs of hair. It gets distressed by this form and dislikes going into fights, so it uses its intimidating aura to fend off foes. Abilità: Magispecchio.

Solosis.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #577. Categoria: Pokémon Cell. Their bodies are encapsulated in a special liquid, ensuring survival no matter how harsh the environment is. They drive away attackers with their psychic power. They can use their minds to communicate. Abilità: Copricapo, Magicscudo.

Cacturne.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #332. Categoria: Pokémon Scarecrow. They only move during the night. If they spot a traveler, Cacturne will stalk them in groups, waiting for the exhausted creatures to sleep before attacking. Their insides are actually sand. Abilità: Sabbiavelo, Assorbacqua.

Wailord.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #321. Categoria: Pokémon Float Whale. The largest Pokémon known to date. Wailord's weight is really light so they can dive almost 10,000 feet (3048 m) with one breath. They live in the open ocean, herding fish Pokémon to swallow in one gulp. They are used to being free. Abilità: Pressione, Idrovelo.

Dottler.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #825. Categoria: Pokémon Radome. It grows into its final stage inside a hard shell. It barely moves and it won't eat or drink during this time. Due to this, many believe it to be dead until its psychic powers awaken and it starts communicating telepathically. Abilità: Aiutinsetto, Insettocchi.

Zacian (Crown Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #888. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . There is a legend about a mighty sword able to cut down anything with a single strike. It became known as the Fairy King's Sword, and it inspired awe in friend and foe alike. Abilità: Spada Indomita.

Stunfisk.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #618. Categoria: Pokémon Trap. It conceals itself in the mud of the seashore, then it waits. When prey touch it, it delivers a jolt of electricity. Its skin is very hard and it can position itself to remain unhurt even if stepped on by a heavy Pokémon. Abilità: Statico, Scioltezza.

Walrein.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #365. Categoria: Pokémon Ice Break. The leader of the herd is a powerful Walrein. They are very aggressive and will protect their herd even at the cost of their lives. Their tusks can shatter giant blocks of ice. It is relentless and unpredictable. Abilità: Corpogelo, Grassospesso.

Honedge.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #679. Categoria: Pokémon Sword. Ancient wars saw this ruthless Pokémon born from the spirits of fallen warriors. It is a cursed sword that seeks revenge and bloodshed. It will drain the life energy of anyone that wields it. Abilità: Nullodifesa.

Sneasel (Hisuian Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #215. Categoria: Pokémon Sharp Claw. Sneasel who lived hundreds of years ago in Hisui's vast mountain range were excellent hunters who relied on their venomous claws. Climate changes made the mountains too cold and they had to adapt. Abilità: Forza Interiore, Velentocco.

Ludicolo.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #272. Categoria: Pokémon Carefree. Ludicolo starts dancing at the sound of music. Pokémon and people will dance as well. They are said to appear when children sing. They love festive places and parties. Abilità: Copripioggia, Nuotovelox.

Pawmo.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #922. Categoria: Pokémon Mouse. Pawmo are incredibly brave for their size, and will jump to protect the smaller ones of their pack against much bigger enemies. They combine their electric attacks with brute force; they're stronger than they seem. Abilità: Assorbivolt, Alternacura.

Zekrom.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #644. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . An old engraved rock tablet tells the story of two brothers. One of them wanted a world of ideals built with the energy of the young. The stone tablet is broken as if struck by lightning. Abilità: Teravolt.

Kyurem (White Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #646. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . In the icy mountains at the west of Unova, you can hear the wails of a creature suffering as if it missed a part of its very soul. Explosions and blue fires are sure to follow. Abilità: Piroturbina.

Komala.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #775. Categoria: Pokémon Drowsing. Komala are born asleep and never wake during their entire lives. They will have nightmares if you take their log-pillow. Although they appear aware of their surroundings in reality they are just dreaming. Abilità: Sonno Assoluto.

Ninetales.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #038. Categoria: Pokémon Fox. It is known to understand human speech. It is very valued for its exuberant golden fur and the mystical power of its nine tails. It is, however, known to hold a grudge against those who mistreat it. Abilità: Fuocardore, Siccità.

Gothorita.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #575. Categoria: Pokémon Manipulate. Starlight is the source of their power. At night, they mark star positions by using floating stones. According to many old tales, it creates friends for itself by controlling sleeping children on starry nights. Abilità: Indagine, Tenacia.

Crabominable.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #740. Categoria: Pokémon Woolly Crab. Crawbrawler who get lost in the snowy mountains of Alola are forced to evolve into a more suitable form. Crabominable are not very smart and throw punches at friends and foes alike when they panic. Abilità: Ferropugno, Grancollera.

Tauros (Paldean Form) (Blaze Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #128. Categoria: Pokémon Wild Bull. This is a male species. These Tauros are specially bred in Paldea for their lighter bodies and speed. They run so fast, they blaze the grass they charge in. The blaze breed is especially hot-headed and stubborn. Abilità: Prepotenza, Grancollera.

Mienfoo.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #619. Categoria: Pokémon Martial Arts. They gather in small groups around the mountains to train and master new techniques. They use their sharp claws to damage their foes. Only those Mienfoo that excel at fighting in the group evolve. Abilità: Forza Interiore, Temerarietà.

Iron Valiant.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #1006. Categoria: Pokémon Paradox. This robotic creature looks like Gardevoir and Gallade. Its AI is kind and has a pre-programmed sense of justice, but it follows it a little too well. Abilità: Carica Quark.

Virizion.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #640. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . An old tale in Unova mentions four Pokémon that fought against an evil army. The most beautiful of them was also the most swift and graceful. In combat, it created an army of trees that won the battle. Abilità: Giustizia.

Darmanitan.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #555. Categoria: Pokémon Blazing. This Pokémon is shrouded in mystery. Old writings and mural paintings describe it as being blue and using psychic powers, but years of study have not seen these traits in this Pokémon, which relies on brute force. Abilità: Forzabruta, Stato Zen.

Swablu.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #333. Categoria: Pokémon Cotton Bird. Their wings are made of cotton clouds. They are friendly creatures that love to be near humans, usually sitting on their heads as cotton hats. They travel in flocks and live near towns during the spring. Abilità: Alternacura, Antimeteo.

Darmanitan (Zen Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #555. Categoria: Pokémon Blazing. Apparently this Darmanitan just became a statue after receiving a lot of damage. It remained immobile, but as soon as its health recovered, it returned to its original state and lost its psychic powers. Abilità: Stato Zen.

Uxie.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #480. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . The myth talks about three creatures being born from one of Arceus' eggs. The yellow one was the being who granted humanity with knowledge. It could trap its enemy's minds inside realistic illusions. Abilità: Levitazione.

Applin.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #840. Categoria: Pokémon Apple Core. As soon as it's born, this tiny lizard Pokémon burrows into an apple to protect itself from flying Pokémon and predators. The apple serves as its food source and the flavor of it will determine its evolution. Abilità: Maturazione, Voracità.

Necrozma.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #800. Categoria: Aether Foundation Log #179. First it was just a passing shadow, a shady lurker on the other side of the abyss, but then today it made an appearance. The creature attached itself to our light sources, depleting them until it was all in darkness. Abilità: Scudoprisma.

Gardevoir.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #282. Categoria: Pokémon Embrace. If they sense danger, Gardevoir unleash a wave of psychic energy. They can distort this dimension and defy the laws of matter and physics. They risk their lives to protect their fellows. Abilità: Sincronismo, Traccia.

Tyranitar (Mega Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #248. Categoria: Pokémon Armor. The power of the Mega Stone is so overwhelming it splits its back open. It becomes overwhelmed by its ferocious instincts and it's unclear if it can even hear its trainer through the pain and rage. Abilità: Sabbiafiume.

Simisear.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #514. Categoria: Pokémon Ember. A flame burns on top of its head. It scatters embers from its head and tail to sear its opponents. It loves sweets and is not afraid to go near humans to try to get some candy by begging or by stealing. Abilità: Aiutofuoco, Voracità.

Munna.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #517. Categoria: Pokémon Dream Eater. It lurks close to towns and eats the dreams of people and Pokémon. When it eats a pleasant dream, it expels pink-colored mist. If you forgot what you dreamed, a Munna must have eaten your dream. Abilità: Premonizione, Sincronismo.

Metapod.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #011. Categoria: Pokémon Cocoon. Its shell can be as hard as an iron slab. A Metapod does not move very much because it is preparing its soft innards for evolution inside its shell. It is known as one of the fastest-evolving Pokémon in the world. Abilità: Muta.

Jynx.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #124. Categoria: Pokémon Human Shape. It is not common outside cold areas. This Pokémon is female-only. Its cries sound like human speech. However, it is impossible to tell what it is trying to say. The way it moves and talks induces others to dance. Abilità: Indifferenza, Premonizione.

Surskit.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #283. Categoria: Pokémon Pond Skater. Surskit secretes oil from its feet to skate on water. It may be found on ponds, lakes and puddles in towns. The tip of its head produces a delicious sugary syrup often used in desserts and sweets. Abilità: Nuotovelox, Copripioggia.

Ekans.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #023. Categoria: Pokémon Snake. It lives on grasslands, preying on Rattata and Pokemon Eggs it finds. It's jaw can detach itself to swallow any prey whole. It coils and sleeps after eating. Ekans grow larger and larger with every year they age. Abilità: Agitazione, Muta.

Cryogonal.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #615. Categoria: Pokémon Crystallizing. They are hatched from snow clouds. Using chains made of ice crystals, they capture prey. If their temperature goes up, they turns into steam and vanish until they can freeze and become ice again. Abilità: Levitazione.

Exeggcute.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #102. Categoria: Pokémon Egg. Even though it appears to be eggs of some sort, it is related more to a seed. It gathers in packs of six that have a mental link with each other. Each one of them has a different personality. Abilità: Clorofilla, Coglibacche.

Rotom (Dex Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #479. Categoria: Pokémon Plasma. A Pokédex possessed by a Rotom; it has access to all the information in the computer and uses its sounds to emulate speech. While in this form it can use the move 'Light Screen'. Abilità: Levitazione.

Quaquaval.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #914. Categoria: Pokémon Dancing. Their legs are incredibly powerful; do not underestimate their rhythmic dancing for their kicks can send a car rolling. They attract attention by spreading a beautiful tail made of water feathers. Abilità: Acquaiuto, Arroganza.

Tauros.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #128. Categoria: Pokémon Wild Bull. This is a male species. They travel in herds around the plains and fight each other by locking horns. The herd's protector takes pride in its battle-scarred horns. Miltank is the female of this species. Abilità: Prepotenza, Grancollera.

Tornadus (Therian Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #641. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. Some Pokémon reveal their true forms after recovering power lost to them. Great forces of nature can help them recover their strength, such as tornadoes, lightning, and even a landslide. Abilità: Rigenergia.

Wishiwashi.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #746. Categoria: Pokémon Small Fry. People and Pokémon enjoy this tiny Pokémon's meat. Their eyes shine as a distress signal: other members of its species will travel far and wide to attend the call for help. When this happens you must run. Abilità: Banco.

Joltik.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #595. Categoria: Pokémon Attaching. Since it can't generate its own charge, it sticks into larger Pokémon and absorbs the static electricity of their fur. In the cities they suck electricity from the outlets they find, skyrocketting the power bill. Abilità: Insettocchi, Agitazione.

Groudon.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #383. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . Described in mythology as the god creator of lands, mountains, volcanoes, and continents. Any water or clouds evaporate in its presence. It is the mortal enemy of Kyogre. Abilità: Siccità.

Chansey.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #113. Categoria: Pokémon Egg. There are only females in this species. Chansey lays a nutritious egg every day. These eggs are fed to the sick to give them strength. It is a loving and smart Pokémon, but it's pretty rare and elusive in the wild. Abilità: Alternacura, Leggiadro.

Regieleki.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #894. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. A myth tells the story of a titan that terrorized the world with its furious thunderstorms until it was restrained by some rings on its arms. Could the titan ever escape and unleash its full power again?. Abilità: Transistor.

Bibarel.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #400. Categoria: Pokémon Beaver. Bibarels build dams in streams with bark and mud. It is known as an industrious worker. Their constructions are very appreciated by people because a river dammed by Bibarel will never overflow. Abilità: Disinvoltura, Altalena.

Servine.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #496. Categoria: Pokémon Grass Snake. It moves by slithering along the ground. Its swift movements befuddle its foes before it attacks with a vine whip. It always keeps itself clean and it demands care from its trainer, otherwise it will misbehave. Abilità: Erbaiuto, Inversione.

Garchomp (Mega Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #445. Categoria: Pokémon Mach. The excess power from the Mega Stone melted its fins and claws together, forming sharp, dangerous scythes. If its disposition was already violent, it increases tenfold. They are feral and extremely vicious!. Abilità: Silicoforza.

Clauncher.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #692. Categoria: Pokémon Water Gun. They live on beaches and in shallow waters. They can knock down a flying prey by shooting water from their massive claws. Their meat is delicious, but their tough shell and demeanor keeps predators at bay. Abilità: Megalancio.

Garchomp.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #445. Categoria: Pokémon Mach. Garchomp are scarce in the wild and very dangerous. It folds its arms and uses its fins to fly extremely fast at low heights. Territorial and aggressive, it will not rest until it catches any daring trespasser. Abilità: Sabbiavelo, Cartavetro.

Ralts.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #280. Categoria: Pokémon Feeling. They sense the emotions of people and Pokémon, usually sharing the mood of anyone nearby. They show if they feel joy and cheer, but hide if they sense hostility. They dislike fighting and negativity. Abilità: Sincronismo, Traccia.

Klink.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #599. Categoria: Pokémon Gear. These two strange Pokémon are merged into one. Interlocking their bodies and spinning around will generate the energy they need to live. Their only way to communicate is through their eyes. Abilità: Più, Meno.

Sandaconda.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #844. Categoria: Pokémon Sand Snake. It has a sack that can carry up to 220 lbs of sand; the way it coils allows it to spray the sand at its foes. If its sack ever runs out of sand it becomes limp and depressed. They are unfriendly but not really aggressive. Abilità: Sputasabbia, Sabbiavelo.

Krookodile.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #553. Categoria: Pokémon Intimidation. A very violent Pokémon. They try to clamp down on anything that moves in front of their eyes, and once grasped, they never let the prey escape. It can be very dangerous if it's not tamed correctly. Abilità: Prepotenza, Arroganza.

Gible.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #443. Categoria: Pokémon Land Shark. It digs tunnels and follows prey while burrowed underground. If you see the fin on its back coming out of the ground, it means it is about to attack. It's very aggressive but kind of clumsy. Beware of its big jaws. Abilità: Sabbiavelo, Cartavetro.

Floette.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #670. Categoria: Pokémon Fairy. It flutters around flower meadows and takes care of buds that are starting to wilt. People who fill their gardens with its preferred flower receive its visit every spring. They are loyal and caring Pokémon. Abilità: Fiorvelo, Simbiosi.

Sealeo.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #364. Categoria: Pokémon Ball Roll. They play with the Spheal in the herd by spinning them with their noses. When they are not in the wild they'll spin almost any round object, even Pokéballs. Sealeo are great hunters underwater. Abilità: Corpogelo, Grassospesso.

Venomoth.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #049. Categoria: Pokémon Poison Moth. They are plentiful in forests but only come out at night. They possess an incredible eyesight and are attracted to light sources. Their wings scatter a toxic powder which they use to immobilize their prey. Abilità: Polvoscudo, Splendicute.

Tyrantrum.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #697. Categoria: Pokémon Despot. Nothing could stop this Pokémon 100 million years ago; it was a prehistoric king. Thanks to its giant jaws, which could shred thick metal plates as if they were paper, this Pokémon takes orders from no one. Abilità: Ferromascella, Testadura.

Pincurchin.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #871. Categoria: Pokémon Sea Urchin. This quiet Pokémon feeds on seaweed, using its teeth to scrape it off rocks. It stores electricity in each of its spines. Even if one gets broken off, it will continue to emit electricity for a few more hours. Abilità: Parafulmine, Elettrogenesi.

Morgrem.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #860. Categoria: Pokémon Devious. When it gets down on all fours as if to beg for forgiveness, it's trying to lure opponents in so that it can stab them with its spear-like hair. It lures people into the woods to rob them and get them lost. Abilità: Burla, Indagine.

Muk.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #089. Categoria: Pokémon Sludge. It gathers in polluted areas to eat filth. Its body is made of a powerful poison that kills any plant. Touching it can cause a fever that will require bed rest. A good diet may reduce Muk's toxicity. Abilità: Tanfo, Velentocco.

Rayquaza (Mega Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #384. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. What does the power of the Mega Stone truly entail? Is it the bond between a Trainer and their companion? Or is it all about taking hold of a forbidden power?. Abilità: Flusso Delta.

Quaxly.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #912. Categoria: Pokémon Tidy Duckling. Quaxley are known for their tidiness; their feathers are neatly combed and it hates when they get ruffled. Despite their small size, they are capable swimmers with strong legs to paddle their way upstream. Abilità: Acquaiuto, Arroganza.

Exploud.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #295. Categoria: Pokémon Loud Noise. It is said that some tremors are caused by the roars of this Pokémon. They communicate with soft noises, raising their voice only in battle. They can emit many different kinds of sounds. Abilità: Antisuono, Nervisaldi.

Shaymin.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #492. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. There are remains of gigantic trees that once grew all over the earth. They were called the 'Trees of Life' and it is believed they were all planted by a kind Pokémon who brought plants and flowers to life. Abilità: Alternacura.

Sinistea.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #854. Categoria: Pokémon Black Tea. This Pokémon is said to have been born when a lonely spirit possessed a cold, leftover cup of tea. It absorbs the life-force of those who drink it, but it tastes so bad that it gets spat out immediately. Abilità: Sottilguscio, Corpofunesto.

Cascoon.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #268. Categoria: Pokémon Cocoon. They hide between huge leaves and gaps between branches. If they were to move, their evolution would be weaker. Due to this, Cascoon will remain motionless. If Wurmple lives in a dark place, it evolves into Cascoon. Abilità: Muta.

Meltan.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #808. Categoria: Pokémon Hex Nut. They are elusive as they can liquefy their body to move through small cracks. They live in groups, but when the time comes, one strongest Meltan will absorb all the others and evolve into a giant. Abilità: Magnetismo.

Wormadam (Grass Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #413. Categoria: Pokémon Bagworm. When Burmy evolved, its Grass cloak became a part of its body. For this reason there are many variations in body and type. It is a calm Pokémon that loves flowers. This Pokémon is female-only. Abilità: Presagio, Copricapo.

Deerling.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #585. Categoria: Pokémon Season. They are hatched at the beginning of the spring. Their coloring changes according to the season and can be affected by temperature as well. It usually stays hidden in tall grass while its mother is away. Abilità: Clorofilla, Mangiaerba.

Gardevoir (Mega Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #282. Categoria: Pokémon Embrace. The power of the Mega Stone makes its senses skyrocket. It is easily upset as it can feel the emotions from everyone in a wide radius. Its psychic powers are said to distort reality. Abilità: Pellefolletto.

Shuppet.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #353. Categoria: Pokémon Puppet. They feed on dark emotions such as envy, jealousy, and vengefulness. If they sting you, they'll fill you with a vindictive desire. They don't have bodies under their blanket and they are looking for a body to possess. Abilità: Indagine, Insonnia.

Dipplin.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #1011. Categoria: Pokémon Candy Apple. There's actually two Pokémon living inside the candied apple, but they are very sweet to each other and don't mind sharing space. It is very unusual for Applin to evolve into this, as it requires a special apple. Abilità: Sciroppo Sublime.

Wo-Chien.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #1001. Categoria: Pokémon Ruinous. Possessed by the grudge of an author unfairly punished, these wooden tablets tell the story of an evil king from long ago. Its body of leaves drains the life-energy of all vegetation nearby, leaving barren wastelands behind. Abilità: Amuleto Nefasto.

Oddish.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #043. Categoria: Pokémon Weed. This Pokémon grows by absorbing moonlight. During daytime, it buries itself in the ground, leaving only its leaves exposed to avoid detection by its predators. You can locate it by the smell its leaves release. Abilità: Clorofilla, Fugafacile.

Togekiss.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #468. Categoria: Pokémon Jubilee. Sightings of these Pokémon have become rare nowadays. They used to visit peaceful regions, bringing gifts of kindness and blessings. But they appear to have vanished in these times of conflict. Abilità: Leggiadro, Supersorte.

Tatsugiri (Droopy Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #978. Categoria: Pokémon Mimicry. These small dragon Pokémon are very cunning: they hide inside the mouths of Dondozo, then feign weakness to lure prey and order their partner to attack. Red Tatsugiri focus on defensive tactics. Abilità: Torre di Comando, Acquascolo.

Lickilicky.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #463. Categoria: Pokémon Licking. It uses its tongue as a stretchable arm. It will wrap prey with it and then proceed to eat it. Its saliva causes numbness. Try not to touch its tongue as it might try to eat you by reflex. Abilità: Indifferenza, Antimeteo.

Litwick.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #607. Categoria: Pokémon Candle. Its flame is usually out, but it starts burning whenever it absorbs the life force from others. They trick lost people into thinking they are helping them find their way in the dark, but those who follow them never return. Abilità: Fuocardore, Corpodifuoco.

Manaphy.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #490. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . It is said that after the war for land and sea was over, a tiny Pokémon was born from the bottom of the ocean to bond with all the creatures as a sign of peace. Abilità: Idratazione.

Fennekin.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #653. Categoria: Pokémon Fox. This small and elusive Pokémon intimidates opponents by puffing hot air out of its ears. It likes to keep twigs and sticks nearby to munch on instead of snacks. They make good pets, but they are pretty rare. Abilità: Aiutofuoco, Prestigiatore.

Flittle.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #955. Categoria: Pokémon Frill. Surprisingly fast for their size. You can find them running around in the desert, using their psychic power to increase their speed. They have a reputation for relentlessly chasing after anyone taking berries from them. Abilità: Presagio, Indagine.

Mudbray.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #749. Categoria: Pokémon Donkey. They are very strong. The mud on their hooves serves them as grip to pull themselves forward. They enjoy prancing in muddy places and will become stubborn and disobedient if denied that pleasure. Abilità: Mente Locale, Sopportazione.

Samurott (Hisuian Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #503. Categoria: Pokémon Formidable. There are records of Samurott that roamed on the shores of the old land of Hisui. These Samurott were said to be cold-hearted and ruthless. They were seen as wandering warriors, until they were seen no more. Abilità: Acquaiuto, Guscioscudo.

Dondozo.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #977. Categoria: Pokémon Big Catfish. While big and imposing, they are lousy hunters and not very smart, so they have developed a symbiotic relationship with Tatsugiri, whom they treat as bosses. In exchange for protection, Tatsugiri help them get food. Abilità: Imprudenza, Idrovelo.

Eternatus (Eternamax Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #890. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . Evidence suggests it was not really a meteorite that fell on Galar so long ago, but a Pokémon. What creature could be so massive as to create such destruction upon impact?. Abilità: Pressione.

Bunnelby.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #659. Categoria: Pokémon Digging. It uses its ears as shovels; by digging holes, they strengthen enough to sever thick roots easily. They tend to reproduce quickly and a handful of them can ravage a vegetable field in just a few hours. Abilità: Raccolta, Guancegonfie.

Araquanid.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #752. Categoria: Pokémon Water Bubble. It's debated whether this is a caring or cruel Pokémon. It looks around for any vulnerable or weak Pokémon, tenderly carries them and deposits them into its water bubble where they end up drowning. Abilità: Bolladacqua, Assorbacqua.

Palossand.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #770. Categoria: Pokémon Sand Castle. The possessed people shaped this Pokémon into a castle. Buried beneath the sand where it stands are the remains of all its victims. Some say these unmarked graves will give birth to a new Sandygast. Abilità: Idrorinforzo, Sabbiavelo.

Galvantula.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #596. Categoria: Pokémon EleSpider. They employ an electrically-charged web to trap their prey. While it is immobilized by shock, they leisurely consume it. They usually live alone, but there have been cases of large swarms living together in caves. Abilità: Insettocchi, Aiutinsetto.

Farigiraf.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #981. Categoria: Pokémon Long Neck. The brain waves of the head and tail synch up, increasing its Psychic powers. The hardened head from its tail protects the main body when whipping its neck around to headbutt enemies. Abilità: Ruminante, Codarmatura.

Quilladin.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #651. Categoria: Pokémon Spiny Armor. It strengthens its lower body by running into hard things. It is a kind Pokémon that relies on its sturdy shell and sharp quills to deflect any foe trying to attack it. These easygoing Pokémon never start a fight. Abilità: Erbaiuto, Antiproiettile.

Spearow.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #021. Categoria: Pokémon Tiny Bird. It forms flocks living in grasslands. Very protective of its territory, it flaps its short wings to dart around at high speed. It is a little short-tempered; if disturbed, it will shriek, calling its flock for aid. Abilità: Sguardofermo, Cecchino.

Registeel.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #379. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. Its body was indestructible. A flexible metal came from out of this world and can shrink, expand, and become solid or liquid at the speed of thought. Could the myths be true?. Abilità: Corpochiaro, Metalleggero.

Fletchinder.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #662. Categoria: Pokémon Ember. From its beak, it expels embers to set tall grass on fire, then it pounces on the bewildered prey that pop out of the grass. Its body becomes engulfed in flames when it starts to battle. It is a fierce Pokémon. Abilità: Corpodifuoco, Aliraffica.

Qwilfish (Hisuian Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #211. Categoria: Pokémon Balloon. In ancient times, Qwilfish migrated to Hisuian regions to lay their eggs and evolve. People saw them as vermin, as they polluted their fishing waters. Overhunting happened and Qwilfish was forced to adapt. Abilità: Velenopunto, Prepotenza.

Staryu.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #120. Categoria: Pokémon Star Shape. They come out to the shore in great numbers when the sky is full with stars. The core at its center glows to communicate with others. If a part of its body is injured it can regrow it in a few days. Abilità: Risplendi, Alternacura.

Cetoddle.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #974. Categoria: Pokémon Terra Whale. Recent studies show they are close cousins to Wailmer. Unlike their sea relatives, the Cetoddle line started dwelling on land a long time ago. Frigid regions became the perfect habitat for these playful Pokémon. Abilità: Grassospesso, Mantelneve.

Swampert (Mega Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #260. Categoria: Pokémon Mud Fish. The power of the Mega Stone increases its muscle strength; it would appear to be slower, but its skin is so slippy it allows it to quickly slide over puddles and mud. It also becomes a bit bolder and moody. Abilità: Nuotovelox.

Snom.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #872. Categoria: Pokémon Worm. It spits out thread imbued with a frigid energy and uses it to tie its body to branches, disguising itself as an icicle while it sleeps. It feeds only on snow; if it melts, it will freeze it again to continue eating. Abilità: Polvoscudo, Geloscaglie.

Riolu.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #447. Categoria: Pokémon Emanation. Scarce in the wild, but it has been seen living in mountains. It has the ability to see auras; thanks to this it is capable of sensing emotions. It won't get close to those with evil or selfish intentions. Abilità: Forza Interiore, Burla.

Stakataka.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #805. Categoria: Aether Foundation Log #132. We are finally on the other side. It has been so exciting. What we thought were the ruins of an abandoned civilization turned out to be small sentient creatures that stacked on each other to create a large UB. Abilità: Ultraboost.

Vibrava.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #329. Categoria: Pokémon Vibration. This Pokémon's vibrations can cause severe headaches or even fainting. If their prey faints, they proceed to melt them with acid. Vibrava's wings are still growing, making it a clumsy flier with low endurance. Abilità: Levitazione.

Aegislash (Blade Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #681. Categoria: Pokémon Royal Sword. Vengance is a double-edged sword. Anyone who dares to wield this Pokémon will hear its treacherous whispers of bloodlust and carnage. While in this form it can only use Damaging Moves & Maneuvers. Abilità: Accendilotta.

Victini.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #494. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . On tournament days, Trainers eat a V-shaped apple as a charm for victory in the battles to come. It is unknown if it has anything to do with this Pokémon. Abilità: Vittorstella.

Bronzor.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #436. Categoria: Pokémon Bronze. They are found in ancient tombs and temples. Objects shaped like Bronzor have been found within the vaults. Bronzor reflect images like mirrors; people say that this reflection shows the future. Abilità: Levitazione, Antifuoco.

Bergmite.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #712. Categoria: Pokémon Ice Chunk. It lives in small herds close to the mountains. It blocks attacks with the ice that shields its body and uses cold air to repair any cracks with new ice. They are wary of humans as they rarely get to see one. Abilità: Corpogelo, Mente Locale.

Sinistcha (Unremarkable Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #1013. Categoria: Pokémon Matcha. It haunts the back of the tea shelves, as it prefers cool and dry places. It disguises itself as a hot beverage to drain the life force of those who may drink it, but most people spit it out due to its bitter taste. Abilità: Ospitalità, Antifuoco.

Electrode (Hisuian Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #101. Categoria: Pokémon Ball. Hundreds of years ago, Electrode used to bear resemblance to the apricorn fruits used to build the first Pokéballs. They were prone to mood swings. The modern counterparts are way more relaxed. Abilità: Statico, Scoppio.

Tympole.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #535. Categoria: Pokémon Tadpole. After a heavy rainfall, they'll appear in great numbers in marshes and ponds. They warn others of danger and predators by vibrating their cheeks to create a high-pitched sound. Abilità: Nuotovelox, Idratazione.

Paras.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #046. Categoria: Pokémon Mushroom. Paras has two parasitic mushrooms growing on its back. They grow large by drawing nutrients from this Bug Pokémon. They are valued as a medicine for prolonging life. Paras can be found in humid areas. Abilità: Spargispora, Umidità.

Druddigon.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #621. Categoria: Pokémon Cave. It runs through the narrow tunnels dug by Excadrill and Onix and uses its sharp claws to catch prey. It is cold-blooded, and regularly takes sun baths to keep its energy. They are aggressive and territorial. Abilità: Cartavetro, Forzabruta.

Archen.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #566. Categoria: Pokémon First Bird. Revived from a fossil, this Pokémon is thought to be the ancestor of all bird Pokémon. Its flight abilities are poor so it just hops and jumps. They are ill-tempered and will not eat processed Pokémon food. Abilità: Sconforto.

Froslass.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #478. Categoria: Pokémon Snow Land. This Pokémon is female-only. Legends in snowy regions say that a woman who was lost on an icy mountain was reborn as Froslass. It appears during blizzards to take lost people away. Abilità: Mantelneve, Corpofunesto.

Togetic.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #176. Categoria: Pokémon Happiness. Although there have been very few sightings of this Pokémon in the wild, it is known to appear before kind-hearted people and grant them happiness. It is very energetic and friendly. Abilità: Leggiadro, Supersorte.

Emolga.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #587. Categoria: Pokémon Sky Squirrel. They live on treetops, gliding around with the membrane between their limbs. They discharge electricity to defend against other Pokémon. They carry nuts and berries back to their nest to eat during the winter. Abilità: Statico, Elettrorapid.

Varoom.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #965. Categoria: Pokémon Single-Cyl. It is believed this Pokémon came to life after an unknown poison Pokémon entered and inspirited an old scrap engine. It uses rocks and minerals to shape itself some wheels, but it can attach itself to small vehicles. Abilità: Copricapo, Lentoinizio.

Kubfu.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #891. Categoria: Pokémon Wushu. This little but fierce Pokémon takes its training very seriously. Every day it trains a little longer than the day before. The Moves it masters during this stage will determine the way it evolves. Abilità: Forza Interiore.

Skitty.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #300. Categoria: Pokémon Kitten. They are fascinated by moving objects, even chasing their own tail without hesitation. They are cute by nature, and popular pets, but it's hard to earn their trust in the wild. They are quite affectionate. Abilità: Normalità, Incantevole.

Voltorb.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #100. Categoria: Pokémon Ball. They live near factories and electric generators. It bears an uncanny and unexplained resemblance to a Poké Ball. Since it explodes at the slightest provocation, even veteran trainers treat it with caution. Abilità: Statico, Antisuono.

Eelektross.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #604. Categoria: Pokémon EleFish. They crawl out of the water and attack anyone on shore by sucking them into their mouths, shocking them, and dragging them back into the ocean. They are aggressive and unpredictable, be very careful. Abilità: Levitazione.

Dracovish.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #882. Categoria: Pokémon Fossil. The DNA of two apex predators combined. It can run at incredibly high speeds and tear almost anything with its sharp teeth. Sadly, this Pokémon can only breathe underwater and it's a lousy swimmer. Abilità: Assorbacqua, Ferromascella.

Genesect.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #649. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . Fossil revival is now possible with our incredible technology. Recently, some researchers sparked a controversial debate by altering the original forms of the revived Pokémon through artificial means. Abilità: Download.

Golem.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #076. Categoria: Pokémon Megaton. It is rare to see in the wild since it lives high in the mountains. It withdraws its head and legs as if it were a turtle to roll around. There have been cases of Golem that resist dynamite blasts unscathed. Abilità: Testadura, Vigore.

Kommo-o.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #784. Categoria: Pokémon Scaly. It completed its harsh training and returns to the mountain where it was born to look after the young Jangmo-o, watching them from afar. It is constantly looking for strong opponents. Abilità: Antiproiettile, Antisuono.

Deoxys (Speed Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #386. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . The first officer mentioned a slim creature that moved too fast for the radar to register and the eye to see. She saw it for a split second before it supposedly attacked the other end of the ship. Abilità: Pressione.

Dhelmise.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #781. Categoria: Pokémon Sea Creeper. A spirit adrift in the sea came back to life through this Pokémon. It rarely leaves the deepest bottom waters. Sailing through the far seas, Wailord carcasses have been found covered in seaweed and gashes. Abilità: Tempracciaio.

Pidgeot.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #018. Categoria: Pokémon Bird. This Pokémon's plumage is made of beautiful, glossy feathers. Pidgeot is an excellent hunter with well-developed wing muscles that make it strong enough to whip up a gusty windstorm with just a few flaps. Abilità: Sguardofermo, Pettinfuori.

Medicham.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #308. Categoria: Pokémon Meditate. They are thought to posses a sixth sense. Some of them can hide their presence by lowering their ki. Medicham fight with expert yoga moves, foretelling their foe's attacks and sensing their thoughts. Abilità: Forzapura, Telepatia.

Nidoking.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #034. Categoria: Pokémon Drill. It is recognized by its rock-hard hide and its extended horn. Be careful with the horn as it contains venom. There are records of one trampling and destroying a radio tower that was being built on his territory. Abilità: Velenopunto, Forzabruta.

Polteageist.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #855. Categoria: Pokémon Black Tea. This species lives in old ceramic teapots. They struggle to find real antiques, for most tea sets nowadays are just imitations. Never leave your tea unattended or a Poltegeist might come to haunt it. Abilità: Sottilguscio, Corpofunesto.
