Drifloon.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #425. Categoria: Pokémon Balloon. A Pokémon formed by the spirits of lost people and Pokémon. Children who mistake it for a real balloon often end up missing. Because it floats aimlessly, an old folktale calls it the 'Signpost for Wandering Spirits.'. Abilità: Scoppio, Agiltecnica.

Gengar (Mega Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #094. Categoria: Pokémon Shadow. With the power of the Mega Stone, Gengar can now teleport through dimensions. Whatever horrors it witnesses there make it try to curse anything or anyone it perceives as prey, even its beloved trainer!. Abilità: Pedinombra.

Clefable.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #036. Categoria: Pokémon Fairy. There are not many records about it in the wild. They are timid but playful. Clefable uses its wings to skip lightly as if it was flying. Its bouncy step lets it walk on water. On quiet, moonlit nights, it strolls near quiet lakes. Abilità: Incantevole, Magicscudo.

Perrserker.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #863. Categoria: Pokémon Viking. What appears to be an iron helmet is actually hardened hair. Unlike other Meowth evolutions, Perrserker does not want riches and luxury; it enjoys battles, the outdoors, and traveling though the sea. Abilità: Spiritoferreo, Unghiedure.

Totodile.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #158. Categoria: Pokémon Big Jaw. Despite its small body, Totodile's jaws are very powerful. While it may think it is just playfully nipping, its bite has enough strength to cause a serious injury. It needs proper discipline to control its biting urges. Abilità: Acquaiuto, Forzabruta.

Bellsprout.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #069. Categoria: Pokémon Flower. They live in hot and humid places, blending in with the flora. It is carnivorous and will try to eat anything smaller than itself. It digests its prey with an acid substance in its mouth. Abilità: Clorofilla, Voracità.

Xurkitree.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #796. Categoria: Aether Foundation Log #067. My superiors are furious. A lot of money had to be used to cover the damages UB-03 dealt in the power plant. On the bright side, it seems a lot livelier now that it appears to have recharged. Abilità: Ultraboost.

Grafaiai.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #945. Categoria: Pokémon Toxic Monkey. Their saliva is poisonous, and it changes color depending on their diet. They use this colorful saliva to paint over trees and surfaces. Once they're set on a pattern, they'll draw it all over to mark their territory. Abilità: Velentocco, Burla.

Tornadus.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #641. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. Unova suffers from terrible tornadoes and devastating wind currents that leave houses and buildings in ruins. Some people claim a Pokémon riding the winds is responsible for all the devastation. Abilità: Burla, Agonismo.

Vanillite.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #582. Categoria: Pokémon Fresh Snow. These Pokémon were born from icicles bathed in the energy of the morning sun. It uses snow to cover its head and protect it from melting. They are playful and love to make snow fall around them. Abilità: Corpogelo, Mantelneve.

Finizen.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #963. Categoria: Pokémon Dolphin. These friendly Pokémon can often be found playing with others of their kind. They can sense the emotions of other living creatures, and thus are always helping distressed people and Pokémon in the sea. Abilità: Idrovelo.

Pecharunt.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #1025. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. The most famous legend in Kitakami tells about how three Pokémon and their master defeated an ogre. Through a sweet peach mochi, the master granted gifts to those who sacrificed their freedom. Abilità: Marionetta Tossica.

Braviary.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #628. Categoria: Pokémon Valiant. Brave, strong, loyal, and selfless; this Pokémon embodies the virtues of what a Pokémon companion should be. They are very rare and valued not only for their bravery but also for their beautiful feathers. Abilità: Sguardofermo, Agonismo.

Nidoqueen.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #031. Categoria: Pokémon Drill. Motherly by nature, it uses its scaly rugged body to seal the entrance of its nest and protect its young from predators. There are records of angry Nidoqueen sending people flying with a single tackle. Abilità: Velenopunto, Forzabruta.

Terrakion.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #639. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. Legends in Unova tell about four Pokémon that rebelled against the unfair ruler. One of them trampled through the castle walls, destroying the fortress to free the trapped Pokémon inside. Abilità: Giustizia.

Aegislash.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #681. Categoria: Pokémon Royal Sword. A legend tells of how this Pokémon led the first King of Kalos to victory. While it blocks any damage to the flesh of its wielder, their soul is not so lucky. While in this form it can only use Support Moves & Maneuvers. Abilità: Accendilotta.

Swinub.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #220. Categoria: Pokémon Pig. They rub their snout on the icy ground to find food and hot springs. Their favorite food is a mushroom that grows under frozen grass. They recognize everything by smell as their eyes can't see very well. Abilità: Indifferenza, Mantelneve.

Darmanitan (Galarian Zen Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #555. Categoria: Pokémon Zen Charm. When Darmanitan gets angry, its atrophied fire core is reignited. This Pokémon breathes fire and destroys everything in its path. They must be calmed down or their own heat may melt their body. Abilità: Stato Zen.

Croagunk.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #453. Categoria: Pokémon Toxic Mouth. It is commonly found in marshes. It inflates the sacks on its cheeks and makes croaking sounds. The fluid squeezed from its fingers is poisonous, but it is a common ingredient for medicinal ointments. Abilità: Presagio, Pellearsa.

Oricorio (Pom-Pom Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #741. Categoria: Pokémon Dancing. What was thought to be different species ended up being a single Pokémon. Oricorio Pom-Pom is full of cheer and energy. It charges its feathers with static electricity, releasing sparks with every swing. Abilità: Sincrodanza.

Pikipek.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #731. Categoria: Pokémon Woodpecker. Their beaks are incredibly strong, it takes them a few minutes to shatter rock. They eat berries and shoot the seeds to defend themselves. Pikipek don't sing, but communicate with pecking sounds. Abilità: Sguardofermo, Raccolta.

Cherrim.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #421. Categoria: Pokémon Blossom. Cherrim bloom during times of strong sunlight, their petals open fully and radiant. If the sun is not visible, it will remain as a closed bud, barely moving, trying to preserve its energy, mistakenly labeled as shy. Abilità: Regalfiore.

Glaceon.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #471. Categoria: Pokémon Fresh Snow. Eevee that are forced to live in freezing temperatures evolve into Glaceon. It can control its body temperature to below zero, freezing its fur and making it harden as if it were diamond crystals. Abilità: Mantelneve, Corpogelo.

Banette.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #354. Categoria: Pokémon Marionette. Its body is usually a discarded doll or toy. Its spirit is made of dark feelings and is overrun by the desire of revenge towards the kid that threw the toy away. If you open its mouth, all the cursed energy will escape. Abilità: Indagine, Corpofunesto.

Quagsire.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #195. Categoria: Pokémon Water Fish. You'll find its home at the bottom of the river. It hunts by leaving its mouth wide open in water and waiting for its prey to get in. Because it doesn't move a lot, it does not get very hungry. Abilità: Assorbacqua, Imprudenza.

Reshiram.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #643. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. An incredibly old scroll written in an ancient language tells about a world of truth built by a purifying fire. It also tells about a big dispute between two brothers. The rest of the scroll was burned... Abilità: Piroturbina.

Rhydon.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #112. Categoria: Pokémon Drill. It has a horn that serves as a drill for destroying rocks and boulders. Rhydon occasionally goes for a swim in rivers and even magma pools. Its great resistance prevents it from taking any damage. Abilità: Testadura, Parafulmine.

Illumise.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #314. Categoria: Pokémon Firefly. They attract swarms of Volbeat with their sweet fragrance and organize the swarm into drawing geometric shapes made of light. Illumise gain rank in their group if they make an amazing performance. Abilità: Indifferenza, Lentifumé.

Avalugg (Hisuian Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #713. Categoria: Pokémon Iceberg. Avalugg have shown great levels of adaptability through the centuries. If temperature lowers to a freezing point, so will they. When the ice caps melt they return to land-dwelling, crushing their way trough solid rocks. Abilità: Ferromascella, Vigore.

Meloetta.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #648. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . There are old songs about a beautiful Pokémon that inspired the hearts of artists through its graceful dance and singing. Abilità: Leggiadro.

Raboot.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #814. Categoria: Pokémon Rabbit. This Pokémon loves to kick and trains each day to get better at it. Its fur is now very thick; some debate it is to protect it from the cold weather, while others say it is to produce hotter flames. Abilità: Aiutofuoco, Libero.

Sandile.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #551. Categoria: Pokémon Desert Croc. They live hidden under the desert sands with only their eyes and nostrils visible. They don't prey on anything bigger than themselves but can be troublesome if they are being lead by one of their evolved forms. Abilità: Prepotenza, Arroganza.

Marowak.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #105. Categoria: Pokémon Bone Keeper. Its rough past has hardened its heart. Now tenacious and violent, this Pokémon will use its bone club as a weapon against foes. Marowak's den is usually full of the bones it has collected. Abilità: Testadura, Parafulmine.

Gholdengo.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #1000. Categoria: Pokémon Coin Entity. Its sturdy body and surfing board is made of pure gold. This Pokémon gets along well with others and is quick to make friends. Loose change is left behind wherever Gholdengo has engaged in combat. Abilità: Corpo Aureo.

Nidoran M.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #032. Categoria: Pokémon Poison Pin. The male Nidoran has developed a great alertness to sounds. Its small body is covered in spikes that are drenched in venom when he’s threatened. He will defend his mate and home fiercely. Abilità: Velenopunto, Antagonismo.

Runerigus.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #867. Categoria: Pokémon Grudge. A powerful curse was woven into an ancient rune painting. The spirit of Yamask is absorbed by this curse and it evolves into a Runerigus. Do not touch the shadow parts of its body or you'll see terrible visions of the past. Abilità: Anima Errante.

Bronzong.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #437. Categoria: Pokémon Bronze Bell. Ancient people revered Bronzong for bringing the rain and sun at will. One became a news sensation recently when it was dug up at a construction site after a 2000-year sleep. Abilità: Levitazione, Antifuoco.

Swampert.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #260. Categoria: Pokémon Mud Fish. They have an incredible sight that allows them to see in muddy water. They nest in beaches, and shield their young with their strong arms. When a storm is coming, Swampert build a fort with big rocks. Abilità: Acquaiuto, Nuotovelox.

Baxcalibur.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #998. Categoria: Pokémon Ice Dragon. The cryogenic air blasted from Baxcalibur's mouth is so cold it can freeze even lava. It launches itself into battle by flipping upside down to release its frigid breath and finishes off opponents with its dorsal blade. Abilità: Corpogelo, Termoscambio.

Litleo.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #667. Categoria: Pokémon Lion Cub. Quick on temper and to take on a fight. They use their mane to scorch their enemies. Some of them set off from their pride to live alone. Only those who develop a full mane get to lead their own pride. Abilità: Antagonismo, Agitazione.

Hydreigon.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #635. Categoria: Pokémon Brutal. This brutal Pokémon soars in the night sky. If it sees anything moving, that will trigger its aggression. The heads on its arms do not have brains. They use all three heads to consume and destroy everything. Abilità: Levitazione.

Golduck.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #055. Categoria: Pokémon Duck. A Golduck is a very good swimmer and can be found near most bodies of water. Its forehead shimmers with light when using its psychic abilities. There are records of wild Golduck that rescued people in the water. Abilità: Antimeteo, Nuotovelox.

Tinkatuff.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #958. Categoria: Pokémon Hammer. They form packs and hunt Pawniard and Bisharp for their metal. The metal scraps make their homes and strengthen their hammers. They like to test the strength of each other's hammers to determine a leader. Abilità: Mente Locale, Arraffalesto.

Relicanth.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #369. Categoria: Pokémon Longevity. It has remained unchanged for millions of years. Relicanth was discovered in a deep sea expedition. It feeds on plankton. Their scales are like craggy rocks; they can endure the pressure of the deep sea. Abilità: Testadura, Nuotovelox.

Annihilape.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #979. Categoria: Pokémon Rage Monkey. Its immense rage would never let this Pokémon rest in peace. So, even from beyond it keeps its wrath burning as a shadowy flame. Stay away, for its fists are said to crush the very soul of its victims. Abilità: Spiritovivo, Forza Interiore.

Empoleon.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #395. Categoria: Pokémon Emperor. They are regal and arrogant. Their beaks slice apart the drifting ice while swimming as fast as a jet boat. They avoid unnecessary fights, but will crush and cleave anyone that hurts or threatens their pride. Abilità: Acquaiuto, Agonismo.

Amaura.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #698. Categoria: Pokémon Tundra. This ancient Pokémon was restored from part of its body that had been frozen for over 100 million years. This calm Pokémon lived in cold lands where violent predators like Tyrantrum couldn't reach it. Abilità: Pellegelo, Scendineve.

Luvdisc.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #370. Categoria: Pokémon Rendezvous. Luvdisc is a symbol of romance. It lives in shallow seas, swimming after couples, bringing them closer and promising eternal love. During their spawning season, the waters around them turn pink. Abilità: Nuotovelox, Idratazione.

Drednaw.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #834. Categoria: Pokémon Bite. It stays immobile near rivers and lakes, disguised as a rock until it snaps at an unsuspecting prey. Once something is trapped by its sharp teeth there is no way to take it out as it is incredibly stubborn. Abilità: Ferromascella, Nuotovelox.

Ponyta.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #077. Categoria: Pokémon Fire Horse. It's not very common to see one stay still for more than a few seconds. Soon after it's born, its flames begin to burn. It is weak at first, but soon begins to develop a great speed chasing after its parents. Abilità: Fugafacile, Fuocardore.

Glalie.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #362. Categoria: Pokémon Face. Its body is so hard it was thought to be made of rock. They can be aggressive if provoked. When they hunt, they freeze their prey solid before eating it. They can live in warm places without trouble. Abilità: Corpogelo, Altalena.

Pangoro.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #675. Categoria: Pokémon Daunting. Although this Pokémon has a violent temperament, it won't put up with bullying. It charges ahead and slams its opponents like a berserker, totally disregarding its own safety. Its mighty arms can send you flying. Abilità: Ferropugno, Rompiforma.

Hariyama.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #297. Categoria: Pokémon Arm Thrust. They may appear fat, but they are pure muscle. Hariyama have the habit of challenging big-looking creatures to tests of strength, sometimes mistaking cars and machines for real Pokémon. Abilità: Dentistretti, Forzabruta.

Toxel.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #848. Categoria: Pokémon Baby. Toxel secrete poison through their skin. The closer they are to evolving, the brighter their skin color becomes. They need a lot of nurturing but are bad-tempered and ill-mannered, so not many take the task. Abilità: Paura, Statico.

Pinsir (Mega Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #127. Categoria: Pokémon Stag Beetle. With the power of the Mega Stone, it develops wings and inhuman strength. It can lift foes heavier than itself and still fly with ease. Its mind is in a constant state of excitement and it cannot stay still. Abilità: Pellecielo.

Marshtomp.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #259. Categoria: Pokémon Mud Fish. A sticky film allows them to live out of water. They are seen playing in the mud at beaches to rehydrate their dry bodies. They are slow runners and swimmers but they can be fast sliding through the mud. Abilità: Acquaiuto, Nuotovelox.

Rapidash (Galarian Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #078. Categoria: Pokémon Unique Horn. Those with evil in their hearts will be disdained by this proud and beautiful Pokémon as it dashes on the air using its psychic power. It is said that only a true princess can mount a Galarian Rapidash. Abilità: Fugafacile, Pastelvelo.

Camerupt (Mega Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #323. Categoria: Pokémon Eruption. The power of the Mega Stone melts its two humps into a single one. The single hump is heavier, making it slower, but its newly-renewed attitude makes the hump erupt in heavy bursts of molten lava. Abilità: Forzabruta.

Torterra.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #389. Categoria: Pokémon Continent. Torterra travel in groups, mistaken as moving forests. Many Pokémon make their nest on its back and live there for their entire lives. Ancient people thought that they lived on the back of a giant Torterra. Abilità: Erbaiuto, Guscioscudo.

Croconaw.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #159. Categoria: Pokémon Big Jaw. This Pokémon is really tenacious. Once it bites something it won't let go until it tears it down - even if its trainer is ordering to let go. If it loses any of its fangs, they'll regrow in a few days. It's a very wild Pokémon. Abilità: Acquaiuto, Forzabruta.

Feraligatr.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #160. Categoria: Pokémon Big Jaw. While in the water, it opens its big jaw to intimidate anyone coming close. Whenever it bites, it shakes its head and savagely rolls to tear up its prey. It is a very dangerous Pokémon. Approach with caution. Abilità: Acquaiuto, Forzabruta.

Geodude.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #074. Categoria: Pokémon Rock. Lives in mountains and caves. It looks indistinguishable from other rocks around. Because of this, many trainers step on them and are attacked. It rolls to move around and eats whatever it finds on the ground. Abilità: Testadura, Vigore.

Kricketot.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #401. Categoria: Pokémon Cricket. If you hear a xylophone-like sound at night, it means that this Pokémon is roaming close. It communicates by making rhythmic sounds with its antennae. It is not aggressive and feeds on honey and tree sap. Abilità: Muta, Fugafacile.

Krokorok.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #552. Categoria: Pokémon Desert Croc. The protective membranes shield their eyes from sandstorms and allow them to see in the dark. They can be aggressive and territorial and love to destroy things with their fangs. Abilità: Prepotenza, Arroganza.

Shiftry.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #275. Categoria: Pokémon Wicked. Feared as protectors of the forest. They are said to live atop towering trees dating back thousands of years, creating terrible wind storms. It is said they can read people's minds to prey on their fears. Abilità: Clorofilla, Sveglialampo.

Steelix (Mega Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #208. Categoria: Pokémon Iron Snake. With the power of the Mega Stone, its body goes through so much pressure that part of it becomes diamond crystals. Its defense is almost unbreakable, but its temper is short and it's easily angered. Abilità: Silicoforza.

Comfey.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #764. Categoria: Pokémon Posy Picker. This tiny Pokémon gathers flowers and connects them to itself forming a ring. The flowers never wither and their aroma is truly therapeutic. If it likes you it will create a flower ring just for you. Abilità: Fiorvelo, Primacura.

Wobbuffet.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #202. Categoria: Pokémon Patient. Wobbuffet looks somewhat deflated until it senses an aggressor, then it inflates. It will do nothing besides endure and counter attacks. It always keeps its black tail hidden; the reasons are still a mystery. Abilità: Pedinombra, Telepatia.

Woobat.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #527. Categoria: Pokémon Bat. It lives in dark forests and caves. It emits ultrasonic waves from its nose to learn about its surroundings. The two small eyes it has are covered by its own fur. It clings to trees and cave walls to sleep at night. Abilità: Imprudenza, Impaccio.

Pupitar.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #247. Categoria: Pokémon Hard Shell. Even in their shell, they are fast, aggressive, and extremely destructive. They never stay still. This pupa propels itself using a jet of pressurized gas. It is bad-tempered. Abilità: Muta.

Altaria (Mega Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #334. Categoria: Pokémon Humming. The power of the Mega Stone awakens a part of it full of wonder. Mega-Altaria can be benevolent or ruthless depending on who they are dealing with. Its lush cloud-wings turn dark whenever it gets angry. Abilità: Pellefolletto.

Shedinja.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #292. Categoria: Pokémon Shed. On extremely rare occasions, when Nincada evolves, the empty husk comes to life. They don't move, they only float unnaturally around. It is said that it will steal the soul of anyone looking directly at them. Abilità: Magidifesa.

Wigglytuff.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #040. Categoria: Pokémon Balloon. Its fur is extremely fine and conveys an image of luxury. Its body is soft and rubbery. When angered, it will suck the air and inflate itself to an enormous size. It is a favorite pet and a nurse Pokémon. Abilità: Incantevole, Tenacia.

Hitmonchan.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #107. Categoria: Pokémon Punching. It specializes in punching as fast as it can. Using a corkscrew motion, it can even drill through concrete with its bare hands. This Pokémon takes its training very seriously. It's very rare to see one in the wild. Abilità: Sguardofermo, Ferropugno.

Frogadier.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #657. Categoria: Pokémon Bubble Frog. It is incredibly hard to catch. It starts practicing its skills by throwing foam-covered pebbles at foes. Many trainers find this rebellious stage very challenging to handle and end up being its targets of practice. Abilità: Acquaiuto, Mutatipo.

Chimecho.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #358. Categoria: Pokémon Wind Chime. They have seven different cries that resound with the wind. They can create ultrasonic waves when they are in danger. Using the suction cup on their head, they hang to branches on windy days. Abilità: Levitazione.

Ting-Lu.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #1003. Categoria: Pokémon Ruinous. A ritual vessel given life by the fear of those who were sacrificed. It created a body through its control of the earth. A touch of the cursed container is enough to split the ground with deep and dangerous fissures. Abilità: Vaso Nefasto.

Poltchageist (Artisan Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #1012. Categoria: Pokémon Matcha. This Pokémon haunts high quality tea caddies. It can leave traces of its own body powder on food and beverages to suck the life of those who so much as lick it. Although similar, it's unrelated to Sinistea. Abilità: Ospitalità, Antifuoco.

Archaludon.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #1018. Categoria: Pokémon Alloy. The metal alloy its body is made of is very light but incredibly resistant. It feeds on electricity, its tall size attracting lightning during storms. They can also be found digging in deep caves. Abilità: Sopportazione, Vigore.

Palkia.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #484. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . An old scroll describes a being who is capable of bending and twisting space in impossible ways by a powerful Pokémon god. Abilità: Pressione, Telepatia.

Vileplume.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #045. Categoria: Pokémon Flower. It lives in marshlands and jungles where it's often mistaken for local flora. The air around a Vileplume turns yellow with the powder it releases as it walks. The pollen is highly toxic and causes paralysis. Abilità: Clorofilla, Spargispora.

Kingambit.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #983. Categoria: Pokémon Big Blade. Only a Bisharp able to face an army can evolve into Kingambit. While it commands a legion of followers, it's not skilled at devising complex strategies, seeking to win through brute strength alone. Abilità: Generale Supremo, Pressione.

Cufant.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #878. Categoria: Pokémon Copperderm. If a job requires serious strength, this Pokémon will excel at it. Its copper body tarnishes in the rain, turning a vibrant green color. Its trunk is specially designed to dig the ground; in the wild they uproot trees to eat. Abilità: Forzabruta, Metalpesante.

Spewpa.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #665. Categoria: Pokémon Scatterdust. It remains hidden inside old logs. When predators attack, it quickly bristles the fur covering its body to scare them. Bird Pokémon have a hard time trying to eat it with all the dust it releases as protection. Abilità: Muta.

Sunflora.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #192. Categoria: Pokémon Sun. Sunflora live in flower patches. They convert solar energy into nutrition and are highly active in the warm daytime but suddenly stop moving as soon as the sun sets, closing their petals to cover their face. Abilità: Clorofilla, Solarpotere.

Doublade.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #680. Categoria: Pokémon Sword. Both swords share a telepathic link to coordinate attacks and slash their enemies to shreds. They feed on the rage of their wielder and promise to make them unbeatable at the cost of their flesh and soul. Abilità: Nullodifesa.

Zygarde 50%.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #718. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . Underground tunnels have been found all over the Kalos Region. There are rumors of a creature that lives in them that attacks people damaging the ecosystem. Abilità: Frangiaura, Sciamefusione.

Purugly.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #432. Categoria: Pokémon Tiger Cat. It becomes wilder and aggressive after evolving. It is known to claim other Pokémon nests as its own. It will make itself appear bigger and glare with piercing eyes to achieve dominance over someone. Abilità: Grassospesso, Agonismo.

Zamazenta (Crown Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #889. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . There is a legend about a mighty shield able to deflect any attack. It became known as the Fighting Master's Shield; not even the largest creatures could go through it. Abilità: Scudo Saldo.

Roselia.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #315. Categoria: Pokémon Thorn. They live among rose bushes, shooting sharp poisonous thorns to anyone who tries to steal one of their flowers. Their aroma brings serenity. They need clean water to grow beautiful. Abilità: Alternacura, Velenopunto.

Regigigas.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #486. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. A very old legend tells about the King of Giants, who could crush a mountain with its grip and mold living titans from the rubble. Abilità: Lentoinizio.

Milcery.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #868. Categoria: Pokémon Cream. This Pokémon was born from sweet-smelling particles in the air; its body is made of cream. Finding one in your kitchen means good fortune. Give them berries and whip them with a whisk so they can evolve. Abilità: Dolcevelo, Aromavelo.

Shelmet.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #616. Categoria: Pokémon Snail. When attacked, it defends itself by closing the lid of its shell or spits a sticky, poisonous liquid. It competes with Karrablast for food and shelter. If it loses its shell, the distress may kill it; only those who survive evolve. Abilità: Copricapo, Guscioscudo.

Furfrou.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #676. Categoria: Pokémon Poodle. Historically, these Pokémon were the designated guardians of the kings. They are popular pets now and people love to trim their fur into exotic hairstyles. But, their protective nature has never been lost. Abilità: Foltopelo.

Falinks.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #870. Categoria: Pokémon Formation. It is formed by six of them: five are troopers, and one is the brass. The brass's orders are absolute to the others. They work as a perfect team and can rearrange their formation to better suit them in battle. Abilità: Lottascudo, Agonismo.

Florges.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #671. Categoria: Pokémon Garden. In times long past, castle rulers would invite Florges to create flower gardens to embellish their domains. Florges claim beautiful meadows as their territories, but they are kind and merciful with visitors. Abilità: Fiorvelo, Simbiosi.

Palkia (Origin Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #484. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . Religious lore talks about Arceus' thirdborn, the ruler of matter and space. The creator made its children in its image. Slightly less powerful as to not repeat the mistake of its destructive firstborn. Abilità: Pressione, Telepatia.

Tirtouga.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #564. Categoria: Pokémon Prototurtle. About 100 million years ago, these Pokémon swam in oceans. It is thought they also went on land to attack prey. One has been cloned from a fossil that was found a mile deep underwater. Abilità: Solidroccia, Vigore.

Gimmighoul (Chest Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #999. Categoria: Pokémon Coin Chest. This Pokémon is said to have been born inside a treasure chest long ago. It sucks the life-force out of any scoundrels who try to steal the treasure. Sometimes it gets left in pawn shops since few realize it's a Pokémon. Abilità: Paura.

Popplio.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #728. Categoria: Pokémon Sea Lion. A fun-loving Pokémon. It snorts water bubbles from its nose and balances them. It is tenacious and diligent to train. They are agile swimmers and prefer acrobatic stunts to move on the ground. Abilità: Acquaiuto, Idrovoce.

Darmanitan (Galarian Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #555. Categoria: Pokémon Zen Charm. The Galarian form of Darmanitan. They walk into towns during blizzards to steal food. Darmanitans may seem mean, but they are gentle and shy creatures who help stranded explorers. Abilità: Vigorilla, Stato Zen.

Solgaleo.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #791. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. There are legends about a being who radiated as if it was the sun made flesh. This radiant Pokémon made its light shine for all living things. On its forehead, a third eye linking it to another dimension. Abilità: Metalprotezione.

Mr. Rime.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #866. Categoria: Pokémon Comedian. It's highly skilled at tap-dancing. It waves its cane of ice in time. Its amusing movements make it very popular and it loves to entertain children. It releases all of its psychic power from the pattern on its belly. Abilità: Intricopiedi, Annullabarriere.

Skuntank.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #435. Categoria: Pokémon Skunk. It sprays a reeking fluid from its tail. The fluid smells worse the longer it is allowed to fester. It is vulnerable to attacks that come from above due to its exuberant tail. When it's relaxed it doesn't smell bad. Abilità: Scoppio, Tanfo.

Kyogre.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #382. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . Kyogre is named in mythology as the god who expanded the seas and oceans with torrential waters and huge tidal waves. It is the mortal enemy of Groudon. Abilità: Piovischio.

Ferrothorn.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #598. Categoria: Pokémon Thorn Pod. It attaches itself to cave ceilings by swinging around its spiky feelers. It shoots spikes at targets passing beneath. It is incredibly resilient and stubborn; it will whip you if you try to take its spot in the cave walls. Abilità: Spineferrate, Presagio.

Zygarde Cell.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #718. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . Only the the cores react to stimuli; the cells remain mostly inanimate. They gather in great numbers to create and strengthen Zygarde. Abilità: Sciamefusione.

Iron Moth.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #994. Categoria: Pokémon Paradox. A remotely-controlled drone designed to look like Volcarona. Created by an unknown alien race, it's been sent here in order to monitor our world and civilization. Abilità: Carica Quark.

Magmar.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #126. Categoria: Pokémon Spitfire. It can be found living in volcanic areas. In battle, Magmar blows out intense flames all over its body to intimidate the opponent. This creates heat waves that ignite grass and trees in the surroundings. Abilità: Corpodifuoco, Spiritovivo.

Electrike.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #309. Categoria: Pokémon Lightning. Their fur stores electricity, leaving a trail of sparks as they run. By stimulating their legs with voltage, Electrike's speed and power is greatly increased. They are not very common, though. Abilità: Parafulmine, Statico.

Articuno.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #144. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . Rumor has it that one appeared during a blizzard in front of two lost hikers who followed its glistening trail until they found the main road. Others say its silhouette can be seen during raging snow storms. Abilità: Pressione, Mantelneve.

Zygarde 100%.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #718. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . The complete form of Zygarde. Abilità: Frangiaura.

Hatenna.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #856. Categoria: Pokémon Calm. Through the protrusion on its head it senses other creatures' emotions. If you don't have a calm disposition, it will never warm up to you. They get overwhelmed in places with many people, preferring to hide alone. Abilità: Curacuore, Presagio.

Scyther.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #123. Categoria: Pokémon Mantis. It's pretty rare, but a few swarms have been seen in the grasslands. It tears and shreds prey with its wickedly sharp scythes and very rarely spreads its wings to fly. This Pokémon is stealthy and aggressive. Abilità: Aiutinsetto, Tecnico.

Binacle.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #688. Categoria: Pokémon Two-Handed. In the shallow sea, two Binacle live inside a hollow rock. If they don't get along, one of them will move to a different rock. They eat the seaweed that washes up on the shore and help each other to survive. Abilità: Unghiedure, Arraffalesto.

Scatterbug.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #664. Categoria: Pokémon Scatterdust. The powder that covers its body regulates its temperature so it is able to live in any region or climate. Whenever it is under attack, it spews a black powder that causes paralysis on contact. Abilità: Polvoscudo, Amicoscudo.

Lopunny (Mega Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #428. Categoria: Pokémon Rabbit. The power of the Mega Stone awakens its combative nature. Most of its fur is lost due to constant fighting; even its ears are used as weapons, whipping foes with heavy hits. Abilità: Nervisaldi.

Graveler.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #075. Categoria: Pokémon Rock. It walks slowly, but it can get a nice speed by rolling downhill. It is good at climbing. Groups of them have been seen clinging from rock formations and cliffs to eat the tasty rocks covered in moss. Abilità: Testadura, Vigore.

Torracat.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #726. Categoria: Pokémon Fire Cat. The bell on its neck glows and chimes when it shoots fire through it. Although it acts spoiled with its trainer, it is a capable and relentless brawler. It will keep battling until its foes lose their fighting spirits. Abilità: Aiutofuoco, Prepotenza.

Solrock.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #338. Categoria: Pokémon Meteorite. People say it came from space. They release the purest light when they get angry. Usually found absorbing solar light during the day, Solrock can emit blinding lights and burning heat while spinning. Abilità: Levitazione.

Geodude (Alolan Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #074. Categoria: Pokémon Rock. The magnetic fields on Alola's Blush Mountain made Geodude develop Electric chargers on its body. They tend to disguise themselves as regular rocks; caution is advised, as they shock you if you step on them. Abilità: Magnetismo, Vigore.

Moltres.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #146. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . The legend speaks of a bird who came flying from the south. Its fiery body melted the snow and brought the spring along. A children's book depicts a similar Pokémon living inside of a volcano. Abilità: Pressione, Corpodifuoco.

Wartortle.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #008. Categoria: Pokémon Turtle. Its large tail is covered with rich, thick fur that deepens in color with age. The scratches on its shell are evidence of this Pokémon's tough attitude in battle. It is a good hunter underwater. Abilità: Acquaiuto, Copripioggia.

Wimpod.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #767. Categoria: Pokémon Turn Tail. They are curious but very cowardly Pokémon. They are easily startled and will shoot a stenchy liquid as a warning. Even so, they are highly valued due to their ability to eat and clean any garbage. Abilità: Fuggifuggi.

Vanilluxe.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #584. Categoria: Pokémon Snowstorm. It grew a new head with evolution, and they get along really well. They need to drink a lot of water in order to keep cool outside of gelid weather. If both heads get angry they will expel a terrible blizzard. Abilità: Corpogelo, Sottilguscio.

Kyogre (Primal Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #382. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . Millions of years ago, chaos reigned. Neverending typhoons drowned all life under unforgiving waters. Who was so sad and hurt in the deep darkness of the sea? Its sapphire tears still flood the world. Abilità: Mare Primordiale.

Pawniard.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #624. Categoria: Pokémon Sharp Blade. They live in groups commanded by Bisharp. They cling to their prey and inflict damage by sinking their blades into them. If battling dulls the blades, it sharpens them on stones by the river. It takes them years to evolve. Abilità: Agonismo, Forza Interiore.

Dudunsparce.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #982. Categoria: Pokémon Land Snake. It builds nests within solid bedrock by using its tail. Gentle in nature, it will carry any Pokémon who wander into its home and guide them back to the exit. Enemies will be driven out by a blast of air from its lungs. Abilità: Paura, Leggiadro.

Mareep.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #179. Categoria: Pokémon Wool. Its fluffy coat of wool builds a static charge. The more static electricity, the more brightly the lightbulb at the tip of its tail glows. Farmers shear their wool in the summer, but it grows back quickly. Abilità: Statico, Più.

Basculin (Hisuian Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #550. Categoria: Pokémon Hostile (?). A Basculin variant that existed in old Hisui. It had a timid and skittish demeanor, unlike the modern specimens who are prone to violence. It was rare to see; it fled as soon as it noticed you. None have been seen in 200 years. Abilità: Paura, Adattabilità.

Revavroom.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #966. Categoria: Pokémon Multi-Cyl. It wards off threats with the vicious sound of its exhaust. If that is not effective, it can spray toxic fluids and pump out a cloud of poisonous gas. Due to its size it can now attach itself to and power large vehicles. Abilità: Copricapo, Filtro.

Politoed.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #186. Categoria: Pokémon Frog. It lives with Poliwags and Poliwhirls near ponds and lakes, but there's rarely more than one. Politoed is the leader and acts as the king of the group. It is an easy-going but proud Pokémon. Abilità: Assorbacqua, Piovischio.

Slowbro (Mega Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #080. Categoria: Pokémon Hermit Crab. With the power of the Mega Stone, the Shellder on its tail becomes a bulletproof armor that swallows its host's whole body. Slowbro doesn't seem to mind and looks pretty comfy nesting inside. Abilità: Guscioscudo.

Klinklang.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #601. Categoria: Pokémon Gear. The gear with the red core rotates at high speed for a quick energy charge. The mini-gears shoot rays through the spikes around it. This inorganic Pokémon will trap and crush foes between its gears. Abilità: Meno, Corpochiaro.

Ninjask.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #291. Categoria: Pokémon Ninja. Due to their speed and stealthiness, this Pokémon was believed to be invisible. They refuse to obey people and cry continuously if forced. People burn their cocoons as they are said to be cursed. Abilità: Acceleratore, Intrapasso.

Igglybuff.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #174. Categoria: Pokémon Balloon. It has a very light body that makes it float and bounce. If you are not careful, it can bounce away without control. After being bottle-fed, it will not bounce but wiggle around. It gets cranky if it doesn't take a nap. Abilità: Incantevole, Tenacia.

Miraidon.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #1008. Categoria: Pokémon Paradox. Some scientists theorize that all Pokémon's ability to evolve according its environment will eventually catch up with the technology advances that humanity is making. Abilità: Motore Adronico.

Copperajah.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #879. Categoria: Pokémon Copperderm. They originally came from another region. Since long ago they've worked together with humans, helping them pave new roads and build cities. They are usually calm and love spending time with their families. Abilità: Forzabruta, Metalpesante.

Shuckle.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #213. Categoria: Pokémon Mold. Shuckle is a very peaceful and patient gooey worm. The fluids secreted by its toes can make holes in rocks. It hides inside those hollow stones and wears them as a shell. It is known for storing berries inside. Abilità: Vigore, Inversione.

Golem (Alolan Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #076. Categoria: Pokémon Megaton. The Alolan variant of Golem does not roll around like its counterpart; instead it loads rocks into the charger on its head and shoots them around. If the rocks miss, the electric shockwave doesn't. Abilità: Pellelettro, Vigore.

Hoothoot.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #163. Categoria: Pokémon Owl. A nocturnal Pokémon found in dark forests. It has an internal organ that senses the earth's rotation. By using this special organ, a Hoothoot begins hooting at precisely the same time every day. Abilità: Insonnia, Sguardofermo.

Stonjourner.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #874. Categoria: Pokémon Big Rock. They spend almost all their lives immobile, disguised as inconspicuous rocks. Once a year they gather out of nowhere and form up in a circle. They stay in formation for a few days and then disappear overnight. Abilità: Fonte Energetica.

Weedle.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #013. Categoria: Pokémon Hairy. Often found in forests eating leaves. It has a sharp, venomous stinger on its head for defense. It has an acute sense of smell to find food, and its brightly-colored body is intended to warn off predators. Abilità: Polvoscudo, Fugafacile.

Wurmple.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #265. Categoria: Pokémon Worm. It uses the spikes on its rear to peel the bark from trees and feed on their sap. Their feet have suction pads to climb easily. Wurmple are plentiful and live in forests, but they are often attacked by bird Pokémon. Abilità: Polvoscudo, Fugafacile.

Iron Jugulis.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #993. Categoria: Pokémon Paradox. A machine loaded with an A.I. of Hydreigon's temper and desire for destruction. It doesn't rest, doesn't show mercy, no matter what. Abilità: Carica Quark.

Tropius.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #357. Categoria: Pokémon Fruit. It is very common in humid and hot regions. It can grow back the fruit it has eaten. Mothers prefer Tropius fruits to feed their children as it is more nutritious and sweet. They are mellow and friendly Pokémon. Abilità: Clorofilla, Solarpotere.

Lillipup.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #506. Categoria: Pokémon Puppy. Good with children and old people, this gentle Pokémon is a favorite to keep as pet. It is very brave and smart. It will protect its trainer against any threat. It uses the fur on its face to feel its surroundings. Abilità: Spiritovivo, Raccolta.

Frillish.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #592. Categoria: Pokémon Floating. If a Frillish is spotted, all beaches nearby will be closed for the day. This Pokemon paralizes a swimming victim and wraps them, dragging them to the bottom of the sea. Females are usually pink. Abilità: Assorbacqua, Umidità.

Gothitelle.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #576. Categoria: Pokémon Astral Body. They can predict the future from the placement and movement of the stars. They get restless if someone they know will be in danger. They are empathic creatures that can understand human emotion. Abilità: Tenacia, Pedinombra.

Clodsire.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #980. Categoria: Pokémon Spiny Fish. You may see it carry Wooper on its back to ferry them across swamps. Despite its friendly appearance, when attacked, this Pokémon will retaliate by sticking thick venomous spines out from its body. Abilità: Velenopunto, Assorbacqua.

Lycanroc (Midnight Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #745. Categoria: Pokémon Wolf. A poorly-behaved Rockruff will evolve at midnight. This Pokémon is savage and has no regard for its own safety. It taunts and provokes foes a lot stronger just to get its own blood boiling. Abilità: Spiritovivo, Nullodifesa.

Dolliv.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #929. Categoria: Pokémon Olive. They have coexisted with humans since before civilization began. They bask in the sun and produce a tasty oil they share with others. However, once the fruits on their heads ripen, they depart on a journey to evolve. Abilità: Sveglialampo, Coglibacche.

Vikavolt.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #738. Categoria: Pokémon Stag Beetle. The electricity it shoots through its jaws is very dangerous. It zaps bird Pokémon trying to eat it. Its flight is peculiar: it bends in a 90 degree angle or flies backwards without a problem. Abilità: Levitazione.

Combee.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #415. Categoria: Pokémon Tiny Bee. It forms hives around trees. It flies all day sipping the nectar from flowers to make honey. It is usually born a male. If a female is born, it will grow into a Vespiquen and start its own hive. Abilità: Mielincetta, Tuttafretta.

Terapagos (Terastal Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #1024. Categoria: Pokémon Tera. The connection they have to the Terastral phenomenon is still a mystery. It has shown the ability of terastallizing at will by absorbing the energy of attacks coming its way. Abilità: Teraguscio.

Celebi.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #251. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . Guardian of the Forest. Celebi is said to be able to travel through time, amending mistakes from people who hurt the land, and crafting a bright future for those who live nearby. Abilità: Alternacura.

Duskull.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #355. Categoria: Pokémon Requiem. They wander at night. They can make themselves invisible and they follow travelers all night until dawn breaks. It loves the crying of little children; they can be seen scaring kids who misbehaved during the day. Abilità: Indagine, Levitazione.

Petilil.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #548. Categoria: Pokémon Bulb. Since they prefer moist and nutritious soil, the areas where Petilil live are known to be good for growing plants. The leaves on its head can be used for medicinal purposes, but they are extra bitter. Abilità: Clorofilla, Mente Locale.

Bidoof.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #399. Categoria: Pokémon Plump Mouse. Steady as a mountain, Bidoof has nerves of steel so nothing can disturb its focus. It is agile, active, and a great team worker. They live in huge packs alongside rivers; the dams they build are incredibly sturdy. Abilità: Disinvoltura, Imprudenza.

Manectric.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #310. Categoria: Pokémon Discharge. Their manes are constantly releasing dangerous sparks that often end up in forest fires. When they get in battle, thunderclouds show up with them. They are extremely rare to see in the wild. Abilità: Parafulmine, Statico.

Mantine.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #226. Categoria: Pokémon Kite. Mantine swims under water and over the waves, gliding for 300 ft in the air. They are intelligent and docile, traveling elegantly in groups. Remoraid can be seen hanging from their fins from time to time. Abilità: Nuotovelox, Assorbacqua.

Skwovet.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #819. Categoria: Pokémon Cheeky. They love to feed on berries and nuts they store on their cheeks. They can get very anxious if its cheeks are empty. If you feed one of them, they will follow you and call for others so you feed them as well. Abilità: Guancegonfie, Voracità.

Meloetta (Pirouette Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #648. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . There are old songs about a beautiful Pokémon that inspired the hearts of artists through its graceful dance and singing. Abilità: Leggiadro.

Machoke.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #067. Categoria: Pokémon Superpower. Even with its strong frame and power, it is a humble and helpful Pokémon. Many of them work for human companies. On their days off, you can see them heading to the wild to train together. Abilità: Dentistretti, Nullodifesa.

Cyndaquil.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #155. Categoria: Pokémon Fire Mouse. A shy and elusive Pokémon. The flames from its back protect it. They'll burn vigorously if Cyndaquil is angry, otherwise they'll remain unlit. It lives in hot dens inside of mountains and volcanoes. Abilità: Aiutofuoco, Fuocardore.

Chatot.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #441. Categoria: Pokémon Music Note. It mimics the cries of other Pokémon to trick them and prevent attacks. Chatot who live with humans learn words and phrases, but it's unknown it they really know their meaning. Their imitations are very convincing. Abilità: Sguardofermo, Intricopiedi.

Obstagoon.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #862. Categoria: Pokémon Blocking. Its voice has a very loud volume and it is a noisy and rude Pokémon. Obstagoon has a tendency to take on a threatening posture and shout at anyone that is in front of it. They rarely take things seriously. Abilità: Agonismo, Dentistretti.

Dugtrio (Alolan Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #051. Categoria: Pokémon Mole. Thanks to its golden mane, this Pokémon has been revered as a feminine deity. The triplets groom each other to help keep the hair glossy and dirt-free. They don't like to be petted. Abilità: Sabbiavelo, Boccolidoro.

Piplup.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #393. Categoria: Pokémon Penguin. Piplups are extremely proud. They won't take anything from anyone nor accept being taken care of. They live along shores in northern countries. They're great swimmers but walk in waddles, often tripping. Abilità: Acquaiuto, Agonismo.

Sceptile (Mega Form).biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #254. Categoria: Pokémon Forest. With the power of the Mega Stone, it allows itself to grow more feral in order to gain draconian powers. Its movements are swifter than ever, and when it attacks, it seems like the jungle has come to life. Abilità: Parafulmine.

Sentret.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #161. Categoria: Pokémon Scout. It lives underground with its family. It is cautious and nervous by nature. Sentret is always vigilant for any threat. It is very friendly among its kind and suffers a lot if separated from its pack. Abilità: Fugafacile, Sguardofermo.

Appletun.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #842. Categoria: Pokémon Apple Nectar. Eating a sweet apple caused its evolution. A nectarous scent wafts from its body, luring in the bug Pokémon it preys on, but it also attracts other Pokémon who eat the skins atop of its back. Abilità: Maturazione, Grassospesso.

Maushold.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #925. Categoria: Pokémon Family. When two Tandemaus love each other very very much they'll start a loving family. The larger pair will protect the little ones but if the foe is too strong, all the family will join to bring down the menace. Abilità: Amicoscudo, Tecnico.

Snorunt.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #361. Categoria: Pokémon Snow Hat. This friendly Pokémon lives in cold mountains and deserted snowlands. It survives by eating snow and ice. They form small groups to protect themselves from predators. If you take their hat off, they will get angry. Abilità: Corpogelo, Forza Interiore.

Fomantis.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #753. Categoria: Pokémon Sickle Grass. They sleep during the day, absorbing sunlight in a flower meadow; by night they become active and search for another spot to sleep. Their arms are made of sharp grass leaves to defend themselves. Abilità: Fogliamanto, Inversione.

Dwebble.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #557. Categoria: Pokémon Rock Inn. Their saliva is corrosive and they use it to slowly cut pieces of rock. The rock becomes a shelter until it grows too large for it. If the rock breaks, it stays anxious and agitated until it finds a replacement. Abilità: Vigore, Guscioscudo.

Wingull.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #278. Categoria: Pokémon Seagull. They carry prey and precious items in their beaks, hiding them in strange locations. They nest in sheer cliffs at the sea's edge. They often harass fishing boats to steal an easy meal for themselves. Abilità: Sguardofermo, Copripioggia.

Darkrai.biography: Voce del Corebook Pokédex #491. Categoria: Pokédex privo di dati. . All around the world, young children have depicted a similar figure in their drawings. They call it 'The Boogeyman'. People say it will make all your nightmares come true. Abilità: Sogniamari.
